pericopes.title: Jeremiah kikou leh atoh ding kipeh
Nung lama mi seise Israelte Pakaiyin angehna
Israel leh Judah lungkhel dinga aki-ngehna
Nalampi hou leh nathilbol hou kisemphat’uvin
Pathen hetdoh kiti hi mihem loupina ahi.
Taigah pon suhsetsa a kona kihilna
Judah gim thoh nom loujeh a Sohchang dia kigih na
Twi hahsat jeh a tho hung lhung
Judah lungthim chu chonset’in atomjol tai
Cholngah nikho chu Athenga umsah tei ding
Bel dengpan belleiya bel adenna kihilna
Mipin Jeremiah abolset gotnau thil ho, Jeremiah Taona
Pashhur Thempun Jeremiah songkula akhum jeh a kigaosapna
Theichang ga pha le ga phalouva kihilna
Babylonin adalhahna kum som sagi sung
Namtin vaipi jouse dinga lungsatna khon
Hananiah chun jou le nal a gaothu asei
Bulput henlhahna a kiledoh ding kiteppeh
Anathoth muna Jeremiah chun loumun khat achoh
Hebrew mi soh kivul thudol suhkehna dinga kitepna
Jeremiah le Gedaliah to umkhom amoh chengse
Gedaliah douna Ishmael in thilse angaito khom
Egypt gama um Judah mite henga Jeremiah gao thusei
Edom chung chang thudola gaothu kisei
Kedar le Hazor chung changa gaothu kisei
Elam chung chang thudola gaothu kisei

chapters.text: Benjamin gamsunga An’athoth khoa thempu ho lah a Hilki’ah chapa Jeremiah thuseiho,
Judah lengpa Amon chapa Josi’ah lengchan kal kum somle kum thum lhin kumin, Jeremiah henga chun Pakai thusei ahung lhung tai.

Hiche chu Judah lengpa Josi’ah chapa Jehoi’akim nikho lai jengin jong ahung jin, Judah lengpa Josi’ah chapa Zedeki’ah leng chan kal kum somle kum khat chan gei, lha nga lhin na Jerusalem soh chan geiyin jong ahung lhung jin ahi.
Hiti chun kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati,

@@@1“Keiman naobu sunga nalim kagondoh @3masanga @2Nangma kahetsa nahitan, @1Chule nahung penlhah masanga @2Nangma kathensosa nahitai; @1Keiman nang hi namtin vaipi ho @3henga @2Themgao khat’a pang dia kapansah @3nahitai,” ati.
Chuphat’in ken jong, “Ahipoi, Pakai Pathen! Vetan, keima kachapang behseh jengin thuseiye jong kahe hih laiye,” katileh;

@@Ahivangin Pakai chun kajah a, @1“Keima kachapang behseh nalaiye,’ tin @3sei dan; @2Ajeh chu keiman kasolna miho henga @3chu nache ding, @1Chule keiman kathupeh chan chu ipi @3hijongleh @2Nasei ding ahibouve.
@@@1Amaho chu kicha hih-in, @2Ajeh chu nahuhdoh dingin keiman ka @3umpi nai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
@@Hichun Pakaiyin akhut ahin lhangin kakamsung ahin thamin, hiti chun Pakaiyin kajah a, @2“Vetan, keiman keima thusei ho @3Nakamsunga kakoipeh tai.

@@@1Ven, tu nin keiman nangma hi @2Namtin vaipi ho leh lenggam jouse @3chunga katung tai, @1Aga loulha dingleh aheh bong ding, @2Asumang ding leh alehkhup ding, @1Asadoh ding leh aphutdoh dingin,” ati.
Hiti chun Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati, “Jeremiah, ipi pi namum?” eiti. Hichun keiman, “Jonmot thing tenggol khat kamui,” kati.
Chuin Pakai chun kajah a, “Nangman phate chan namutai, ijeh-inem itileh keiman kathusei chu boldoh tei dinga ka nga lhih jing jeng nahi,” ati.
Anivei lhin nan Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhung kit’in hitin ati, “Ipi pi namum?” eitin, ken jong niso lam ngat twisa ki-omna bel khat kamui,” kati,
Hichun Pakaiyin keima jah a, “Niso lam a konin agilou hung kondoh intin, gamsunga chengte jouse chunga hung lhung ding ahi.

Ajeh chu neive tan, ‘Keiman niso lam a lenggam hoa um phungtin kakouve,’ tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; chule amaho chu hunguva Jerusalem lutna kelkot dung jouse leh akimvel a apal dung kimvel a chule Judah gam khopi jouse kim vel a alal touna akido cheh dingu ahi.

Chule keima eidon dauva agitlounau jouse jeh a keiman amaho douna thutanna kahinsei ding ahi; ajeh chu amahon pathen chom chom henga gimnamtui ahalnam uvin, amaho khutsoh thilsem ho chu chibai aboh-uvin ahi.

Hijong leh nangman vang natai kigah-in lang dingdoh-in keiman nang kathupeh jouse chu amaho henga seipeh tan. Lung thoina nei hih helin amaho jeh hin, achutilou leh amaho angsunga khu nangma kalung thoisah ding nahiye.

Chule vetan, tu nia hi keiman nang hi kulpi kikai khum khopi khat, thih khom khat, sum-eng pal hoa kikai khum khat’a, gam pumpi douna leh Judah leng ho jouse douna, leng chapa ho jouse chule gamsung mite douna kasem nahiye.
Hiche ho chun nangma douna gal hinbol uvin tin, ahivanga najo lou dingu ahi, ijeh-inem itileh nangma huhdoh dingin keiman nang kaumpi jing nai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.” ati.
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati,

@@“Chen lang Jerusalem nakhanga gaphongjal tan, Pakaiyin aseiye, @1“Keiman nakhangdon laiya nakitahna, @2Ji nei dingnu milungset banga nalungset @3chu kageldoh jinge. @1Ito bang tah a nangman muchi kitukhah @3na louhel @2Gammang lah a chu neina juile le @3hitam.
@@@1Israel hi Pakai dinga atheng ahin, @2Alho lhun aga masa ahiye; @1Hiche nekha chengse chu themmo @3achang gamuvin, @2Achunguva agilou ahung lhung tai, @3tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Vo Jacob insung leh Israel insunga phung jousen Pakai thusei hi ngaiyuvin.

@@Pakai chun hitin aseiye, @1“Napu napa teuvin kei chunga adihlou @3ipi amudoh-uva @2Keiya kona gamla tah ache manguva, @1Phatchomna bei thil ho nung ajuiyuva @2Chuta chu phatchomna beiya umgam @3hitauvam?

@@@1Amahon ‘Pakai chu hoiya umba hitam, @2Egypt gama kona eiho eihin puidoh @3pau, @1Gammang noiya eina puileuva, @2Neldi gamsung dungle kokhuh lah, @1Twi beina gamle muthim gam, @2Koima cha galkai thei louna gam leh @1Mihem koima cha chen na khah louhel @2Gama eina puile pau chu?’ atipouve.

@@@1Keiman nangho hi gam phatah a @2Agamga ho leh athilpha pha naneh @3dinguva kahin puidoh nahiuve. @1Ahinla nahung lut phat’uvin kagam chu @3nasuboh-uvin, @2Keima goulo gam chu thet umtah-in @3nasem tauve.

@@@1Thempuhon la, ‘Pakai hoilama ba um @3hitam,’ tin eihol pouvin, @2Danthu tuh jing hon jong koiman @3eihe tapouve; @1Vaihomhon la keima dounan suhkhel @3jeng abol tauvin, @1Themgao ho jeng jong Baal jenga @3agao tauvin, @1Phatchomna beihel thil ho chu @2Anung nung ajuisoh tauvin ahi.
@@@1“Hijeh a chu keima nachunguva kalung @3han a @2Natuteu chung geiya jong kalung han @3ding ahi tin Pakaiyin,” aseiye.
@@@1“Ajeh chu Cyprus twikhanglen pang galkaiyuvin @3lang gavetem uvin, @2Ahiloule Kedar a mi soluvin phatah @3in gakhol temuvin; @1Hitobang thil hi um kha nam @2Gavetem’uvin.
@@@1Pathen hi hih jeng jong leh @2Nam khat chun a-Pathen ho akhel @3khah nah um? @1Ahinla keima miten aloupina u chu @2Phatchomna beihel thil chutoh akhelto @3tauve.
@@@1O van jong hichea hin tija hen lang, @2Kidang sahen lang thip helin um @3jeng hen,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye,
@@@1“Ijeh-inem itileh thil gilou tah thil @3ni abol tauve, @2Amahon hin na twinah keima eidalhauvin, @1Amaho ding tumtah-in twikul akilai tauve, @2Twikul kehsa, twi veina thei lou chu.
@@@1Israel hi soh hiyam? @2Ama hi ina peng soh ham? @1Chuti ahileh ipi dinga mi nehgam ding @3bep a umdoh ham?
@@@1Hichepa douna chun sakei ho akisen tauve, @2Othongje jun akisenuvin ahi; @1Hiche ho chun amapa gamsung chu asu @3chaiyuvin, @2Akhopi jouse jong agamsoh-in, acheng @3beiyin aumtauve.
@@@1Noph mite leh Tah’panhes miten jong @2Nalujanga nalallukhuh avokeh tauve.
@@@1Hiche hi nangman @2Pakai na-Pathenin lampia napuipet’a @1Nangin ama nadalhahjeh a @2Nachunga nakilhut khum joh hilou @3ham?

@@@1Ahile tua hi Egypt lampi langa nachea @3ipi phatchomna naneiyam? @2Sihor dung twi don ding nagot ham? @1Ahilouleh ipi phatchomna Assyria lang @3lampia nache ham? @2Vadung twipi don dinga che nahim?

@@@1Nangma nagitlou nan nasudih intin, @2Pathen nadoudal nan naphoh dih @3nante. @1Hethemin lang chule vetan hiche hi thil @3gilou ahin akha cheh-e, @2Nangma dinga Pakai na-Pathen dalhah @3ding chu; @1Nasunga keima ginna achengpoi,” @2Tin thaneipen Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

@@@1“Ijeh-inem itileh sot laipeh a pat a @3nangman @2Na namkol napoh boh a nakikanna @3khaoho natumtan ahitai; @1Chujongleh nangman, ‘Jenle taponge,’ @3natin ahi. @2Ajeh chu lhang sang lai jouse leh @1Thingna eng noi tin a @2Nangma noti bangin nakunle jol @3jolin ahi.
@@@1Ahivanga keiman nang hi lhentum @3lengpithei @2Muchi thengsela kona kila banga @3kaphusa nahi; @1I-atia ahileh hibanga kisuneo nahiya @2Chule gamlah lengpithei banga @3naum hitam?
@@@1Nangma tahsa-ngelin kisilin lang @2Sabon tamtah mang jongle chun @1Nathemmona nen chu @2Keima angsunga akilang jinge,” tin @3Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

@@@1I-atileh nangman, ‘Keima eikisuboh poi, @2Ken jong Baal nung kajuipoi’ nati @3ham? @1Phaichama nalampi khu ven lang, @2Ipi nabol ham kihet themin @1Sangong sao lagol bep louchal tah, @2Atin a tinbeh kikhet beh peh tobang @3nahibouve.

@@@1Gam lah sangan gammang lah a lha le @2Atisat tengleh huidap lah lah a lhaile le @3tobang nahin, @1Aman aduchat chu koipenin akham tang @3thei ding ham! @2Amanu deichat holpeh chengse chu @3khatcha jong acholpon, @1Amanu alha lhin phat ma ma @2Amudoh dingu ahibouve.

@@@1Nakeng phang teni keovin lamjot @3hih-in, @2Nalolbuh jong dangchah sah hih @3helin. @1Ahinla nangman, ‘Hiche hi kinepna bei @3ahibouve, @2Ajeh chu keiman gamchom miho @3kalungset’in @1Hijeh a chu amaho nung nunga @2Kache ding ahi’ nati.
@@@1“Gucha chu akimatdoh tengleh ajachat @3banga @2Israel insung jong chu hung jahcha @3ding ahi; @1Amaho ahiuvin, alengteu ahin, aleng @3chapateu ahin, @2Athempu jouseu ahin, athemgao @3jouseu ahin,

@@@1Thingphungjah a, ‘Nang hi ka-pa nahi, @3ti ho. @2Chule song phung jah a, ‘Nangin @3neihinsa a hi,’ tiho chu. @1Ijeh-inem itileh amahon anunglam eingat gamuvin @2A-ang lam eingsat’a aum tapouve. @1Ahivang chun agenthei tenguleh, @2‘Hung thoudoh-in lang nei huhhinguvin,’ @3ati jiuve.

@@@1Ahileh na-pathenho chu hoilama @3umba hitam? @2Nangin nangma ding mong monga @3nakisem ho chu? @1Hiche ho chun nahuhhing theiyuva @3ahileh @2Nagenthei pet chun hung kipatdoh sah @3jeng tangem; @1Ijeh-inem itileh Vo Judah, @2Nakhopi jouse jat’a na-pathen ho @3jong umah ahi me.
@@@1“Achutileh ibola keima engkalna kiphin @3nahiuvam? @2Nabonchauvin keima doumah jeng @3naboltauve,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
@@@1Pannabeiya keiman nachateu kanaden @3ahitan, @2Amahon suhdihna khat cha jong @3akilah pouve; @1Nangho chemjam ma man na-themgao ho @3jouseu @2Sakei neh hat banga aneh gamsoh @3ahitai.

@@@1Hijeh chun Vo hiche khang mite, @2Pakai thusei hi ngaiyuvin. @1Keima hi Israel dinga gammang @3lah kanahi, @2Ahilouleh gamtu thim lah kanahim? @1Achutileh ipi dinga kamiten, @2Keiho kacham cham kahiuve, @1Nangma henga hungkit tapou vinge.’ @2Tia iti aseiyu hitam?
@@@1Nu-ngah nun akijepna ho asuhmil ngaiya, @2Ahilouleh jinei ding nun avon ahai @3thei ngaiyam? @2Ahinla kamiten ajat sim joulou nikho @3sung hin @2Keima eisumil del tauvin ahi.
@@@1“Itidol a nangman dongma holna dinga @2Nalampi nasem jangkei jeng ham? @1Hiti chun numei gilou jeng @3jong chu @2Nangman nalampi jouse nahiltai.
@@@1Chujongleh naponsil chung dunga chun @2Themmona bei tahlelte thisan beh @3akimudoh-e; @2Chule hiche ho chu ahung vat lut @3lam nahepoi; @2Ijeh-inem itileh thil hicheng jong chun

@@@1Nangman, ‘Keima themmona bei kahin, @2Hijeh chun ama lunghan chu atah beh @3a keiya kona kihei mangsa ahitai,’ @4nati. @1Neivetan, ‘Keima kachonse poi,’ tia @3nasei jeh a @2Keiman nang hi thutanna kapuilut @3ding nahi.
@@@1Itidola nangma baikhen cha nachedoh @3le lea @2Nalampi nakhel le le ham? @1Assyria in nangma najumso banga chu @2Egypt’ in jong najumso tei ding ahi.

@@@1Hichea kon a chu nangma nakikolnam thangsea @3nahung potdoh ding ahi. @2Ijeh-inem itileh nangman kingaina @2nanei ho chu @1Pakaiyin adonlousa ahitan. @2Amaho jeh a chu nangma nakhantou @3louhel ding ahi.

@@@1“Hitin aseiyin, vetan, pasal khat touvin @3ajinu ada a @2Amanu chu amapa henga kon a achedoh a @1Pasal chomdang khat jinu ahi tengleh. @2Khatpa chu amanu henga lut kitji @3mong nam? @1Hiche gam chu hatah a kisuthang jeng @3lou ding ham? @2Nangma dongma tamtah henga notin @3napangtai; @1Hijeh a chu keima henga nahung kilekit @3lou ding ahi,” @2Tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

@@@1“Khodah-in lang, lhangsang chai velvul @3dung khu vetan, @2Hoilai pen khu min naluppi louna um @3nalai yam? @1Gamthip noiya Rahab bang chun @2Lamvel dunga natouvin dongma na-ngah @3le len; @1Chule na-noti chon umchan phamo tah chun @2Nangman gamsung nasuboh soh keiyin nahi.

@@@1Hichejeh chun gohong juding jong akituh @3tangin, @2Chule chavang lai gotwi jong ahung @3ju tapoi; @2Ahivangin nangma noti bangin namitmul khujen @3junin, @1Jachat ding jong imacha na-ngaisah tapoi.
@@@1Tule tukah jenga jong chu nangman @2‘Nangma keima pa nahin, kakhangdon @3laiya kagol nahi.

@@@1Ama chu aitih geiya lung hang jing @3ding ha. @2Akhon ni geiya lung phamo jing jeng @3ding ham’neiti lou ham? @1Vetan, nangman thu naseitan, @2Ahivangin nangman nabol thei chan @3agilou abonchan nabol na laiye,” @4ati.

Josi’ah lengpa nikho laiyin Pakaiyin keima jah a thu ahin seitan. “Kitahna neilou hiche Israel kiti nu khun ipipen tah anabol’a, itobanga lhang sang lai laiya gatouva, thingna eng noi noiya ipi anabol hitam nangin namudoh tah em?
Ahivangin keiman, ‘Hicheng hi abol jou tengleh keima henga hung kilekit tante,’ tin kanagelin; ahinla amanu ahung kilekit deh tapon, asopinu Judah-in hiche chu amudoh tai.

Hiche kitahna bei Israel kitinu ajon thanhoina chengse jala chu keiman dana lekha kapeh a kada ahitai, ti amanun amudoh tan, ahivang chun asopi michavai nu Judah-in jong kichatnan ana neideh poi; ama jong noti chon chun anachonin ahiye.
Ajeh chu amanu ngaiton noti chonna kiti chu bai khen cha ahin, hijeh chun song phung le thingphung toh noti chonin achontan, gamsung asuboh gamtai.
Hijongle hichengse pi jal hin asopi michavai nu Judah jong alungthim pumpin kahenga ahung kilekit deh poi, kilepna joh-in Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, atibouve,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin kajah a, “Kitahna bei Israel kitinu khun michavai kitinu Judah sangin ama le ama themmona neojon akimusah tai.

@@Chen lang thu hicheng hi sah lam gamkaiya gaphongjal’in lang chule gaseitan, @1‘Hung kilekit’in kitahna bei Israel @2Tin Pakaiyin aseiye; @1Keiman nachunguva kalunghan chuhsah @3taponge, @2Ajeh chu keima mihepi themtah kahi,’ @3tin @1Pakaiyin asei yin; @2Keima aitih chan a kalung han jing @3louding ahi.

@@@1Nathemmona chu phongdoh pou pouvin @3lang @2Pakai Pathen doumah mah naboltan, @1Thingna eng noi tin a nadeichat jouse @2Gamdang mite lah-a mathe thang @3jengtai. @1Chule nangman kathusei jong na @3ngaipoi, @2Tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

@@@1Vo kitahna bei chate hung kilekit’uvin, @3tin Pakaiyin aseiye: @2Ijeh-inem itileh keima nangho pupa @3kahi. @1Keiman nangho chu kalah khom khoma @2Khopi khat’a kon a khat kalah a @1Insung khat’a kona mi ni kalah ding. @2Ziona kahin puilut ding nahiuve.
Chule keiman nangho hi keima lung deiya kelngoi chin banga naching dingu kelngoi ching mi ho kapeh diu, amahon hetna le thil hetkhen themna navah dingu ahi.

Nangho gamsunga hi hiche nikho laile chun napunbe cheh cheh-uva nakhantou cheh cheh tenguleh, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; amahon jong, ‘Pakai kitepna thing kong tin sei tapouvinte,’ ati. Hiche chu lunggil’a jong hung lut kit louhel ding, gel cha jong kigeldoh louva vil jong kivil kit louhel ding, a bola jong kibol kit louhel ding ahi.
Hiche phat chuleh Jerusalem chu Pakai laltouna kitin tin, namtin vaipi abon chauva Pakai angsung Jerusalem muna hung kikhomuva, louchal tah a amaho lungthim gilouva chu chon lou ding ahiuve.

Hiche nikho laile chun Judah insung chu Israel insung toh hung kijopmat diu, chuteng leh sah lam gamkaiya kona hung kilhon khomuva, keiman napu napateu goulo dinga kapehsa gam chu lo dinga hung ding ahiuve.

@@@1“Chule keiman kanagelin, @2Itibeh a nangma chu kachapate lah a @3kakoiya, @1Chule gam phatah khat nang kapehdoh @3jenga, @2Namtin vaipi jouse lah a hoipen tah @3goulo khat kapeh ding hitam! @1Chule nangman hepa tin neikouvin nate, @3tin kanagelin, @2Keima neijuina kon hin kile kit pon nate, @3kati.
@@@1Tahbeh mongin, kitahna bei numeiyin ajipa @3adalhah bangin @2Vo Israel insung, nangho keima din gin @1Kitahna beiyin naum tauve, @2Tin Pakaiyin aseiye,’ tin aseiye,” ati.

@@@1Lhangvum chaivet vut’a kon khun ogin @3khat akijan, @2Israel chapate dinga ka gin le thumpehna @3gin ahiye; @1Ijeh-inem itileh amahon alampiu akaleh-in @3ahei gam tauvin, @2Pakai a-Pathen jong asumil soh tauve.
@@@1“Hung kile kit’uvin Vo kitahna bei chapate, @2Keiman nangho kitahna bei laitah chu @3boldam minge,” ati. @1Neive temuvin, nahenga kahunguve. @2Ijeh-inem itileh nangma Pakai keiho @3Pathen nahiye.
@@@1Tahbeh mongin thing lhang jouse hi alhem @3jeng ahin, @2Molsang jouse jong hi ngol hoi tah ahiuve. @1Dihtah mongin Pakai i-Pathenuva hin @2Israel huhhingna aumin ahi.
“Ahivangin ikhangdon laiyuva pat jachat umtah thil chun ipu ipateu tohgimna jouse, akelngoi honu ahin, aganchau ahin, achapateu leh achanu jouseu ahin, avallhum gamtan ahi.

Eiho jum manin lumjengu hitin, jamo tah a eikibolnau chu kikhu khumsah uhite; ijeh-inem itileh eiho jong ipateu jong ikhangdon laiyuva pat tu ni geiyin, Pakai i-Pathenu dounan, ichonse jing jenguvin; chule Pakai i-Pathenu ogin ingai tapouvin ahi,” atiuve.

@@@1“Vo Israel, nangma nahung kile kit’ a ahileh, @2Tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, @1Keima henga nahung kile kit ding ahi. @2Nangman ka-angsunga kona @1Nathilbol thet umtah napaidoh theiya @2Nung chon machon natho louva

@@@1Chule nangma ‘Pakai hing jinga,’ tia @3nakihahsel a @2Thutah le thutanna dih chule adih a chu @3nadin a ahileh @1Amaa chu namtin vaipi phatthei kiboh boh @3jeng ding ahiuve, @2Chule amaa chu amaho loupi ding ahiuve,” ati.
@@Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Judah mite leh Jerusalema chengte jah a hi tin aseiye, @1“Naleiset lho lou lah chu kaljaluvin, @2Chule ling lah a chun muchi the hihuvin.

@@@1Pakaiya dingin chep kitanuvin lang @2Nalungthim chep vun chu paidohuvin @1Vo Judah mite leh Jerusalema chengte; @2Achutilou leh kalungsat chu meikong banga @3hung kongjal ding, @1Ahung kah tengleh koimacha aphelmit ding @3umlou hel ding ahiye, @2Nangho thil gilou bol ho Masanga chun,” @3tin aseiye.

@@Judah gama phong jaluvin lang, Jerusalema seichoi leuvin chule gaseiyuvin, @1“Gamsung thongsoh helin sumkon mut’vin lang, @2Hatah tah-in khosamuvin chule gaseiyuvin; @1‘Hung kikhom khomuvin, @2Eiho kulpi kikaikhum khopi sunga @3chun chelut’u hite!’ tin.

@@@1Zion lam ngan ponlap khat tungdoh @3uvin lang, @2Hoidohna dingin jamtauvin, umden den @3hih-uvin; @1Ijeh-inem itileh keiman sahlam gamkaiya @3kona @2Agilou, manthahna nasa tah khat kahin @3lhut khum ding ahi.

@@@1Sakei khat akiselna hamjing lah a konin @3achetou tan, @2Namtin vaipi jouse sumangpa chu ahung @3kipatdoh tai; @1Hichepa chu aumna muna konin akondoh tai, @2Nagamsung asuh gama, @1Nakhopi jouse khogem soh gam ding, @2Acheng beiya hung umding ahiye.

Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Nalampi hou leh nathil bol hou kisem phat’uvin, chutileh keiman nangho hiche muna hi kachensah ding nahiuve.
Hiche kilhep lhahna thusei hoa hin kingai dauvin,” tin aseiyin, ‘Hiche pi hi Pakai houin ahi, Pakai houin ahi, Pakai houin ahi,” tin aseiye,” ati.
“Ijeh-inem itileh nanghon tah beh beh a nalampi hou leh nathil bol hou nakisem phat’uva, atah beh monga khat le, khat thu adih tah a nakitan peh touva,
nanghon kholjin mi, paloute, meithai ho nabol genthei dauva, hiche muna themmona bei mi thisan naso dauva, nangho le nangho kisuh khahna dinga pathen dangho nung najui dauva ahileh,
keiman hiche mun, masang laiya napu napateu atonsot geiya dinga kapehsa gamsunga hi kachensah ding nahiuve.
“Vetan, nangho imacha pang lou ding lhep lhah na thu kiseihoa hin nakingaiyuve.
Nangho naguh chat’uva, tol nathauva, mi toh najonuva, jouva nakihahseluva, Baal dinga gimnamtui nahal nam uva, chule nahet khah lou helu pathen dangho nunga nacheuva,
chule nahunguva hiche in keima min a kiminvoa ka angsunga nahung dinuva chuleh, ‘Keiho eikihuh doh-uva ahitai!’ natiuva, hita chu thet umtah tah hiche ho pi nabol jeng dingu ham?
Nangho mit vet’a keima mina kiminvosa hiche in hi gucha michom ho kokhuh a umdoh ngap jong hitam? Vetan, keiman katahsan hiche kamutai.” tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Ijeh-inem itileh keima umna mun Shiloh, amasa kamin kachensah na muna chun cheuvin lang kamite Israel gitlou jeh a ipi kanabol hitam gave temuvin.

Chule tua hi thil hichengpi hi nabol jeh-uvin,” tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, “chujongle keiman nahenguva tang lou hela thu kaseipet chun nanghon ngaisah in nanei pouvin, chule keiman kahin koupet chun nanghon neina donbut pouve.
Hijeh a chu keiman nanghon kingaina na neiyu napu napateu le nangho kapehsau mun Shiloh kabolna banga chu keima min a kikou insung chu kahinbol ding ahi.
E’phraim chilhah nangho phung gol chanpi ho kapaidoh jeng banga chu nangho jong ka-angsunga kona kahin paidoh jeng ding nahiuve.

“Nangma dingin jong hiche mite ding hin tao jong tao dan lang hung jong hung khosap dan, tao jeng jong taopeh datan, chule kei henga jong hin taopeh hih-in; ajeh chu keiman kajah peh louhel ding nahiye.
Nangman Judah gam khopi dung leh Jerusalem kholai dunga athil bolu khu ipi ahi jong namu louhel ham?

Chapang ho chun thing achomuvin, mipaten mei atih-uvin, numei hon chang-bong ameh-uvin van lengnu dingin chang-lhah asem gouve; chujongleh amahon keima lunghan sahna dingin pathen dang-ho henga chun donthei thilto asung lha-uvin ahi.
Amahon alunghan sah jiu chu keima kahim?” tin Pakaiyin aseiye. “Amaho le amaho kisuh nohna chu amaho le amaho kibol hilou hiuvam?

Hiche-jeh chun Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye: vetan, hiche muna hi mihem chung hihen sahem chung hileh, loujaova thing phung ho chung hihen lang leiset gasoh ho chung hijongleh keima lunghan na hung kibung lha jeng ding, hiche chun meikah banga ahinkah a kiphalmit louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Thaneipen Pakai Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Nakilhai nau gan kithat ho chunga chun pumgo thilto ho jong bol beuvin lang chule asa chu neuvin.
Ajeh chu keiman Egypt gama kona napu napateu kahin puidoh nikho chun amaho jah a pumgo thil kitoh ho thudol ahin kilhaina gan kithat ho thudol ahin thu jong kasei pon, thupeh jong kaneipoi.

Ahin hiche thupeh joh hi amaho kanapei, ‘Keima ogin ngaiyuvin, chutileh keima nangho Pathen hing ting, nangho keima mite nahi dingu ahi; chujongleh nangho dinga aphat theina dingin keiman nangho ka-thupeh na lampi chu jui jinguvin,’ kati-joi.
Ahivangin amahon ngai jong angai-pouvin anakhangu jeng cha jong ahin sung pouve; amaho lunggel jeng leh alouchal nau lungthim gilouva chun ache jom jinguvin, anung chejouvin, amachon tapouve.
Napu napateu Egypt gama kona ahung doh niuva kipat tuni geiyin kalhacha themgaoho chu keiman amaho henga aniseh-in kasol jing jengin;
ahinah vangin amahon kathu angai pouvin, ana-khangu jeng cha jong ahin sung pouvin ahi. Amahon angongu apukon leuvin, apu apateu sangin thilsejo abol tauve.
“Hita chu nangman thu hicheng hi amaho jah a naseipeh ding ahin, amahon vang nasei ngai pouvinte; nangman amaho kou jongle chun amahon nadonbut lou dingu ahi.

Chutengle nangin amaho jah a naseipeh a, ‘Hiche nam mite hi Pakai a-Pathenu thusei ngailou te chu ahiuvin, amahon engbolna jong akisan pouvin, thutah chu amang thah tan, akamsunguva akisat tan hel jeng tai.
Nasam kitanin lang paidoh jengin, Munsang achai lai laiya kap le len, Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin alunghanna nam mite hi Apaidoh tan adalhatai,’ nati ding ahi.
“Ajeh chu Judah chapaten keima mitmun thil gilou aboltauve,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye; “amahon keima mina kiminvo insunga chun athil bolu thet umtah tah ho chu akoitauvin ahi.

Chujongleh amahon achapateu leh achanuteu chu govam jengna dingin Hinnom chapa phaichama chun To’pheth muna munsang tampi asadoh tauve, hiche bol ding chu keiman kathupeh jong hilou hel kalung gila jong hung kilang louhel ahibouve.

Hichejeh chun vetan, anikho ho chu ahung lhunge,” tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, “hiche lai chu To’pheth mun ahilou jongleh Hinnom chapa phaicham kiti kit louhel ding, kitha gamna phaicham joh kiti ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh amahon To’pheth muna chubou thi avui diu, mun dang him him chu ong louhel ding ahi.
Chutengle hiche mite mithi ho long chu chunga leng vachate ding le gamsa ho dinga neh le chah a pang ding, koimachan jong hiche ho chu agahoh jam louhel ding ahiuve.

Chule keiman Judah gamsung khopi jouse le Jerusalem kholai dunga kona kipa thanop ogin kasuh tanga, jinei dingpa kipa ogin leh jinei dingnu kipa ogin kasuh tang ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh agam jong hi ahom keova kijam ding ahi.

Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Hiche phat chuleh Judah lengte gu le chang ho, aleng chapate gu le chang ho, thempu ho gu le chang ho, themgao ho gu le chang ho, Jerusalema chengte gu le chang jouse lhankhuh dunga kona kikhot doh ding;

Hiche ho chu amahon adeiyuva anajen leu, anung nung anajuiyu, anahol leuva chibai anaboh sau nisa le lhathah chule van loupina chengse masanga kiphoujah diu, aboncha chu khom jong kikhom kit’ a vuijong kivui kit louhel ding ahiuve, tollhanga ehgop banga kijam den jeng ding ahiuve.
Mun tina hiche insung giloute ahingdoh amoh chengse chun hin sanga thi ahindei joh dingu ahi,” tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.

Mihem hiche hekhen thei dinga chinga chu koipen ham? Hiche aphondoh theina dinga koipen koma Pakai kamsung in thu ahin sei hitam? Ipi dinga agam hi segam hela akeova gammang lheng lah banga kijama, koimachan jong ahopa louhel hitam?
Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Amahon keima danthu amasang uva kakoipeh chu adalhah-uva, kathusei angai dauva, akitoh-a achon dauva,
apu apateuvin anahil banguva alungthim louchal tah a achonuva, Baal ho nung ajui jeh-u ahi.
Hiche jeh chun thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Neivetan, keiman hiche mite hi gamsaiya kavah a chule gutwi kilhahsa twi kadon sah ding,
chule namtin vaipi, amaho ahiuva apu apateuva pat’a, ahet khah louvu nam mite lah a kathe thang ding, abon chauva kabah gam kahsea anung nunguva chemjam kalensah a kajuisah ding ahi,” ati.

ama vang akiloupi sah pa chu hichea hin kiloupi sah hen, ama chun keima eihekhen theiyin, keima eihen, hijeh chun lungsetna long louva nei jinga Pakai kiti chu keima hi kahin, leiset’a hin thutan dihna le adih jeng kabol jinge, ti he hen; ijeh-inem itileh hitobang thil hoa hin keima kakipah thanom jin ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.

Egypt ahin, Judah ahin, Ammon chate ahiuvin, Moab∑ahin chule neldi gamsunga chengte asamu kitan kim vel ho chengse chu; ajeh chu hiche nam mite ho hi abon chauva chep tan lou ahiuvin, chule Israel insung jong hi lungthima cheptan louma ahiuve,” ati.
Vo Israel insung mite, nangho dia Pakai thusei hiche hi ngaiyuvin.

Pakaiya kona Jeremiah henga hung lhung thu chun hitin ati,
“Hiche kitepna thu kisei hicheng hi ngaiyuvin, chule Judah gama mite leh Jerusalema chengte jah a gaseiyuvin.
Nangman amaho jah a hita nagaseiya, Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseiye, gaosap chang jeng hen, hiche kitepna thu hicheng ngailoupa!

Keiman napu napaleu Egypt gama kon, thih meilhum sunga kona kahin puidoh a kanathupeh-a kaseisa, keima ogin ngaiyuvin lang chule keiman nangho kathupeh chengse chu abonchan bol jing jenguvin; chuti leh nangho kamite hiuvin natin, chule keima na-Pathenu kahi ding ahi;

chutileh keiman napu napateu henga kakihahsela tuni nikhoa banga hi khoiyu le bongnoi lona gam khat penge, kati chu kabol doh thei ding ahi tia kathutep ngailou chu,” ati. Hichun keiman kadonbut’in, “Chuti tei tei hen Pakai,” kati.
Chuin Pakai chun kajah a, “Thu hicheng hi Judah kho sung tin le Jerusalem kholai dunga gasam len, ‘Hiche kitepna thu hicheng hi ngaiyuvin lang chule hiche ho chu tongdoh cheh uvin.
Ijeh inem itileh keiman napu napateu chu Egypt gama kon a kahin puidoh a pat’a gih-e tia kanagih-a, tuni geiya kagih jing jenga, kathusei ngaiyuvin kanati jing ahi.

Ahivangin amahon kathu jong angai pouvin, anakhang jong ahindo pouve, amitakip chu ama ama lungthim gilou louchalnaa chun akiheisoh keiyuvin ahi. Hiche jeh chun keiman abon chauva chunga hiche kitepna thu hicheng hi amahon abol diuva kathupehsa chu kahinpo lut kit’in, ahivangin amahon aboldeh pouvin ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin Pakaiyin keima jah a ahinsei kit’in, ‘Judah gam mite leh Jerusalema chengte lah a kidouna aume.

Keima thusei jouse donlou dailouva anakoiya apu apateu themmona chengsea chun amaho akihei lut soh tauvin, pathen chom chom ho jenle dingin anung ajui gamtauve; Israel insung chun apu apateu toh kana semdoh keima kitepna chu asukeh tauvin ahi.
Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; ‘Neivetan, keiman ajamdoh theilou hel ding ho chunga chun thil gilou kahin lhut’e; amaho keima henga hung tao jonguleh keiman kangaipeh louhel ding ahi.

Hiche teng chuleh Judah gam khopi jouse leh Jerusalema chengte abon chauva gimnamtui alhutnam khum khum jiu pathen chom chom ho henga chu cheuva gatao diu ahin, ahinla hiche ho chun agenthei pet’uva amaho chu ahuhdoh thei lou dingu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Vo Judah, nakhopi jat jat’u chun pathen chom ho tampi nasemdoh tauve; chujongleh Jerusalem a kholai dung atam le alhom to dungjuiyin kijumsona ding mongin Baal ho henga gimnamtui nahalnam nam jiuvin ahi.
“Hijeh chun nangma hiche mite ding hin taodan lang, ahiloule amaho thalhengin jong kale mao hinbol hih-in, ajeh chu agenthei pet’uva eihin kouvu jongleh keiman kahou louding ahi.

Kadeinu chun thilse jeng abol teng chuleh keima insunga ipi thaneina anei ding ham? Nakihahselna kilhaina gantha tahsa chun nangma manthahna ding chu kheldoh thei dinga kilom hinam? Ajeh chu nagitlounaa chu nangma nakithang-at mong ding ham?

Khatvei chu Pakaiyin, ‘Olive thingna engsel, aga aphat’a phatheiya hoisel,’ natisa ahin; ahinla khopi hui kithongje jua chu aman hiche chu meikonga ahin halvam ding, abah jouse chu akahvam hel ding ahiye.

Nangma thingphung phua naphutpa thaneipen Pakaiyin nangma dounan thuse aseitai; ajeh chu Israel insung gitlou boljeh le Judah insung gitlou boljeh chun, Baal henga gimnamtui ahalnam nam jeh-uvin keima eiphin lunghang tauve,” ati.

Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin nangma tha dinga nahol le An’athoth mite chung changa hitin aseiyin hitin ati, “Pakai min chun gaodan, achutilou leh katha diu nahi,” atiuve.

Chuti ahijeh chun thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Neivetan, keiman amaho chu talen kamatsah ding, gollhang ho jong chu chemjama lou ding ahiuve; chule achapateu leh achanuteu gilkel a thigam ding ahiuvin ahi;
hijeh a chu amaho khat cha jong akida lha um louhel ding ahiuve. Ijehinem itileh keiman An’athoth mite chunga chu talen amatdiu kum kahin lhunsah a achunguva thilse kahin lhut ding ahi,” ati.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye. “Keiman gouva alo dinguva kamite Israel kapehsa keima goulo sukha a keima hengle kom migilou jouse chung chang thudola,” ati. “Neivetan, keiman amaho chu agamsung uva kona thingga loa kalo lhah a, amaho a kona chu Judah insung thingga loa kalo lhah ding ahi.
Chule keiman amaho chu kalo lhah tengleh achunguva lainatna kanei kit’a, amitakip cheh chu ama ama goulo mun le ama ama gam cheh a kahin lepui lut kit ding ahi.

Chujongle hung hiti ding ahi, amahon kamite jouse hi lung gil tena kihilna aneiyuva, keima mina kihahselje akihil them uleh, ‘Pakai hing jing ahin,’ amahon kamite jeng jong Baal henga kihahselje anahil banguva chu amaho jeng jong kamite lailung tah a insah a kisadoh ding ahiuve.
Amavang nam khattouvin ngai nahsah a aneidaa ahileh hiche chu keiman thingga loa kalo ngim hel ding kasuh set ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin keima jah a hitin aseiye, “Chen lang taigah pon tupat ponnem khat gachon lang, hiche chu natai teni chunga kiveiyin twilah noh lutpi hih helin,” ati.
Hijeh chun Pakai thusah dungjuiyin keiman taigah pon khat kachon, hiche chu katai teni chunga kakiveiyin ahi.
Chujouvin ani vei lhin nan kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung kit’in.
“Nangman natai te nia nakivei, nakichohsa taigah pon chu kilah-in lang chule kipatdoh-in Euphr’ates vadung langa chen, hichea chun pon chu songpi khi kah khat’a gasel mangtan,” eiti.
Hijeh chun keima kachen Euphr’ates vadunga chun Pakai thupeh dung juiyin kagasel mangtai.

Chujou nikho tamtah jouvin Pakaiyin keima jah a thu ahin seitan, “Kipatdoh-in lang Euphr’ates vadung langa chen, hichea kon chun keiman khukoma ‘gaseltan’ tia kathupehsa taigah pon chu galadoh tan,” ati.
Hijeh chun Euphr’ates vadung langa kachen taigah pon chu kaselna muna konin kaga khotdoh tai. Ahinla vetan, taigah pon chu anase gamhel tan, imacha apanna ding aumpoi.
Chujouvin kahenga Pakai thu ahung lhungin hitin ati,
“Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Hiche tobanga hi keiman Judah kithang atna le Jerusalem kithang atna chu kasuhset peh ding ahi.

Hiche migiloute, keima thusei ho ngaisah nom lou ho, louchal tah a amaho lungthim jenga chea pathen chom chom ho nung nung juiya hiche ho chu jenlea chibai boh dinga go ho chu hiche imacha pangthei lou taigah pon hitoh hung bang ding ahi.

Ijehinem itileh taigah pon mihem taibuh tenia akivei den jeng banga chu keiman Israel insung pumpi leh Judah insung pumpi chu keima chunga kivei den jeng dinga kasemsa ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, hita chu amaho kei dinga nam khat ana hidoh theiya, min khat ana nei thei diu, vahchoina khat anabol theiyuva chule loupina khat anahi thei ahin, ahinla amahon ana ngaideh ji pouvin ahi.

Nangman hiche thu hi amaho henga naseipeh ding, ‘Pakai Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Hai jouse chu lengpitwi thaldim soh kei ding ahi, tin aseiye nati ding ahi,” ati. Chutengleh amahon nangma jah a, ‘Hai jouse hi lengpitwi kidip soh hel ding ahi, ti hi kahet lou mong mong ham?’ hin tiuvinte.

Chuphat leh nangman amaho jah a chu, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, vetan, keiman hiche gamsunga chengte hi abon chauva David laltouna tou leng ho ahiuvin, thempuho ahiuvin, themgao ho ahiuvin, chujongleh Jerusalema cheng ho jong abon chauva khamna gutwi kahin donva sah set ding ahiuve.

Chule amaho chu khat le khat kahin tato ding, mipate leh chapate katato ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; hita chu amaho suhmang louna dinga damna le lainatna kaneipeh lou hel ding ahi,’ ati tin aseiye,” ati.
Kho ngaiyuvin lang nanakhang hindo temuvin, Kiletsah hih-uvin, aleh chu Pakaiyin thu aseitai;

Aman muthim ahin lhunsah masangin Pakai na-Pathen chu loupina peuvin. Khovah thil thel molsang chung dunga Nakeng phang te niu nachotnal musangu, Chuleh nanghon khovah navet lhih pet tah-uva Aman muthima aheilut jenga muthim lhangkhal akihehsah masangin.

Hichea chu nanghon ngai nahsah a nanei louvuva ahileh Nangho kiletsah najal a chu kalhagao guhthima kap kapji ahi; Kamit teni jong hi lhase tah-in kap kap jengin tin, Kamit lhi pul lha lha jeng ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai kelngoi hon chu Soh changin akikai mangtai.
Lengpa leh lengnu jah a chun seipeh-in lang, ‘Touna nemcha kilah lhonin, Ajeh chu nalal lukhuh lhon hoitah chu Nalu chang lhona konin ahung lhamang tai,” tin.
Negeb gam khopi jouse la akikhah soh tan, Koima cha hiche ho hongdoh ding chu aumpoi; Judah abonchan sohchangin akikai mangin, Abonchauvin sohchangin akikai mangtai.
“Khodah-in lang sahlam gamkaiya kona hung ho khu vetemin, Nakelngoi hon hoitah, nangma nakipesa chu hoiya um tam?
Nangman gol le pai dinga nakihilsa ho jong chu Nangma chunga lamkai ya apansah tenguleh ipi nasei ding ham? Numei naoso nat banga khu Nangman jong nasa nasah ji hilou ham?

Iham tia nangman nalungthim sunga ‘Ipi dia thil hicheng pi hi kachunga hung lhung ham?’ natileh, Hiche hi nangma themmona let behseh jeh ahin, Hijeh a chu naponsil achung nung jouse kilip touva Hita chu nangma Nasa veng vunga thoh gima nahiye.
Ethiopia min avouso avun akhel theiya Lutnun ajem pol ho hi akhel doh thei ham? Achuti leh thil gilou bola themsa nanghon jong Thilpha nabol thei dingu ahi.
Keiman amaho chu Neldi gama kona huiyin changsi amut mang banga kathe mang ding ahi.
Hiche hi nangma chan ahin, Keiman nangdia katedohsa nachan ding chu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Ijeh-inem itileh nangman keima neisumil tan Jou jeng jou jeng natahsan tai.
Keima mong mongin naponsil chungnung chu Namaichang geiya kaho touva, najamo kimudoh soh hel ding ahiye.

Nathilbol thet umtah tah ho chu, Mi toh najon thanhoina, nanah khon thot thotna, Chondan louhela nanoti chonna ho Thinglhang vum dunga hihen lang Loujao tina nabol ho hijongleh Kamusoh keiyin ahi. Ohe ada nahi, Vo Jerusalem! Nangma kisuh thengna dinga hi phat itih chan lut ding ham?” ati.
Twi hahsat jeh a Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei hung lhung chun,
“Judah alung hemin, Hijeh chun akelkot jouse anguiye; Amite jouse tollhanga akap kap’uvin, Hijeh chu Jerusalem ka-gin chu akitoutol’e.
Amilen amilalten asohteu chu twi holin asoluvin, Amaho chu twinah phung dunga ahunguvin ahileh Twila amujou pouvin abel keovuvin akile kit’uvin, A jah chauvin, alung dongun ponlu akikhu gamtauve.
Ajeh chu tollhang jeng jong alung thoiye, Gamsunga gotwi alhah lou phat’in; Loubol miten la jumna akimusoh tauvin, Ponlu akikhuhsoh tauvin ahi.
Jao lah a sajuh pin jong Hamhing aumlou jeh-in anou pengthah chu adalha jenge.
Gamlah sanganten jong molchai lai laiya adinguvin, Ngeite bangin hui ahop hel holuvin; Hamhing louhing umlou jeh-in Amit’u athabei gamtan ahi.
“Kathemmona jouseuvin eilansan san jeng vanguvin, O Pakai, nangma min khohsah nan nabol ding chu bol jengin; Ijeh-inem itileh keihon kasei setnao atamlheh jeng tan, Nangma dounan kachonse tauve.
O Nangma Israel kinepna, Gim genthei pet’ a Ahuhhingpa; Ipi dinga nangma gamsunga kholgam mi tobanga na uma, Kholjin le jankhat tou gehpa dinga hung kihei lou nabah ding ham?

Ipi dinga nangma akisu lung dongsa mihem nabah a, Mi thahatpa koima huhhing joulou pa nabah ding ham? Hita jongleh O Pakai, nangma keiho lah a na um jingin, Keiho hi nangma min a kikou cheh kahiuve, neidalha lou jenun,” ati.

Hiche mite chung changa hin Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Amaho hin hita vathaile ding hi adeiyuvin, Akengphang te niu aum thim sah pouvin ahi; Hijeh chun Pakaiyin amaho asang tapoi, Tua hi aman amaho themmona ahin geldoh a Achonset jouseu talen ahinpeh ding ahi,” ati.
Pakai chun keima jah a, “Hiche mite khantouna ding hin taoda tan,

amahon an ngolu hen lang hijongleh keiman atao nau ka ngaipeh lou ding, pumgo thilto le chang thilto toh-u jongleh hiche ho chu kasan peh lou ding; amaho chu chemjam leh gilkel a chule gamna hisea gam ding ahiuve,” ati.

Chuphat’in keiman, “Oh Pakai Pathen, vetan themgao hon amaho jah a chun aseiyuvin, ‘Nanghon chemjam jong nato khah lou diu, kel lhah jong nahet khah lou diu, amavang hiche munna hi keiman nangho thon lou hel a chamna kapeh diu nahi,’ tin asei bouvui,” kati.

Chuin Pakaiyin keima jah a, ‘Themgaoho chun keima mina thujou jeng agaovu ahibouve, keiman amaho chu kasolpoi, amaho thu kanapeh jong ahipon, ahenguva thu kanasei jong ahipoi. Amahon nangho henga jouva thu agaovuva, pannabei gaothu pou aseiyuva, alunggiluva lhep lhahna jeng aseiyu ahibouve.

Hichejeh chun hitin aseiyin, hiche keiman kasol louhel keima mina gaothu sei le le themgaoho, ‘Chemjam hihen kellhah na hijongle hiche gama hunglut ponte’ tia seiho chung changa hin, chemjam le kellhah-in hiche themgaoho chu athagam ding ahi.

Chule amahon gaothu aseipeh jiu miho jong chu Jerusalem kholai dunga hung kipaidoh doh diu, kel le chemjam a hung thigamuva koimacha avui diu jong hung umlou ding ahi, amaho ahin, ajinu chengseu ahin, achapateu ahin, chule achanuteu ahin. Ajeh chu keiman amaho gitlouna ma ma chu amaho chunga kabuh lhah khum ding ahiye.

“Amaho jeh a chu nangman hiche thu hi naseipeh-a, ‘Kamit teni hi sun le janin lhitwiyin long long jeng hen, Hiche ho chu kang louhelin longu hen, Ajeh chu kamite chanu nu-ngah nu chu Melse tah-in akimavon Anat’a nasan akidengin ahi.

Keima loujaova kaga potdoh-in ahileh Vetan, chemjam a kithatsa miho pi khu! Chule khopi sunga kalut’in ahileh Vetan kel lhah jeh a natna jouse pi khu! Ijeh-inem itileh themgao ahin thempu ahin Agamsunga kiveina jeng aboluvin, hetna aneipouve,’ tia Nasei ding ahi, tin aseiye,” ati.

Nangman Judah hi, lah a lah louhel dia nabol hitam? Nalhagaovin Zion hi akidah jeng hitam? Ipi dinga nangman keiho neiden jenguva Keiho dinga kiboldamna him him umlou hitam? Keihon chamna mudin kave lhi lhi jenguvin, Ahivangin thilpha la ahung lhung tapoi! Phat khattou damna ahung um vangin Vetan, tijatna jeng jeng ahibouve.
O Pakai, keihon kagitlounau kaphong uvin, Kapu kapateu gitlouna kaphong uve; Ijeh-inem itileh Keiho nang dounan kachonse tauve.
Nangma min khohsah jalin kengin neipeh mang hih-uvin lang, Nalaltouna loupi tah chu jabol louvin umsah hih-in; Keiho toh nakitepna kitepna chu Hin geldoh jingin lang sukeh loujenin.

Namtin vaipi ho pathen lhemho lah a hi Go hinjuh sah thei khatbeh alah-uva umkham? Ahilou jongleh van khun gohong ahinjuh sah theiyam? Vo Pakai, nangma keiho Pathen nahilou ham? Keiho nangma chunga kinem jing kahiuve; Ajeh chu thil jouse hi nangma bolsa ahiye.

Pakai chun keima jah a thu ahinseitan, “Mose leh Samuel chu keima angsunga ding lhon jongleh, hiche mite lama hin kalung thim kihei deh ponte. Amaho hi ka-angsunga konin soldoh loiyin, chedoh sah jengin!

Chutengleh amahon nangma henga, ‘Hoilam a kache dingu ham?’ tia nadoh tenguleh, nangin amaho jah a chu, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; “Athi dinga umho chu athi ding ahiuvin, Chule chemjam a lou ding ho jong chu chemjam a lou ding ahiuve; Kel thoh ding ho chu kel thoh ding ahiuvin, Sohchan na a ding ho chu sohchang ding ahiuve,” tin aseiye tin.

Keiman amaho chunga hi misumang jat li kalhendoh ding, ahi tin Pakaiyin aseiye, athatgam diu chemjam ahin, abot teldiu uichate ahin, anegamuva asumang diuva chunga leng vachate leh leiset’a gamsa ho ahiuve.
Judah lengpa, Hezeki’ah chapa Manas’seh-in Jerusalema athilbol jeh a chu keiman amaho hi leiset chung leng gam jouse dinga jong timul kitho thona kasemdoh ding ahiuve.
“Hijeh a nang chunga dip dam ding koi ham Vo Jerusalem! Ahilouleh koipen tah hin nalhaset pi ding ham? Naumchan nakhan kho khohsah a Nadongle humhal dinga koipen hung kihei ding ham?
Nangman keima donlouvin neikoitai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Nangma nanung toi toi jengin, Hijeh chun keiman nang dounan kakhut kahin lhangin Nangma kasu mang tai, lungnem bol bol jong kachime.
Keiman amaho hi gamsung lamkot lei dunga Chang khen kajap chil chil jengin ahi; Amaho hi keiman kadalhan, kamite chu keiman kasumang tai; Amahon la alamlhah hou adalha deh pouve.

Keiman amaho dinga meithai ho chu Twikhanglen kam a neldi sangin katamsah tan, Chule sun chang laiyin jong Gollhang ho nute ho dou ding mi sugampa chu kahin puilut’in; Achunguva hesohna le tijatna Phulou helouvin kachuhsah jin ahi.

Cha sagi jen hingnu jong chu alengvai lheh tan, Achol thi pai jengah ahitai; Hiche nu ding chun nisa jong Sunkim laiyin alhum paitai; Amanu ajah chan, hamse tah-in aumtai. Keiman amoh chengse chu Amelmahteu masanga chemjam a kalousah ding ahi, Tin Pakaiyin aseiye.” ati.

Ohe ada kahitai he no, nangman keima neina hindoh a, gamsung pumpia kinah na le kitomona bep mihema kaum doh hi! Keiman sumpa la kaphal kha pon, bat jong kaba khapoi, ahivangin amahon abon chauvin kei jeng eigaosap sap jeng tauve.
O Pakai hiti chu hijeng hen, keiman amaho phatna dinga nangma henga taona kanei da a, genthei pet leh hesoh pet’ a keiman melmahte dinga taona kaneipeh lou ahileh!
Min thih aheboh jou ding ham, sahlam gamkaiya hung kon thih le sum-eng chu?
“Nangma haona leh nathil kholsa chengse chu keiman moh a kichom doh thil keo banga, nangma chonset jal a, nagamgi sunga um chengse chu aman beihela mi kapeh jeng ding ahi.
Keiman nahet phah louhel gamsung khat’a namelmate jenlea kapansah ding nahi, ijeh-inem itileh kalung hanna konin meikong ahung kongdoh tan, hiche chu aitih chan geiya kong jing jeng ding ahi,” ati.

O Pakai, nangman thil nahenai. Neigeldoh-in lang neihung vil tan; Chule keima eibolse ho chunga hin Kei dingin phu hung la tan; Nangma thoh hatna a hin keima neilhoh mang jeng hih beh-in, Nangma jal a keiman housetna kathoh hi neihetpeh teiyin.

Nathuseiho akimudoh soh tan, Hiche ho chu keiman an neh a kaneh ahi; Nangma thusei ho chu kei ding ahin Kalung sunga kipana le thanopna ahiye; Ijeh-inem itileh kei hi nangma min a kikou kahi, O Pakai, thaneipen Pathen.

Keima golnop bol jingle ho lah a kanatou kha pon, Kipa thanop nan jong kana neideh poi; Kachunga nakhut anachuh tah jeh-in Keima kachang seh-in kanatouve; Ajeh pentah chu Nangman nalung phatmo nan neina dipset jengin ahi.

Ipi dinga kanatna pung cheh cheh a Kamaha jong dam thei louva um hita a, Dam dinga dam ding agot louhel hitam? Nangma jong mi lhem lha jeng Vadung tobang chu nahiya, Ija pang theilou twi ho chutoh nabah ding hitam?

Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Nangma nahung kihei kit’a ahileh Keiman nangma nasem phangting, Chutengleh nangma ka-angsunga nadin ding ahi. Nangman phatchomna bei hilou hel Agil tah tah naseidoh a ahileh Nangma chu keima kamsunga napan ding, Amaho joh nahenga hung kiheiyuvin tin, Nangma vang amaho henga Nakile heikit louhel ding ahi.

Chule keiman hiche mite dinga hi nangma Sum-eng tho kikai khum banga chu kasemdoh ding; Amahon nangma dounan gal hinsat’uvin tin Hijongleh amahon nangma najo lou ding ahi, Ijeh-inem itileh nangma huhhing dingle huhdoh dingin Keiman nangma kaumpi nai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Keiman nangma chu migentheite khut’a konin nahuhdoh ingting, Dip damna beite maiphahna a kona kalhatdoh ding nahi,” ati.
Pakai thusei kahenga a hung lhungin hitin ati,
“Nangman hiche mun a hi numei ji jong nakipui lou ding, chapate leh chanute jong nahin lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hiche mun a chapa kihing ho leh chanu kihing chung chang le hiche gamsunga amaho anahingdoh anuteu leh apateu chung changa hitin aseiye.

Amaho chu thihel helna thei natna thi diu ahi. Amaho chu ka jong kika lou diu, vui jong kivui loudiu ahi; abon chauva chu tolgo lah a eh than banga thang ding ahiuve. Amaho chemjam a louvuva kel a thidiu, chule athisa atahsau thilong ho chu chunga leng vachate leh leiset’a gamsa ho dinga kivahna hung pang ding ahi.

“Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Lunghemna insunga lut dan lang, aka dingin jong chedan, amaho khu lhasetpi hih helin; ajeh chu keiman hiche mitea konhin chamna le kalungset longlou chule kahepina chu kala mangtai,’ tin Pakaiym aseiye.

Milen le mineo agoma hiche gamsunga hi hung thi cheh ding ahin; hiche ho chu vui louva hung umuva, amaho chu koiman jong ahinka louhel ding, amaho vet lelna chu koimachan jong asam akivotol louhel ding ahi.

Akap amaopa dinga chu koiman jong changlhah aneh sah a athipa dinga akana jeh a chu alhamon chom lou ding ahi; koima chan jong amapa chu apa ham anu ham jeh a lung monsah na twi khon khat jeng cha jong adonsah lou ding ahiye.
Hiche ho chutoh toukhoma nekhom dinga nangma golvahna insunga jong nalut louhel ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathen chun hitin aseiye; “Neihinve tan, keiman hiche muna hi nangho mitmu tah le nangho nikho laitah a, nopsahna ogin le thanopna ogin, jinei dingpa ogin le jinei dingnu ogin kasuh tanghel ding ahi.

“Nangman thu hicheng hi hiche mite naseipeh tengleh amahon nangma jah a hinseiyuvin tin, ‘Ipi dinga Pakaiyin keiho douna hiche gitlouna nasa tah hi aphondoh hitam? Ipipen ham keiho themmona chu? Keihon Pakai i-Pathenu douna kachonsetnau ipi mong mong ham?’ tin seiyuvinte.

Hitengle chun nangman amaho jah a nasei ding, ‘Ipijeh inem itileh Pakaiyin aseiyin, napu napateuvin keima eidalhauvin, pathen chom chom nung ajuiyun, hiche ho chu ajen leuvin, chibai aboh-uvin, chuin keima eidalhauvin keima danthu chu anit tapouve.’
Chule nanghon napu napateu sangin gilou cheh-in naboltauve; ajeh chu veuvin nangho khat cheh hin ama ama lunggul louchalna cheh chu ajui cheh-in, keima thu ngai ding la adon pouve.

Hijeh a chu keiman nangho hi hiche gamsunga kona nangho nahiuva napu napateu ahiuva ahetkhah louhelu gamsung khat’a kadel lut’uva, hikoma chu nanghon sun le jan a pathen chom chom najenle diu ahiye, ajeh chu keiman nangho kahepi louhel ding nahitauve,’ tin aseiye.
“Hiche jeh chun vetan, ‘Pakaiyin Isreal mite Egypt gama kon a ahin puidoh banga chu,’ tia kisei louhel nading nikho ho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseiye;

amavang, ‘Pakai hing jing ahin, aman Isreal mite sah lam gamkai le amaho anadel mangna gamkai jousea ahin puidoh bangin,’ tia akiseina ding joh chu ahung lhunge. Ijeh-inem itileh keiman amaho chu apu apateu kana pehsau amaho gamsung ma maa chu kahin nung puilut kit ding ahiuve,’ ati.

“Neihin vetan, ‘Keiman ngaman mi tamtah kasolin amahon miho chu ahinmat dingu ahi,’ tin Pakaiyin aseiye; chule amaho ban a chu keiman sadel mi tamtah kasol ding, amaho chun miho chu mol tin lhang tin a sadel a agadel diu, songpi khikah dunga kona aga hoidoh dingu ahi.
Ajeh chu alampi jouseu kamit te nin ave lhi jingin, keima dingin akiselpoi, athemmonau jong chu keima mitmun akisel pon ahi.

Hijeh a chu amasa keiman athemmonau leh achonsetnau lethuhna ajat nia kakalsah ding ahi; ajeh chu amahon keima gamsung hi kidah umjeng pathen lim asem chun asuboh tauvin, keima goulo chu athil bolu thet umtah tah ho chun adimset jeng tauve,” ati.

O Pakai, katha hatna leh kakulpi, Genthei nikhoa dinga kakiselna, Nangma henga chun namtin vaipi jouse hunguvin tin, Leiset kolkimvela kona miten ahinsei dingu, “Ipu ipateuvin ahomkeo le joukeo jeng analo’uvin, Phatchomna beihel pannabei thil ho jeng anahi.
Mihem chun ama dingseh seh-in pathen chom chom kisem theiyin tem? Hitobang ho chu pathen ahipouve!” ati.

“Hiche jeh chun neihin vetan, keiman amaho chu kahin hetsah ding, keiman katha neina le kathahatna hi amaho khatvei kahetsah pou pouva ahileh, chutengleh amahon keima min hi Pakai ahi, ti ahet dingu ahiye,” ati.
“Judah chonset hi thih kolom a kijih ah ahitan, chule song mantam muh hem a chu amaho lung laigil le amaho maichamho selki te nia chu kijih lut’a ahitai,
achateuvin thingna eng phung tin le lhangsang lai jouse amaho maicham leh amaho Ashe’rim chu ageldoh jinguva,

gam ong laiya molsang lai jousea ageldoh jing jeng vanguvin. Keiman nagamgi sung pumpia nahaona jouse leh nathil khol jouse aboncha nachonset man dinga mohseh a kichomdoh thilkeo banga kapehdoh ding ahitai.

Nangma kapehsa nagouloa kon chun nakhut lhakang jep jep’in natin, chutengleh keiman nahetphah louhel gamsung khat’a namelmate jenlea kapansah ding nahi; ijeh-inem itileh kalunghanna konin meikong ahung kong doh tan, atonsot geiya kongjing ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, “Mihema kisong mihem, Tahsa a abanjang kisemdoh pa, Pakaiya kon a alungthim kiheimangpa chu gaosap chang hen.
Hichepa chu neldi lah a phaiphung keh tobang ahin, Thilpha hung sohdoh amuphah louhel ding ahiye. Ama chu gamthip laiya leigo savel vullah a cheng a, Chenna theilou chilei lah a cheng ding ahi.
“Pakaiya kingaiying pasal thahat, Akingaina Pakai hijing jengpa chu anunnom ahi.

Ama chu luipanga thing kiphut tobang, Vadung lah a ajung tampi khodoh a, Hijeh a chu nisan ahin phah teng jongleh olmo louva umah ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh athingna jouse jong dum jing jeng ahin, Hijeh chun agamna ding kum ahung lhung ding jong akhohsah poi. Ajeh chu aga jing jeng theiye,” ati.
Thil jouse lah a lungthim kiti hi joulhepna dimset ahin, Hijeh a chu haset set’a sea ahitan, Hiche hekhen thei ding chu Koipen tah hiding ham?
“Pakai kitipa keiman lunggil kakholtoh jin Lungthim kapatep jin ahi; Hita chu mitin ama ama lamlhahna ho dung juiya Chule ama ama natoh dungjui cheh a thil kapeh theina dingin,” ati.
Twi vatot’in ama tui hilou vatui aop khom banga, Adih louva haona kiboldohpa jong chutobang chu ahi; Ama damlai tah-in ahaohon dalhauvin tin, Chule achaina a chu ama jeng jong mi ngol hiding ahi.
Akipat tila pat’a chung sanga laltouna kido chu Keiho dinga muntheng lai chu ahiye.

O Pakai, Israel kinepna, Nangma nadalha jouse chu kijumso cheh ding ahiuvin, Nangma henga kon a kihei mang chengse chu Leiset’a kijih lut soh hel ding ahiuve; Ijeh-inem itileh amahon Pakai chu adalha tauve, Hingjing twinah chu.
O Pakai, neidamsah tan, chutileh keima dam tange; Neihuhhingin, chutileh keima huhhinga kaum ding ahi, Ijeh-inem itileh nang jengbou Keiman kavahchoi ding chu nahiye.
Vetan, amahon keima jah a, “Pakai thusei chu hoiba ham? Hung guilhung hen!” atiuve.
Agilou nahinsol din keiman kanokhum jeng pon. Thoh hahsa hung lhun ding jong kadeipoi, nangman nahenai; Keima kamsung sohsa thu cheng chu Keima maichanga ana kilang jingnai.
Keima dingin nangma tijat nan umhih-in, Ajeh chu nikho phalou nia nangma kakiselna nahi.

Keima bolsea pang ho chu jachatna gei cheh uhen, Keima vang nei jumso lou jenin; Amaho chu lungthoi cheh-u hen lang Keima vang neilung thoisah hih helin; Amaho chunga hin agilou nikho hin lhunsah-in lang, Manthahna jat ni geiyin sumang jengin!
Pakaiyin kajah a hi tin thu aseitai, “Nangma chen lang Benjamin kelkot phunga gading tan, Judah lengte jousen lut le nale pot le na aneiyu kelkot, chule Jerusalem kelkot jousea chun;
chule ajah-uva gaseitan, ‘Hiche kelkot dunga lut ji ho, Jerusalema chengte jouse leh Judah mite jouse chule Judah lengte hon Pakai thusei hi ngai temuvin.
Pakai-yin hitin aseiye, “Nahinkho dinguvin chingtheiyun kiging phauvin, cholngah nikhon pohgih poh dauvin lang, hiche pohgih chu Jerusalem kelkot dunga jong hinpolut hih-uvin.
Na-in dunguva konin jong cholngah nikhon pohgih pohdoh dauvin lang, natoh khat cha jong toh dauvin, amavang keiman napu napateu kathutepsa tobang chun cholngah nikho chu thengtah-in nit jinguvin.
Ahinla amahon ngai nahsah-in anei pouvin, anakhangu jeng cha jong ahindo pouve, angong apukon leuvin, hiti chun imacha ajah louna dingu leh hilchahna chan asan theilouna ding uvin aumtauve.

“Ahin Pakaiyin aseiyin, ‘Nangman vang keima thusei nangai mong monga, cholngah nikhoa chu hiche khopi kelkot dunga hi pohgih ima nahin pohlut da, cholngah nikho chu athenga nanit’a hiche ni chuleh natoh imacha natoh louva ahileh,

hiche khopi kelkot dunga hi David laltouna tousa, sakol ho chungle kangtalai ho chunga tousa lengho chu hung lut’uvin tin, amaho chu aleng chapateu toh, Judah mite toh chule Jerusalema chengte toh hung kilhon lut ding ahiuve; chutengle hiche khopi hi atonsot geiya kichenpha jing jeng ding ahitai.

Chule Judah gam khopi jousea konle Jerusalem kim vela konin, Benjamin gamsunga konle Shephe’lah gama kon, thing lhang gama kon, Negeb gama konin mitin hung kikhomuvin tin, pumgo thilto tamtah leh kilhaina gan’tha tamtah, chang thilto tamtah toh bego thilto hin pouvin tin, hita chu Pakai insunga dingin thangvahna thilto tampi hinpouvinte.

Amavang nanghon cholngah nikho theng tah a nit ding kati chu nangai dauva, cholngah nikhoa Jerusalem kelkot sung dunga pohgih pohlut lou ding kiti chu ngai nahsah a nanei louvuva ahileh, keiman kelkot dunga chu mei kahal ding hichun Jerusalem leng inpi dung jouse akah a kiphelmit jou lou ding ahiye,” ati.
Pakaiya hung kon Jeremiah henga hung lhung thu kisei chun hi tin ati;
“Kipatdoh-in lang bel dengpa ina khun chesuh temin, hikoma khu keiman keima thuseiho chu kajah sah ding nahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun keima bel dengpa ina kache-suh-in ahileh hichea chun aman bel denna kang kipei chun bel ana dengin ahi.
Chuin beldengpa’n belleiya aden chu akhut’a aseden tan ahileh, hijeh chun belchom beh khat’in aheidohtai; hiche chu adengpa din chuta bol chu apha danin aume.
Hichun kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati,
“Vo Israel insung, hiche beldengpan abol banga hi keiman kabolmo nahiuvam?” tin Pakaiyin aseiye. “Vo Israel insung, vetan beldengpa khut’a bellei aum bang banga khu nangho keima khut’a um nahiuve.
Phat khattouva keiman nam khat ham ahiloule lenggam khat chung chang thu ham a kabodoh a kasuh keh ding chule kasuh mang ding ahi katia,
hiche nam mite, suhmang dinga kaseite chu athil gilou bolnauva kana ahung kilehei kit’uva ahileh keiman boldinga kalhuhsah sa thil gilouva kona chu lung kakhel kit ding ahi.
Chule phat khattou ma chu nam khat ham ahiloule lenggam khat ham chu kasemdoh a kaphudet ding ahi tia kaphondoh khah sa ahitah a,
ahivanga chu hiche chun keima mit mua thil gilou abola, kathusei ngaisah a anei hih a ahileh, hichea chu keiman thilpha bolpeh dinga kagotsa hoa kona chu kalung kakhel kit jeng ding ahi.

Hichejeh chun tun Judah mite leh Jerusalema chengte jah a seiyin lang hitin tin, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, vetan, keiman nangho dounan thil gilou kagongin, chule nangho dounan thilgon khat kaneiye. Mi takip alam gilouva konin kiheikit cheh hen lang, nalam lhah jouseu leh nathilbol jouseu semphasoh keiyuvin,’ ati.
“Ahinla amahon aseiyuvin, ‘Hiche chu pannabei ahibouve! Keihon keiho thilgon mong mong kajui diu ahi, mi ama ama cheh-in ama lunggel thil gilou dungjuiya na atoh cheh ding ahi,’ atiuvin ahi.
“Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin thu aseiye, Namtin vaipi gadong leuvin, Koipen ham hitobang thu jakha a Nu-ngah tobang Israel chun timul kithona hel thil khat aboltai.
Lebanon jaolhanga buhbang chu Songpi khikah dunga kidalha den ji nam? Molsanga kona hung long twiho, vadung hoa dapjen jen a long ho chu Longkang kha mong hinam?

Ahinla kamiten keima eisumil tauvin, Pathen chom chom henga gimnamtui ahalnam tauve; Amaho lampi luisa analam lhahna ngaiyuva chun Akipal lhusoh keiyuvin ahi; Chule lhang lamlena che louvin Lamsih a keng lampi jenga achetauve.
Agamsungu kidah dah umjengin aboluvin, Aitih chana phiset khum khum jeng dingin aboltauve. Ajotpa jouse akinlih leu leu jengin Hijeh chun alu athing thing jenge.
Keiman amaho chu melmate masanga Nisolam khohuiyin athe cheh banga kathe cheh ding ahi. Amaho ahamset nikhouva jong Kanung bou kangat ding kamai kangat louhel ding ahiuve,” ati.

Hichun amahon aseiyuvin, “Hunguvin, eihon Jeremiah dounan thil gongu hite, ajeh chu thempua konin la danthu mangthah pontin, miching koma la hilchahna bei louhel ding, chule themgaova kona la thu kisei tantih umlou ding ahi. Hunguvin, lei kilehpelin houseu hitin, athuseiho khat’a khat cha jong ngaisah-in neipeh da helu hite,” atiuve.
O Pakai, keima neikhohsah-in lang, Chule kakiphinna ogin hi neingaipeh teiyin.

Thilpha chu thilsea kilethuh ding mong ham? Amahon kathina dingin khuh alaitauve. Itobang loma keima Nangma angsunga kandin a Amaho phatna ding kaseiya, Achunga nalunghan louhelna ding kanasei hitam Hin geldoh tei teiyin.

Hijeh chun achate jouseu kel thoh sah-in lang, Abonchauvin chemjam hema lousah tan, Chutengleh ajinuu abonchan Cha neilouvin meithaiyin umsoh keiyu hen. Apasal jouseu gamna hisen thigam jengu hen lang. Akhangdong lai jouseu jong galmuna chemjamin satgam hel hen.

Hetman louva nangman amaho chunga Mi gucha nahin lhut khum teng chuleh A-in jouseuva ka-gin kija soh tei tei hen! Ajeh chu amahon keima matna dingin Khuh khat alaiyuvin Kakeng kipalna ding thang akam le leuve.

Hijeng jongleh Vo Pakai, Keima thana dinga amaho thilgon jouse hi nangman nahei. Nangma mitmun achonsetnau jong paidoh hih helin lang, A themmona u jong ngaidam hih hel in. Na-angsunga amaho hi abungbun kitunsah jengin lang, Nalunghan tengle amaho hi bolgim jengin.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Chen lang hai kamjum khat galan, mipi lah a upa ho phabep le themgao ho lah a apang lui dom dom phabep puiyin lang,
Hinnom chapa phaicham, bel kidenna kelkot’a lutna a chun gapotdoh in lang hikoma chun keiman kaseipeh hicheng thu hi gaphongjal tan.

Nangman naseiya, ‘Vo Judah gam lengte leh Jerusalema chengten Pakai thusei hi ngaiyuvin. Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Neivetan, keiman hiche muna hin thil gilou khat kahin polut’in hiche japha nakhang jouse chu timul kithou thou jeng ding ahi.

Ipi-jeh-inem itileh mipi hin keima eidalhauvin, amaho ahin, apu apateu ahin, Judah lengte ahiuva ahet khah louvu pathen chom chom henga gimnamtui ahalnam uvin, hiche mun hi asuboh tauve; chujongle hiche mun hi themmona bei thisan adimsohtan ahi;
keiman kathupeh khah lou hel kalunga jong hung um kha louhel, Baal henga pumgo thiltoa meikonga achapateu govamna dingin Baal dingin maicham munsang tampi asemdoh tauve;
hijeh chun vetan, hiche mun hi To’pheth ahiloule Hinnom chapa phaicham kiti louva kithana phaicham tia akiseina ding nikho ho pi chu ahung lhunge.

Chutengle hiche muna hi keiman Judah leh Jerusalem thilgon jouse panna neilouva kalha ding, chule amiteu jong amelmateu masanga chemjama kaban lhuhsah soh a, amaho tha dinga holte ho khut’a kathisah gam ding nahiuve. Atahsau thilong ho chu chunga leng vachate leh leiset’a gamsate vahna kanei ding ahiye.
Hiche khopi hi kidah dah uma kasemdoh a, phiset khum khum dinga kabol ding, athoh gentheina ho jala chu koi hileh ajotpa chan chu tijalih leuva phisa sa jeng ding ahi.

Chule keiman amaho chu achapateu leh achanuteu tahsa kaneh sah a, min ahindel khumuva gentheina, amelmateu leh amaho tha dinga holten abol genthei nau agimnauva chu amitakip’in aheng akom tahsa chu aneh cheh diu ahi,’ ati.
“Chutah leh nangman nalhonpi miho mitmu changah a hai muhjum chu navoh keh a,

chule amaho jah a chu naseiya, ‘Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiyin, min beldengpa bel avohkeh banga keiman hiche mite leh hiche khopi hi kavohjal ding ahin; hijeh a chu hiche chu kisempha thei kit louhel ding ahi. To’pheth mun jenga jong min thi ahinvui ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh thivuina ding mun dang hung beihel ding ahitai.
Hiti chun Pakaiyin aseiyin, hita chu hiche mun le hichea chengte chu kabol ding, hiche khopi hi To’pheth tobang kahisah ding ahi.

Jerusalem in jouse leh Judah lengte jouse, inchunga van loupina ho kihouna gimnamtui kihalnam na le pathen chom chom ho henga dontheiya kilhaina thilto kisun lhahna in jouse chu To’pheth mun banga chu kisuboh cheh ding ahiuve,’ tin aseiye.” ati.
Chujouvin Jeremiah chu Pakaiyin agao dinga anasolna mun To’pheth a kon chun ahungin, Pakai inpi lhongnal sunga adingin, chule mitin jah a thu aseitai;

’Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye,’ Neivetan, keima hiche khopi le akho neo dung jousea adouna kana phondohsa thil gilou chengse kahin lhut’ e, ipijeh-inem itileh amahon angongu avaiput leuvin keima thusei jouse ngaisah in aneipouve,” ati.
Immer chapa thempu Pashhur, Pakai insunga vaibol pipu pen chun Jeremiah chun hiche gaothu hi aseiye, ti thu ajatai.
Hijeh chun Pashhur in jong Jeremiah themgaopa chu adengin Pakai insunga Benjamin kelkot’a mihenna insung dunga chun ahentai.

Ajing jingkah a Pashhur in Jeremiah chu mihenna insung dunga kona alhadoh phat’in, Jeremiah-in jong amapa jah a, “Pakaiyin nangma min hi Pashhur ati ahipoi, jetle veiya tijatna dimsetpa nati ahibouve.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, vetan, keiman nanghi nangma mong mong dinga jong nagol napai jouse dinga jong tijatna dimsetpa kahisah ding nahi. Nangman navet vet pettah a amaho chu chemjama lousoh ding ahiuve. Chujongleh keiman Judah mite abon chauva Babylon lengpa khut’a kapeh doh ding, aman amaho chu Babylon gama sohchang dinga akaimang ding, chule chemjama jong athagam diu ahi.

Hiche kalvala jong chu akhopi sunga haona chengse leh athil veikan jouseu ahin, athilman hahtah tah ho ahin, Judah lengte thil kikhol chengse ahin, aboncha chu melmate khut’a kapeh doh a, amahon abon chauva ahinchom ngim heluva chule amatsoh diu, Babylon gam langa akaimang diu ahi.

Hiche teng chuleh Pashhur nangma nahin, na-insunga cheng miho ahiuvin, sohchanga nache cheh diu ahitai, Babylon gama nachea, hikoma chu nathi den ding ahi, nangma nahin, najou jouva gaothu naseina ji nagol napai jouse toh nakivuitha ding ahitai,” ati.

O Pakai, nangman neina joulhep chun, Hijeh chun keima joulhep’in ka umtai; Nangma kei sangin nahatjon, Hijeh chun nangman neijoutai. Keima nilhum lhuma mi nuijat jatnan ka umdoh tan, Amitakip’in eitot thang thang tauve.

Ijeh-inem itileh keiman thu kasei chanin kapeng jah jin, “Pumhatna jeng manthahna jeng ahitai!” tin Lhang kasam sam jin ahiye. Ajeh chu keima dingin Pakai thusei jengjong hi Nilhum hel helin Kiphona bep leh kidai chatvaina bep ahitai.

Keiman, “Ama chu phah jong phah poh dang ting, Ama minin jong thu seida tang,” katijongleh, Kalungthim sunga meikong kihal bangin asa hen hun jengin, Kagu kachang jouse sunga jong akikhah chah gamtan, Katuh tuhnan katha achol lheh jengtan, Jou jong kajou tapoi.

ijeh-inem itileh keiman khoisat gin tamtah kajan, Jetle veiya tijatna jeng jeng aume; “Hehseuvin amapa chu, hehseuhite amapa chu!” akitin, Keima kipal lhuh ding ngah jing jeng Keima kihetpi tah tah Kagol le kapaiten aseiyuve. “Ijem itileh ama kilhem lhantin, Chutengle eihon ama isot lhahjou diu, Chuta chu ama chunga Phu ikilah jou diu ahi,” atiuve.

Ahinla gal hangtah bangin Pakaiyin keima eiumpi jingin, Hijeh a chu eibolse ho chu kipal lhu cheh ding ahiuve; Amahon eison lha jou deh pouvintin, Nasatah a kijumso ding ahiuve; Ajeh chu adei banga amolso joulou diu ahin, Atonsot geiya jamo tah a akibolna dingu chu kisumil louhel ding ahi.
O thaneipen Pakai, midih jeng jong jong patep’a, Mi lungthim le mi lunggil jong musoh pa, Hiche ho chunga nangma phulah na neimusah tan, Ajeh chu nangma koma kakhan kho ding kahin lhut ahitai.
Pakaiya la sauvin lang, Pakai chu vahchoiyuvin! Ijeh-inem itileh aman thil gilou bolte khut’a konin Nelou chaloute hinkho ahuhdoh peh tai.
Keima-penna nikho chu gao-sap’in umhen, Kanun keima eihin nikho chu phat-theiboh chang hih hel hen!
Kapa henga “Nang dingin chapa khat apengtai,” tia Thu hung lhutpa, ama hapa ana kipasah pa chu gaosap chang hen.
Hiche mipa chu Pakaiyin dip dam louhela alekhup jeng Khopi ho to hin bang jeng hen; Hichepa chun jingkah teng ka-na ogin ja hen lang Sun tengleh kholhang kisam jahen;
Naobu sunga keima eina that den loupa chu, Chutileh kanu chu keima lhankhuh hiya Ama dinga anaobu jeng jong Aitih chan geiya sal jing jeng tading.
Ipi dinga keima hi naobua kona hung potdoh kahim, Tohgim le gentheina kimu ding bep, Jachat thoh gunset’a Hing ding bep ma?
Zedeki’ah lengpan Malehi’ah chapa Pashhur leh Ma-asei’ah chapa, thempupa Zephani’ah ahenga asolpet’a Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei hung lhung chu hiche hi ahin, hitin ati;

“Keiho dingin Pakai neidoh peh bouvun, ajeh chu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar chun keiho dounan gal ahinbole; ijem itileh Pakai chun athilbol kidang tah tah dungjuiyin keiho ding jong bol jengin tin, Babylon lengpa khu ka koma kona akinung tol sah jeng jong bailam ahi,” atiuve.
Hichun Jeremiah-in jong amaho jah a,

“Zedeki’ah jah a chu nanghon hita nagasei dingu ahi, ‘Pakai Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye, neihin vetan, keiman nakulpi kimveluva na-umkhom uvah Babylon lengpa leh Chalde’a mite nadounauva nahoh dalnau nakhut’uva um gal man-chah ho chu kanung lam sena kanei ding, chule amaho chu abon chauva hiche khopi lai lung tah a hi kahin puikhom sohkei ding ahiuve.
Keima tah mong mongin nangho douna khut kahin lhandoh a, ban thahat tah a lunghang tah le lung phamo tah, chule lungsatna tah a gal kahinbol jeng ding ahi.
Chutengle hiche khopi sunga cheng jouse mihem hihen gancha hileh kasuh gam ding, amaho chu gamna hise nasatah a thigam ding ahiuve.

Khonung tengleh hiti ding ahi tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, keiman Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah le asohte chengse, chule hiche khopi sunga mite, gama hise le chemjama chule kela hingdoh chengse chu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar khut le amelmateu khut’a chule amaho tha dinga hol le ho khut’a kapeh doh ding ahi. Aman amaho chu chemjam hema asat ding, amaho dip jong adip dampi louhel ding, hinghoi louva lainatna jong aneipeh louhel ding ahi,’ ati.
“Chule hiche mite jah a hi nangman nasei ding, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, neihin vetan, keiman nangho masanga hinna lampi le thina lampi kakoi cheh-e.

Koi hileh hiche khopi sunga umdena chu chemjam le kel chule gamna hisea thi tei tei ding ahi; amavang koi hileh potdoh a Chalde’a mite, nangho hin umkhum ho henga galut jengpa chu hingdoh intin, ahinkho jong chu gallaiya kichomdoh thilkeo banga anei ding ahiye.

Ipijeh inem itileh thilse bolpehna ding joh a keiman hiche khopi hi kamai kahin ngat ahitai, thilpha ding ahipoi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; hiche hi Babylon lengpa khut’a kipedoh ding, aman meiya ahalvam ding ahi.’ ati.
“Judah lengpa insung jah chun, ‘Pakai thusei ngaiyuvin, tin;

Vo David insung! Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; “Jingkah tengleh thu adih-in tanuvin, Anei kiguh mang peh pa chu Abol gentheipa khut’a konin huhdoh uvin, Achutiloule kalunghanna meikong bangin Hung kitoldoh jengin tin. Ma neiya hung kavam jeng ding, Koima cha aphelmit jou um louhel ding ahi. Amaho thil hilou bol jeh a chu,’ ati tin aseiye,” tin.

“Neihin vetan, Vo phaichama cheng. Vo phaicham laiya songpi, Keiman nangma kadouve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; “Eiho henga koipen hung kumsuh ding ham? Eiho chenna a koipentah hung lut ding ham?” Tia seiyah nangho.
Natohgau dungjuiya keiman nangho Talen kapeh ding nahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Keiman agammang lah a chu mei kahal ding, Hichun avel dunga um jouse jong akahvam ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye. “Judah lengpa ina che suh-in lang chukoma chun hiche thu hi gaseiyin.
hiti chun gaseiyin lang, ‘Pakai thusei ngaiyin, Vo Judah lengpa, David laltouna toupa, nang nahin, nasohte ahiuvin, chule namite ahiuvin hiche kelkot dunga vah lut jouse.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; Thu adih tah-in tanuvin lang thildih boluvin, anei athil kichom ngim pehpa chu achom gampa khut’a kon chun huhdoh-uvin, chule kholjin mi le palou te meithaite chunga thil dih loule pumhat thil boldauvin lang, hiche muna hin themmona bei mite thisan so dauvin.

Ipijeh-inem itileh nanghon hiche thu hi na-ngai tahbeh uva ahileh hiche in kelkot dunga hi lengho, David laltouna tousa ho, kangtalai ho chunga tousa ho, sakolte chunga tousaho chu amaho ahiuvin, asohteu ahin, chule amiteu ahin, hung vah lut ding ahiuve.
Amavang nanghon hiche thu kiseiho hi na-nahsah lou uva ahileh, keimatah kakihahsel ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, hiche in hi akeo hela hung um ding ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh Judah lengpa in chung chang thudola hin Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; “Kei dingin nangma hi Gilead tobang nahin, Lebanon molvum bep bou nahiye; Ahivangin keiman neldi gam kahisah ding nahi, Chenna louhel khopi ho toh kabah ding nahi.

Keiman nangma dou dinga mi sumang ho kagontoh ding, Amichan cheh a amanchah cheh ahin kichoi diu ahi; Chutengle amaho chun na cedar thing deitah tah ho phuh lhuvin tin, Abonchauva chu meilhum sunga alelut, dingu ahi.
“Hiche khopi hi namtin vaipin hinjot pauvin tin, amitakip’in aheng akom jah a, ‘Ipi bola Pakaiyin hiche khopi lentah hi hita abol hitam?’ ati diu.
Chutengleh amahon, ‘Pakai a-Pathenu kitepna asuhmiluva, pathen chom chom chibai abohuva ajenle jeh uva khuti ahi.’ tia asei dingu ahi, tin aseiye,” ati.
Mithipa chu ka hih-uvin, Lung jong lung hempi dauvin; Amavang avah mangpa ding chun Lhase tah-in kap’uvin. Ijeh-inem itileh amapa chu Apenna gam mukit dinga hung kile kit louhel ding ahitai.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Judah lengpa, Josi’ah chapa, apa Josi’ah khela lengvai popa, hiche muna kona anache mangpa Shallum chung chang thudola chun hitin aseiye; “Ama chu hikoma hin hung kile kit taponte,
amahon sohchang dinga akaimang nau munna chu hung thiden ding ahitan, hiche gam hi amukit louhel ding ahitai,” ati.
Ohe ada ahi, adih louva ain kisahdoh pa, Thudih louhela aindan chungnung ho kisahdoh pa chu; Aheng akompa moh seh seh a ama kin, jeng bolsah pa, Atohman pelouhel a ana umpa chu;
’Keiman kei ding mong mongin In lentah khat kisah ing ting, Indan chungnung lentah kabol ding ahi,’ tia seipa. Bangkot tampi kihondoh a Cedar thinga kiphu lut pa, Lousan a kiloisan pa chu.

Cedar thinga mi natet jou jeh a chu Nangma leng vaipo dinga nakigel ham? Napa chun an aneh a twi adona Thu adih a atanjia, thil adih jeng abolji hilou ham? Hichea chu ama dinga Anapha thei lheh jeng ahiye.

Aman mivaichate leh nelou chalou te khoh sah nan Thu anatan jing jin ahileh, Hiche chu ama dingin anapha lheh jeng jin ahi; Keima hetdoh a ka-um ding kiti chu Hiche hi hilou ham?” Tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Ahinla nangman mit teni le lungthim nanei hi Alam louva phat chomna ding bep le Themmona bei ho thisan sosahna ding, Chule bol gentheina dingle Pumhatna thil bolna ding bep ahi,” Tin aseiye.

Hiche jeh chun Pakaiyin Judah lengpa, Josi’ah chapa, Jehoi’akim chung chang thudola hitin aseiye; “Amahon hiche pa chu ahin kauva, ‘O kadeh kasopipa, ahiloule O kadeh kasopinu,’ Tia asei louhel dingu ahi; Amahon ama chu akauva, O kadeh lalpa, ahiloule ‘O kadeh ama lal loupina chu!’ atilou diu ahi.
Sangan khat kivui banga ama chu hung kivui doh ding, Jerusalem kelkot ho kalpeh a kikai manga kipaidoh ding ahi,” ati.
“Lebanon a kaltouvin lang ga lhang samin, Chujongle Bashan a na-ogin gaki thonsah temin; Ab’arima konin gakap temin, Ajeh chu nagol ngai jouse akisu mang soh tai.
Nangma khantouna dingin keiman thu kaseiyin, Nangin la ‘Na ngaipeh ponge,’ natin. Naneo laiya pat’a hiche hi nalam lhah na ahi jinge. Hita chu keima thusei na-ngailou peh peh ahitai.
Khopi huiyin na-kelngoi jouse hinsem lih intin, Nagoldei jouse jong sohchanga che ding ahiuve; Chutengleh nangma najah chan tin nakisuh lung dong ding ahi, Nagitlouna chengse pi jala hi.
Vo Lebanon a chengte, Cedar thing lah a busa pa; Natnan nahin lhun khuma numei naoso nat’a na nat tengleh Iti nathoh ding hitam!” ati.
“Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; Judah lengpa, Jehoi’akim chapa, Coni’ah chu kakhut jetlama kakhutjem ahivangin, keiman nangma kasut lhah a,
nangma tha dinga nahol le ho khut, nangman nagin gin ho khut, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar khut, chule Chalde’a mite khut’a kapeh doh ding nahi.
Keiman nangma leh nahingnu nanu chu gamchom beh khat’a kalhoh lut jeng ding, hiche napenna gam hilouhel laiya chu naga thi ding ahi.
Hita chu amahon kilekit na dinga angai chat geovu gamsunga chu hung kilekit louhel ding ahiuve,” ati.

Hiche Coni’ah kiti mipa hi Donlou dailouva kikoi, Bel kehsa, koima chan akhohsah louhel Bel chu hiya hitam? Ipi dinga ama le achate jouse Kilhoh mang heluva, Amahon ahet khah louhel gamsunga Kisep mang heluva hitam?
Vo gamle go, leiset’in Pakai thusei ngai temin!

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Hiche mipa hi cha neilou, Ahinkho sunga lolhing lou ding mihem, Tin lang sun tauvin; Ijeh-inem itileh ama son le achilhah Khat chabeh jong David laltouna tou dinga Judah gam sunga hung vaihom kit dinga Hung lolhing jou lou ding ahi,” ati.
“Ohe ada ahiuve, kaham hing a keima kelngoite sumanga thatmanga kelngoi ching ho chu!” tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Hichejeh chun Pakai Israel Pathenin kamite khohsah a kelngoi china ching miho chung chang thu dola chun hitin aseiye, “Nanghon kakelngoi hon nathe cheh-uvin, abon chauvin nadelmang tauve, chule nanghon hiche ho nagavil pouve. Neihin vetan, keiman nathilse bol jeh-uva nangho kahung vil ding nahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chutengleh keima kelngoi hon ahing doh amoh chengse chu amaho kadel mangna gamsung jousea kona kahin hoi khoma, abon chauva ahong sunguva kahin lepuilut kit ding ahiuve.
Keiman amaho khohsah a kelngoi china ching ding chu achunguva mi kakoipeh ding, amaho kicha kitlou diu, lung jong lung thoi louva, khat cha jong mangthah umlou ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Pakaiyin aseiyin, vetan, keiman David dinga a bah dihtah khat kahin tundoh na ding nikho ho chu ahung lhunge, ama chun lengpa bangin lengvai hinpon tin, chingthei tah a thil abol ding, gamsunga thu adih dih a abol ding ahi.
Ama hinkho sunga chu Judah kihuhhing ding, Israel lung mong tah a cheng ding ahi. Chule ama ahung kikouna ding min chu, ‘Pakai chu eiho them channa ahi’ kitinte.
“Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin aseiyin, vetan, mihemten hita asei kit louhelna ding nikho ho ahung lhunge, ‘Egypt gama kona Israel mite hinpui doh pa Pakai chu hing jing ahin,’ tijo talouva,

’Israel insung chilhah ho aman ana delmang na gam, sahlam gamkai le gamtin gamtanga kona hinpui khompa Pakai ahin jing jeh-in,’ tia kiseijo ding ahi. Chuphat le amaho chu agamsung uva cheng ding ahiuve,” ati.

Themgaoho chung changa Kasunga kalungthim akisuna behseh jengin, Kagu kachang jouse akilongsoh tai; Keima jukhama mihem tobang kahitan, Jun atul khamset mihem tobang kahitai; Pakai ama jeh tah leh athusei theng ho jeh-in.

Ijeh-inem itileh agam jong hi mi jong jeng adimset’in ahi; Gaosapna jalin agamsung jong hi alunghem tan, Gammang noiya hamhing jouse la ago lhasoh paitai; Alam lhah danu jong aphalou jeng ahin. Hijeh chun athahat nau jong Adih lou jeng ahibouve.
“Themgao le thempujong kibang bep’in Pathen hephalou cheh ahin, Keima insung jenga jong gitlouna jeng kamudoh-e, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Hichejeh a chu alampiu amaho dinga Muthim noiya lam nal heo bang ding; Hichea chu amaho kinolut’uva Kiba lhu sihseh ding ahiuve: Ijeh-inem itileh amaho talen kipeh kum chuleh Keiman achunguva agilou kahin lhut khum ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Samar’ia themgao ho lah a chun Keiman thil atam pet put khat kanamui: Amaho Baal jenga agaovuvin, Hijeh chun kamite Israel apui mang tauve.

Chuma leh Jerusalem themgao ho lah a Kidah umtah khat thil kamudoh tai: Amahon mitoh jon aboluvin Ajou jouvun achon tauve; Thil gilou bolte bantha ahatsah-uvin, Hijeh chun koimacha jong gitlouna konin ahung kile kit poi; Chule asunga cheng ho jong Gomor’rah tobang ahiuve.” ati.

Hijeh chun thaneipen Pakaiyin Hiche themgao ho chung changa chun hi tin aseiye; “Neihin vetan, keiman amaho chu gamsaiya kavah ding, Chule thina gutwi kilhahsa twi kadonsah dingu ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh Jerusalem themgao hoa konin Gamsung pumpia Pathen hetphah louna avah chansoh tai,” ati.

Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: “Nahenguva gaothu sei seiya pannabei kinepna dimset’a naumsah jiu, themgao ho thusei ho chu ngai hih-uvin, amahon Pakai kamsung soh hilou, amaho lunggil a ageldoh thuu munei thu jeng jeng aseiyu ahibouve.

Amaho hin Pakai thusei nahsah louho henga tat louhelin thu asei sei jenguvin. Nangho dingin imathu um ponte,’ atiuvin, chule koi hitaleh ama lungthim louchalna bang banga kiheile chan jah a, ‘Thilse imacha nachunga hung lhung ponte,’ tin aseipehuve, tin aseiye” ati.
Ijeh-inem itileh amaho lah a koipen tah chu Athusei jadoh dingle geltoh dinga Pakai khoppia gapang-ah um khauvam? Ahiloule koipen chun ama thusei akhohsah a angaipeh am?
Vetan, Pakai khopi hui hung kitolpi khu! Lungsatna ahung kondoh tan khohui chu chimpeiyin ahung kipeiye: Hiche khu migiloute lubuh a Hung deujah jeng ding ahiye.
Pakai lunghanna chun Ama lungtup chu amolsoa Athohchai masang sea Kinungle kit louhel ding ahi. Ni nunung nikhoa nanghon Kichen tah a nahin hetkhen dingu ahi.
“Kenla themgao ho kasol pon, Amaho la alhai lhai jenguve; Ajah-uva la keiman thu kasei khapon, Ahinla amaho agao gao jenguve.
Amaho khu keima khoppia hung pang mong hileu Keima thusei ho chu kamite henga aphonjal dingu ahi; Chutengle amaho chu alampiu gilouva kon leh Athilbolu gilouva kona alehei doh dingu ahiye.
“Keima hi nailam chabou um jing Pathen, gamla um kha louhel Pathen kahi hilou ham? tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Keiman ama kamudoh thei louna dinga mihem chu ama le ama akisel lai laiya kisel thei ding ham? tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Keima van le lei dimsoh kahilou ham? tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Keima mina ajou jouva gaothu seijia themgao hon, ‘Keiman mang kaneiye, keiman mang kaneiye,’ tia aseiyu chu keiman kajadoh tai.
Alungthim uva jou lhepna gaothu jeng seiya, ajou jouva gao jinga themgaoho lungthim sunga chu itih chanpi thujou um ding ham,
apu apateuvin Baal jeh a keima min asuhmil banguva, khat le khat amangu kiseipeh touva kamite keima min suhmil sah ho chu?
Mang neiya themgao chun amang chu sei hen lang, keima thusei ding neipan vang keima thu chu kitah tah-in sei hen. Suhlou chang kungle achang chu kibang mongam? tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Keima thu chu meikong tobang hilou hiya, songpi jong vogoi jeng thei sehcha tobang hilou ham? tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Hijeh chun neihin vetan, khat’a kon a khat’a keima thu kiguh mang themgao ho chu keiman kadouve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Pakaiyin aseiyin, neihin vetan, aleiyu leh lea ‘Hitin aseiye,’ tia seilea themgaoho chu keiman kadouve, ati.

Neihin vetan, joule nala mangthu gaothua seiya hiche ho chu seiya kamite ajounau leh anahsah lounauva pui mang ho, keiman kasol loubeh ho, thu jong kapeh louhel ho chu keiman kadou jinge; ajeh chu amaho hin hiche mite hi aphat chomsah louhelu ahiye, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Hiche mite lah a khattou ham, ahiloule themgao khattou ham, ahilou jongle thempu khattou ham chun nangma nadoh a hita atia, ‘Pakai pohgih chu ipi ham?’ atia ahileh; nangin amaho jah a chu, ‘Nangho hi pohgih chu nahiuvin, hijeh a chu keiman kapai mang ding nahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,’ nati ding ahi.
Chujongle themgaopa chu ahin, thempupa chu ahin, mipi lah a khatpa chu ahin, ‘Pakai pohgih,’ tia seipa chu keiman hichepa chuleh ainsung mite talen kapeh ding ahi.
Nanghon amitakip henga, aheng akom henga chule asopipa henga chu, ‘Pakaiyin ipi adonbut hitam, Pakaiyin ipi aseipeh hitam?’ tia naseipeh dingu ahiye.

Ahin ‘Pakai pohgih’ vang chu naphah poh kit louhel dingu ahi; ajeh chu pohgih kiti chu amitakip thusei ahibouvin, nanghon Pathen hing thaneipen Pakai, i-Pathenu thusei ho chu akaleh a nahei gamu ahitai.
