Hijeh a chu nangman, ‘Pakaiyin nadonbutna chu ipi ham?’ Chule ‘Pakaiyin ipi asei hitam?’ hiche chubou themgaopa naseipeh ding ahi.

Amavang Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, nangho kasola ‘Pakai pohgih’ tia nasei lou dingu ahi, kati pet’a chu ijem tin ‘Pakai pohgih’ tin sei khauvin nate, kati hiche thuho, Pakai pohgih kiti hi nasei tah jeh-uvin,
neihin vetan, keiman ka-angsunga kona kadop sanguva kapai mang ding nahiuve, nangho jong nangho le napu napateu kapehsa hiche khopi jong hi.
Chule keiman nangho chunga aitih chan geiya kihouset setna jeng kahin pohlut khumuva, suhmil kit louhel ding tonsot geiya jachatna kahin pohlut khum ding nahi uve,’ tin aseiye,” ati.

Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar in Jerusalema kona Judah leng-pa, Jahoi’akim chapa Jeconi’ah leh Judah leng chapate, khut them ho, thih kheng them miho toh Babylon gamsunga soh-chang dinga ahin kailut nung chun Pakai-yin keima hiche mu neina hi eina vetsah-in ahileh vetan, Pakai houin maiya chun pocha ni dimset theichang ga ana kitunge.
Pocha khat’a chun theichang ga ma-sapen tobang theiga aphat’a phathei jeng aumin, pocha chom khat’a chun aphat’a phamo behseh jenga neh thei hoi hilou, theiga anaume.
Hichun Pakaiyin kajah a, “Jeremiah, ipi namum?” eitin ahileh, ken jong, “Theiga tampi kamun, apha ho chu la apha lheh jengin, apha moho ma la aphamo behseh jengin neh theihoi ahi-poi,” kati.
Chujouvin Pakai thusei kahenga ka-henga ahung lhungin hitin ati,
“Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, hiche theiga phatah tah banga hi keiman hiche munna kona Chalde’a mite gam lama kasol mangsa, Judah gama kona sohchang mite chu apha jenga kagel ding ahi.

Aphatna diuva kavet lhih jing jeng ding, chutengle hiche gamsunga hi kahin lepui lut kit ding ahi; amaho chu katundoh ding kaphet lhah lou ding ahiuve. Abon-chauva thing phung phua kaphu ding ahiuvin, thing phung kibotdoh banga kabodoh louhel ding ahi.

Keima hi Pakai kiti chu kahi, ti hi ahet theina dinguva lungthim khat kapeh ding ahiuve; chutengle amaho kamite hiuvin tin keima amaho Pathen kahi ding ahi, ajeh chu amaho alungthim pumpiuva kahenga hung kilekit ding ahiuve.

“Hiti chun Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; theiga phalou, neh thei louhela phamo tobanga chu keiman Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah le aleng chapate, Jerusalema ahing doh amoh cheng, hiche gamsunga umden ho leh Egypt gamsunga cheng ho kabol ding ahiuve.
Amaho chu abon-chauva keiman kadel mangna ding mun-tina leiset lenggam jouse dinga kidah umtah le houset bep ding, seithang bep le seichah bep chule gaosap ding bep’a ka-umsah ding ahiuve.
Amaho hi keiman amaho le apu apateu kapehsa hiche gamsunga kona hi amanthai hel kah-seuva chemjam kalha khuma, kel kalhah khum sah ding, thina hise kalanden sah ding ahi,” ati.

Judah lengpa, Josi’ah chapa Jehoi’akim leng chan kal kum li lhin kum, hiche kum chu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar leng chan kal kum khat lhin kum ahin, Judah mite jouse chung thua Pakai thusei chu Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin,
hiche chu Jeremiah themgaovin jong Judah mite jouse heng le Jerusalema chengte jouse henga anaseiyin,

“Judah lengpa Amon chapa Josi’ah leng chankal kum som le kum thum lhinna pat tuni geiyin kum som ni sungin Pakai thusei kahenga ahung jingin, chule keiman jong tanglou helin nangho henga thu kaseitan, ahivangin nanghon ngaisah-in naneideh pouve.
Nanghon ngaisah inla nanei pouvin, Jahdoh theina din jong nanakhang nahindo deh pouve, Pakaiyin alhacha themgaoho nahenguva ahinsola,
hita aseisah-a, Tun amitakip ama lam gilou le athil dihlou bola konin hung kilekit cheh hen lang, masang laiya pat atonsot geiya dinga Pakaiyin nangho le napu napeteu anapehsa gamsunga hin chenguvin;

pathen chom chomho chu jui dauvin lang, hiche ho chu jenle dingle chibai bohdin got dauvin, chule nakhutsoh thil nasemthu u chun keima neiphin lunghang hih-uvin: achuti loule keiman nangho ka bolset ding nahiuve,’ atisah-e.
Ahivangin nanghon nakisuh khahna dinguvin, nakhutsoh nathilsem thuu chun keima phin lunghang tei neigouvin, hijeh chun ngaisah-in neinei pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Hichejeh chun tha neipen Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye: nanghon keima thusei ho na-ngai lou jeh-uvin.

neihin vetan keiman sah lam gamsunga phungtin kou dingle kasohpa Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar kou dinga mi kasol ding a hi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, amaho chu hiche gam dou dingle agamsunga chengte dou ding, chule akimvel dunga namtin vaipi dou dinga kahin puilut’a, amaho chu kasuh beihela, kidah dah uma kalha ding, phi set khum khum dingle aitih geiya houset set dinga kakoi ding ahi.

Hiche kalvala jong chu amahoa kon a keiman kipana ogin le thanopna ogin, jinei dingpa kipa thanop ogin le jinei dingnu kipa thanop ogin, sumheiya chang kigoi ginle thaomei kivah kasuhbei soh ding ahi.
Hiche gam pumpi hi asesa le keova hung kijam ding, chule hiche namtin vaipi hin kum som sagi sunga Babylon lengpa ajenle dingu ahi.

Kum som sagi chu alhin teng leh keiman Babylon lengpa leh hiche nam mite chule Chalde’a mite gam khu athemmona jaluva talen kapeh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, agam chu tonsot geiya ahom keova kalha ding ahi.
Keiman hiche gamsung hi adouna kathusei jouse, Jeremiah-in namtin vaipi douna gaothu aseisa chengse hiche lekhabua kijih chengse achunga kahin lhunsah ding ahi.

Ijeh inem itileh namtin vaipi nasatah ho leh leng len tah tah hon amaho hi soh a akivul diu, hita chu keiman amaho chu anatoh athilbol chengseu dungjui leh akhutsoh-u thil ho dungjuiya kalethuh ding ahiuve.” ati.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai, Israel Pathen chun keima jah a hitin aseitai: “Hiche lungsatna khon hi keima khut’a konin kilah-in lang keiman nangma kasolna chan namtin vaipi jouse chu donsah tan.
Amahon dounuvin tin keiman alah uva kathot kathusei jeh a chu amaho lonle leuva khamsoh hel ding ahiuve.” ati.
Hijeh chun keiman Pakai khut’a konin khon chu kalan, chuin hiche chu Pakaiyin eisolna namtin vaipi jouse chu abon chauvin kadonsah tai;
Jerusalem le Judah gam khopi jouse ahin, alengpa le aleng chapate ahiuvin, abon chauva dalhah thip hela keohela aumna dingu, tuni nikhoa tobanga hi phiset khum dingle gaosap chang dingin;
Pharaoh, Egypt lengpa ahin, asohte jouse leh aleng chapate ahiuvin, amite aboncha ahiuvin,
chule amaho lah a um gamchom miho jouse ahiuvin, Uz gamsunga lengle ahiuvin, Philistine gamsunga Ash’kelon, Gaza, Ekron chule Ashdod khopi amoh chengse toh, leng jouse ahiuvin.
Edom ahin, Moab ahin chule Ammon chapate ahiuvin;
Tyre gamsunga lengho ahiuvin, Sidon gamsunga leng jouse ahiuvin, twikhanglen gal lama twikhanglen pang dunga lengho jouse ahiuvin;
Dedan ahin, Tema ahin, Buz ahin, chule ajangsam mong kitanse se ahiuvin;
Arabia gamsunga lengho jouse leh neldi gamsunga cheng phungtin kihallah a lengho jouse ahiuvin;
Zimri lengte jouse ahiuvin, Elam lengho jouse ahiuvin, Media lengte jouse ahiuvin;
naiya le gamla khat khat’a sah lam gamkaiya lengho jouse ahiuvin, chujongle leiset chunga um lenggam jouse hi ahiuve. Amaho bana chu Babylon lengpan adon ding ahiye.

“Chutengle nangman amaho jah a chu, ‘Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye; donuvin lang don khamset’uvin, chule lo lhauvin, kisep lhuuvin lang kithoudoh kit hih heluvin, keiman nalah-uva kahin lhalut chemjam thahat jal chun,’ tin.
“Hichea chu amahon nangma khut’a khon chu kisana don ding adauva ahileh nangman amaho jah a naseiya, ‘Thaneipen Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; nanghon nadon tei tei dingu ahi!

Ijeh-inem itileh vetan, keima mina kiminvo hiche khopi douna hin keiman thilse kahin bol pane, hichea chu nangho talen man louva naum dingu ham? Nangho talen man louvin um pouvin nate, ajeh chu keiman leiset chunga cheng jouse dounan chemjam tha kakouvin ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye,’ tin.

“Hijeh a chu nangman amaho douna thu hichengse hi nagaova hita chu ajah uva naseipeh ding; ‘Chung lama konin Pakai hung hutumin tin, Achenna mun thenga kona a-o ahinkhon ding ahi; Ama chu thahat tah a akelngoi hong douna hung hutum ding, Leiset chung chengte jouse douna a Lengpiga chil ho heisat gin banga Hung hamlet lut jeng ding ahi.

A-ogin leiset kim vela kiletol le le ding ahi, Ajeh chu namtin vaipi dounan Pakaiyin hehsetna khat aneiye: Ama, tahsaa hing jouse thutan dingin ahung lut’in. Migiloute chu chemjam toh kito ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye’.
“Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Vetan, namtin vai khat’a konin vai khat’a agilou ahung potdoh-in, Chule leiset kolmong agamla lang peh a konin Khopi hui nasatah ahung kitole!

“Chuleh hiche nikhoa Pakaiyin mi athasa ho chu leiset mong lang khat’a pat’a among lang khat geiya kijam matsoh hel ding ahiuve. Amaho chu koiman jong aka louhel ding, loh jong kiloh khomuva kivui louhel ding ahiuve: abon chauva. amaho chu tollhanga eh banga kithe thang jeng ding ahiuve.

“Vo nangho kelngoi chingho kap’uvin, maovuvin; Chule nangho kelngoi hon lah a apipu cheng vutvam lah a kilih le leuvin. Ajeh chu nangho kitha na dingle najam cheh na dingu nikho ho ahung lhung tai: Kelngoi chal it tah tah ho banga nalhuh lham dingu ahi.
Kelngoi chingho dinga kiselna ding khat cha jong umden lou ding. Kelngoi hon lah a apipu cheng dinga jong jamdohna umlou ding ahi.
Kelngoi chingho ogin pi khu! Chule kelngoi hon lah a apipu ho ka-gin khu!! Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Ahamhing jouseu asuhset peh soh tai.
Chule lung mongtah a um kelngoi hongho jong athip del tai, Pakai lunghan kichat umtah jeh chun.
Aman sakei bangin akiselna mun adalhan, Hijeh chun amaho gamsung chu ahom keovin aumtai; Mibol giloupa chemjam hemhat jeh le Amapa lunghan kichat umtah ahijeh chun,” ati.
Judah lengpa, Josi’ah chapa Jehoi’akim leng chan kipat tilin Pakaiya konin hiche thu hi ahung lhungin hitin ati,

“Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Pakai inpi sunga gadingin lang, Judah gam khopi jousea kon a hung hiche Pakai insunga chibai boh dinga hung miho jouse jah a chun keiman ajah-uva sei dinga kathupeh ho hi gaseitan; thu khat cha jong sei louvin koi hih helin.

Amahon ngai jong hin ngai thei maiyun tin, amitakip ama ama thilse bolnaa kona hung kilekit’a, keiman jong amaho thil gilou bol ho jeh a achunguva hin lhut khumjeng dinga kagot thilse chung changa chu kalung kahei peh thei ahi.
Chule nangman amaho jah a chu naseiya, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; keiman namasanguva kakoipeh kakadanthua chon ding hi nei ngaipeh dauva,
ngai sah-in neihih jong leu chun, keiman nahenguva kinloi tah a kahinsol ka lhacha themgaoho thusei chu nakhoh sah louvuva ahileh,
chutengleh keiman hiche in hi Shiloh tobang kahisah ding, hiche khopi jong hi namtin vaipi jouse dinga gaosap chang kahisah ding ahi,’ a tin tin seiyin,” ati.
Hichun thempu ho ahiuvin, themgao ho ahiuvin chule mipi abonchauvin Pakai insunga Jeremiah-in thu hicheng aseiho chu ajatauve.

Jeremiah chun Pakaiyin mipi jouse henga sei dinga athupeh chengse chu aseijou sohhel phat’in, thempu ho le themgaoho chule mipin abonchauvin amapa chu atuh chah den jenguvin, aseitauve; “Nangma nathi tei tei ding ahi!

Ipi dinga nangman Pakai mina gao thu naseiya hita natia, ‘Hiche in hi Shiloh tobang hiding, chule hiche khopi hi acheng beiya, akeohela hung um ding ahi,’ tia nasei ham?” atiuve. Hiti chun mipi abonchauvin Pakai insunga chun Jeremiah kimvela akikhom soh tauve.
Judah leng chapaten hicheng thilsoh chu ajahdoh phat’uvin lengpa ina kon chun Pakai in geiyin ahung lhai touvun, Pakai in kelkot thah a lutna chun atou tauve.

Hichun thempu ho leh themgao hon leng chapate leh mipi abon chauva jah a chun a seiyuvin. “Hiche mipa hi thi dinga kilom mong ahitai, ipijeh-inem itileh hiche khopi douna aman gaothu aseidoh chu nanghon jong nanabeng tah-uva najah cheh-u ahitai,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Jeremiah chun leng chapate jouse leh mipi abon chauva jah a thu aseiyin hiti ati, “Pakaiyin hiche in hi le hiche khopi douna gaothu sei dinga keima eihinsol ahi, hichu hicheng nathu jah chengseu hi ahitai.
Hichejeh chun tun nalam lhah ule nachon nau kisem phat’uvin lang Pakai na-Pathenu ogin ngaiyuvin, chutileh Pakaiyin nangho douna thilse aphondohsa chu alung ahei kit ding ahi.
Keima dingin vang nei veuvin, keima nakhut’uva kaume, naphatsah bang bangule nadihsah bang bangu vin neibol tauvin.

Kichen tah-in vang heuvin, ijemtia neithauva ahileh nangho le nangho chule hiche khopia achengte chunga themmona bei thisan nakilhut khum ahi, ajeh chu tahbeh monga nangho nabenga hicheng thu hi seipeh dinga Pakaiyin keima nangho henga eihinsol ahi,” ati.
Hichun mipi abonchau leh a leng chapate chun thempuho leh themgaoho jah a, “Hiche mipa hi thi dinga kilom ahipoi, ajeh chu aman eiho henga Pakai i-Pathenu mina thu ahungsei ahibouve,” atiuvin ahi.
Hichun gamsunga upa phabep akipat doh-uvin mipi kikhom khomho henga chun thu aseiyun hitin atiuve,

“Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah nikho laiyin More’sheth chapa Micah chun gaothu anaseiyin, Judah mite jouse jah a hitin anati, ‘Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Zion chu loulai banga langkona hung kikho ding, Jerusalem chu asesa abalsa alhuh lhuh a hung kise sang ding. Chule in kisahna lhang chu Thing kedimsetna lhang hiding ahi.’ anati.

Hiche a chu Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah ahin, chule Judah mite aboncha ahiuva amapa chu anatha mong mongu hinam? Aman Pakai anagin jeh a Pakai henga alung lhaina ana ngeh-a, hijeh a chu Pakaiyin amaho douna thilse ana phondohsa chu alung aheikit’a anabolda hilou ham? Chuti chu ahin iti dana eihon tua hitobang thilse tah hi eiho le eiho ikilhut khum jeng diu u hitam,” atiuve.

Hichun midang khat, Kir’iath-je’arim khoa mi Shemai’ah chapa Uri’ah kiti ana umin, ama jong chun Pakai minin gao thu anaseiye. Aman hiche khopi douna le agamsung douna hin Jeremiah thusei ho tobang bang man gaothu ana seiye.

Chuin Jehoi’akim lengpan ama gal-hang mite jouse le leng chapate jouse toh hiche thuho hi ajahdoh phat’un, lengpa amatah-in amapa chu tha dingin anahol tai; ahivangin Uri’ah chun hiche thu chu ajah phat’in akichan, ajamin Egypt gama alhai lut tai.
Chujouvin Jehoi’akim lengpan Egypt gama mi phabep, Elna’than kiti Achbor chapa le midang phabep asolin,

amaho chun Egypt gamsunga Uri’ah chu agahol dohuvin, Jehoi’akim lengpa henga ahin puilut tauvin ahileh, aman amapa chu chemjam in asat lih-in, athilong atahsa chu milham ho kivuina lhan khuh sunga aleh luttai.
Ahivangin Jeremiah chu Shaphan chapa Ahi’kam in ana kithopin, hijeh chun amapa chu mipi khut’a tha dingin pehdoh-in ana um tapoi.
Judah lengpa Josi’ah chapa Zedeki’ah leng chan kipat tilin Pakaiya konin hiche thu hi Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin hi tin ati;
“Pakai chun kajah a hitin aseiye, ‘Nangma poh dingin namkol jol ho leh savun khao kisemin lang na ngonga pon.

Chutengleh Edom lengpa heng, Moab lengpa heng, Ammon lengpa chapate heng, Tyre lengpa heng chule Sidon lengpa henga, Jerusalema Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah henga hungji leng palai ho khut’a chun thu gah thot temin.
Amaho chu apiputeu dingin thupeh hiche hi pen. “Thaneipen Pathenin hitin aseiye, nanghon napiputeu henga nasei dingu chu hiche hi ahiye.
’Kaban thahat nasatah a, banjang hin lhung doh a leiset anasem doh pa, achunga cheng mihemte leh ganhing jouse sempa chu keima kahin, hijeh a chu keiman koi hijongleh dih kasah pa chu kapeh jeng ahi.
Tua hi keiman kasohpa Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar khut’a hiche gam pumpi hi kapehdoh ahitan, chule alei laiya ganhing gamsa ho jouse jong hi ama kinbol dinga kapeh tha ahitai.
Ama gam mong mong ahung lhun kahsea namtin vaipin abon chauva ama le achapa chule atupa kin jeng abol diu ahiye; chujou tengleh namtin vaipi tamtah le lengho tampin amapa hi soh a ahin nei dingu ahi.

“Ijemtia koi tobang khat nam mite, ahiloule lenggam khat’in hiche Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar kitipa kin hi bol louva Babylon lengpa namkol noiya angong adomai maiya ahileh hiche nam mite chu keiman chemjam kapat’a, kel kalhah sah a, chule gamna hise kalan sah a, amapa khut’a kasuh mang hel kahsea chu, talen kapeh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Hijeh chun nathemgao hou thusei hihen, nagaothem hou thusei hileh, mang neijiho thusei hileh, nathemkateu thusei hihen, naphunsan them hou thusei hileh nangho jah a, ‘Nanghon Babylon lengpa kin nabol lou dingu ahi,’ tia seiho thusei chu na-ngailou dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh amahon nangho henga gaothu aseiyu khu keiman nangho kadel manguva namanthah lo na dingu, nagamsung uva kona gamla tah a nakitol mang lo dingu ahibouve.

Amavang koi nam mite hijongleh Babylon lengpa namkol noiya angong hindo jenga, amapa kin boljeng chu keiman ama chu agamsunga kadalhah a agam akilhoa cheng den ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati, tin gaseipeh-in’ ati gatin,” tin aseiye.
Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah henga chun keiman thu hijatpi hi tobang bang hin kagaseiyin hitin kati, “Babylon lengpa namkol noiya na-ngong hindo chehuvin lang, chule amale amite kin bolun, hinnan neiyuvin.
Ipi dinga nangma nahin namite ahiuvin, Pakaiyin Babylon lengpa kin bollou nam mite chung chang thudola ana seisa chemjam a, gilkela chule gamna hisea chu nathi jeng dingu hitam?
’Babylon lengpa kin bol dauvin,’ tia najah uva seiho themgao ho thuseiho chu ngai hih beh-uvin; ajeh chu amahon nangho henga gaothu aseiyu hi jouthu jeng ahibouve.

Pakaiyin aseiyin, keiman amaho kasol pon, ahinla amahon joule nal jengin keima minin gaothu aseiyuve, hita chu keiman nangho le nathemgao ho kadel manguva namanthah lo nading bep’uva amahon nangho henga gaothu aseiyu ahi,” ati.

Hichun keiman thempuho leh hiche mipiho jah a thu kaseiyin hitin kati, “Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; nangho jah a, ‘Vetan, Babylon gama kon a Pakai insunga khon ho hung kinung lhut vah ding ahitai,’ tia thuseiya themgaoho gaothu seiho chu ngai hihbeh uvin; ajeh chu amahon nangho henga gaothu aseiyu hi jouthu jenghou ahiye.
Amaho thusei khu ngai dauvin; Babylon lengpa kin boluvin lang hinnan neijo’uvin. Ipi ding pen a hiche khopi hi ahom keova um jeng ding ham?

Amaho hi themgao ahiuva, Pakai thusei neite ahiu leh thaneipen Pakai henga taovun tin Pakai insunga kidalha khon ho ahin, Judah lengpa insunga ahin, Jerusalema um ho ahin, Babylon langa akitol louna ding bol tah tau.
Ijeh-inem itileh thaneipen Pakaiyin inkhomho le kisilna kong, chule akitunna khom ho leh hiche khopi sunga kidalha khon dang jouse chung changa hitin aseiyin,

Babylon lengpa Nabuchadnez’zar in anapoh mang lou, Jerusalema kona Judah lengpa Jehoi’akim chapa Jeconi’ah le Judah gamle Jerusalem muna kona milen milal jouse sohchang dinga anakai mang pet’ a anadalhah chengse thudola chun
thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, Pakai insung le Judah lengpa insung chule Jerusalem muna kidalha khonho chengse chu

abon chauva Babylon gama kipolut soh keiyuva, keiman hiche ho chu kakhohsah masang sea khukoma ga umden ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Chujou tengleh keiman abon chauva kahin nungpoh kit’a hiche muna hi kathah koi cheh ding ahiuve,” ati.

Hiti hin thu anaumin, Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah leng chan kipat til lai, hiche kum le le, kum li lhin kum lha nga lhinna chun Gibeon khoa mi Azzur chapa themgao Hanani’ah chun Pakai insung laitah, thempuho leh mipi jouse muchang tah-in keima jah a thu anaseiyin hi tin ati,
“Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathen chun hi tin thu aseiye; keiman Babylon lengpa namkol kaheh bong tai.
Kum ni sunga Pakai insunga khon jouse Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar in hiche muna kona Babylon langa anapoh mangsa chu hiche lai mun le lea kahin nung pohlut kit ding ahitai.

Chujongle keiman hiche muna hi Judah lengpa Jehoi’akim chapa Jeconi’ah le Judah gama kona Babylon gama sohchanga anache jouse chu kahin lepuidoh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye, ajeh chu keiman Babylon lengpa namkol kahebal ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Jeremiah themgao pan jong Hanani’ah themgaopa henga chun thempuho le Pakai ina ding mipi jouse mitmu chang tah-in thu anaseiyin,

hiti chun Jeremiah themgaopan aseiye, “Amen! Pakaiyin hiti chun bol jeng hen; Pakaiyin nangma gaothu sei chengse chu abang bangin hin guilhun sah jeng hen, Babylon gama konin Pakai insunga khon ho jouse leh sohchang jouse chu hiche muna hin nung lhut tei hen.
Hijongle tun nangma jah dingle mipi jah dinga keiman hiche kasei hi ngai temin.
Nangle kei masanga themgao ho chun khanglui laiya pat’in gal thu le kel lhah thu, gamna hise lan ding thu, gamsung tamtah le lenggam tamtah chunga hung lhung ding gaothu ana seiyuvin ahi.
Amavangchamna dinga gaothu seipa themgaopa dingin, hiche themgaopa thusei chu ahung guilhun tengleh Pakaiyin hiche themgaopa chu asol mong monge, ti kihedoh ding ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Hanani’ah themgaopan Jeremiah themgaopa ngong a namkol jol teni chu alan anin aheh bong tai.

Chuin mipi jouse mitmu chang tah chun Hanani’ah chun thu aseiyin hitin ati, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Keiman Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar namkol chu hitobanga hi kum ni sunga namtin vaipi jouse ngonga kona kahin heboh ding ahi,” ati. Ahinla Jeremiah themgaopa chu alampia achetai.
Hanani’ah themgao pan namkol jol teni Jeremiah themgaopa ngonga kona aheboh jou phat phabep nungin Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhung paiyin,
“Chen lang Hanani’ah chu gaseipeh-in lang hitin gatin, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; nangman thing namkol jol ho chubou naheboh ahin, hiche ho khela chu Keiman thihjol jeng kahin semdoh ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, keiman namtin vaipi jouse ngong hi Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar kin bolna dinga thih namkol toh kato cheh ahitai, hijeh a chu amahon amapa kin abol tei ding ahi, ajeh chu keiman tol lhanga gamsa ho jeng jong hi amapa kapehdoh ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,’ ati,” ahung ti.
Hichun Jeremiah themgaovin Hanani’ah themgaopa jah a chun, “Phatah-in ngaiyin Hanani’ah, Pakaiyin nangma nasol ahipoi, nangin hiche mite hi jouthu natahsan sah ahibouve.

Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Neihin vetan, keiman nangma leiset chunga kona katol mang ding nahitai. Nangman Pakai douna adoumah mah naseidoh jeh a tukum sung mong monga athi tei tei ding nahi,’ tin aseiye,” atipeh-e.
Chuche kum ma ma lha sagi lhin chun Hanani’ah themgaopa chu athitai.

Thu hicheng hi Jeremiah themgaopan Jerusalema pat sohchanga um upa ho, thempuho, themgaoho, chule mipi jouse, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar in Jerusalema kona Babylon gama sohchanga akaimang ho henga lekha anathot ho chu ahiye.
Hiche athot nahi Lengpa Jeconi’ah le anu lengnu, nukiso ho, Juda gamle Jerusalema leng chapate, khut themho, chule thih kheng themhon Jerusalem adalhah nungu ahitai.

Hiche lekha thot chu Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah chun Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar henga ding Babylon langa mi asol ho Shaphan chapa Ela’sah le Hilki’ah chapa Gemari’ah khut’a ana kithot ahitan, hitin akiti;
“Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathen chun, ‘Keiman Jerusalema kona Babylon lama sohchanga kanasolsa ho henga chun,’ tin hitin aseiyin;
In tampi kisahuvin lang asunga chenguvin, chule honlei tampi kiboluvin lang aga chu neuvin.

Numei ji tampi kipuiyun lang chapate chanute hinguvin; chapa tampi le chanu tampi anei nadinguvin nachapate chu ajinu dingu puipeh-uvin lang chule achanuteu chu ji neisah-uvin; hiti chun punguvin lang lhasuh hih heluvin.
Chujongle keiman sohchang dinga kasolnau khopi phatna ding holuvin, chule hiche khopi thalheng chun taovun; ijeh-inem itileh amaho phatnaa chu nangho phatna jong nakimu dingu ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, nangho lah a nathemgao hou, nangho dinga gaothemho chu kilhep lhah sah hih heluvin lang, chule amaho mang nei amangu jong chu nangaisah peh hih heluvin.
Ajeh chu amahon keima mina gaothu aseiyu khu joukeo ahibouve; keiman amaho kasolpoi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hitin asei-ye, Babylon dinga kum som sagi alhin tengleh keiman nangho nahung viluving ting chule nangho dinga keima kitepna chu kabulhit ding, hiche muna hi nangho kahin puilut kit ding nahiuve.
Ajeh chu keiman nangho dinga thilgon ho kaneinai, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, naphat touna diu, thilse ding hilou thil gon ho, khonunga nangho dinga kinepna le nakhan tou dingu kahei.
Chutengle nangho keima henga hunguvin natin, kahenga nahung taovuva, keiman kangaipeh ding nahiuve.
Nanghon neiholuvin natin neimudoh dingu ahi; nanghon nalungthim pumpi-uva keima neihol tenguleh;

nanghon keima neimudoh-uvin natin, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, hichea chu keiman nangho kadel mangna mun jousea konle namtin vaipi jousea kona nangho hamphatna kasem phat peh ding nahiuve, tin Pakaiyin asei-yin, keiman nangho sohchanga kasol mang nauva kona hiche muna hi kahin lepui kit ding nahiuve, ati.
“Ipijeh-inem itileh nanghon nasei-yuvin, ‘Pakaiyin eiho dingin themgaoho atung nai.’ natiuve;
hijongle Pakaiyin David laltouna toupa lengpa chung chang le hiche khopi sunga chengho chung chang, chule nasopiu nangho toh kilhona sohchanga chelou ho chung chang thudol a hitin aseiye.

thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, neihin vetan, ken amaho chunga khun chemjam kahin lansah-in, kel kalhah sah-in, gamna hise kalansah-in, amaho khu gamlah a theichang ga ahutsa, neh theilou hel banga kahin umsah ding ahi.

Chule keiman amaho khu chemjama kahin dela, kel kahin lhah khumsah ding, gamna hise kahin lansah a, leiset lenggam jouse dinga kidah dah a ka umsah a, gaosap le tijatna chule phiset khum ding bep, keiman amaho kadel mangna lah namtin vaipi jouse lah a houset toh bep dinga kaumsah ding ahi,

ajeh chu amahon keima thusei ho, kalhacha themgao hoa kona tat le tat louva kahin thot jing jeng ho chu ngaisah-in ana neipouve, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, chuti chun nanghon nangaipouve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,’ ati.
Pakai thusei hi nangho, Jerusalema kona keiman Babylon gama sohchanga kasolmang hon ngaiyuvin.

’Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin Kolai’ah chapa Ahab le Ma-asei’ah chapa Zedeki’ah chung chang thudola hin hitin aseiyin, nangho henga keima mina jou jouva gaothu sei te khu, neihin vetan, keiman amaho khu Babylon lengpa Nebucha-drez’zar khut’a kapeh doh ding ahiuvin, aman abon chauva nangho mitmu chang tah a atha gam ding ahiuve.

Amaho jeh a khu hiche gaosapna hi Judah gama kona Babylon gama sohchang jousen aman-chah-uva, “Pakaiyin nangma hi Babylon lengpan meiya asahgot teni Zedeki’ah le Ahab tobang nahisah lhon hen” ati diu ahi.

Ajeh chu amahon Israel lah a ngol hoitah thil aboldoh tauvin, aheng akomu jinu jouse toh jon thanhoi abol tauvin, keiman kathupeh louhel jong keima minin jouthu jeng jeng aseitauve. Keima hi ija-kai thil hejing jeng kahin, chule asakhia pang kahi,’ tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Chule Nehel’am mi Shemai’ah jah a chu nangman hita naseiya hita nati ding,
“Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathen-in hitin aseiyin, hitin ati, nangman nangma minin Jerusalem a um mipi ho heng le thempupa Maasei’ah chapa Zephani’ah henga lekha thot tampi nahin thot’in hi tin nati.
Pakaiyin nangma hi thempupa Jehoi’ada khela thempua napan sah a, Pakai insung thu neiya pang ding, mi angola gaothu sei tapou chu kihenna ina koiya, songkula khum dinga napansah ahi.
Chuti ahileh ipi bola nangman tua hi An’athoth khoa mi Jeremiah nahenga gaothu seipa chu napho louhel ham?

Ijeh-inem itileh aman Babylon gama chun keiho henga mi ahinsolin hitin ati, “Nangho sohchan ding hi aphat sottah hiding ahin, hijeh chun in tampi kisah-uvin lang asunga chenguvin, chule honlei jong tampi kiboluvin lang aga kineh-uvin,” tin ahung seisah-e,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Hichun Zephani’ah thempupan hiche lekha thot chu Jeremiah themgaopa jah dingin asimpeh tai.
Hitah chun Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhung paiyin, hitin ati,

“Sohchang ho jouse henga chun mi solin lang, hitin gasei sahin, ‘Nethel’am mi Shemai’ah chung chang thudola chun Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; Keiman kasol louhel pet’a Shemai’ah kiti pan nangho henga gaothu ahung sei jeh le nangho jouthu keoseh natahsan sah jeh-uvin,

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, neihin vetan, Nethel’am mi Shemai’ah chu ama le achilhah ho talen kamusah ding ahiuve; hiche mite lah a hi keiman kamite lah a thilpha kahin bolpeh ding ana muthei dinga, aman mihing khatcha jong ana nei louhel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye, ijeh-inem itileh aman Pakai dounan doumah mah jeng ana houlimin ahitai,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Pakaiya kon a thu hung lhung chun hitin ati;
“Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiyin hitin ati. ‘Keiman nahenga kaseisa thuho jouse hi lekhabu sung khat’a jihlut soh keiyin.
Ijeh-inem itileh vetan nikho ho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, keiman apu apateu kapehsa gamsunga chu kahin lepui lut kit’a amahon hiche gam chu alo dingu ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Thu hicheng hi Pakaiyin Israel le Judah chung chang thudola anasei chu ahiye;
“Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Chamna thu hilou, tijat kichatna ogin khat keihon kajauve.
Dongtoh-uvin lang veuvin, Pasal chun cha ahindoh thei ha, Ipibol pena keiman pasal jouse chu Numei naoso nat banga ataibuh teni kisot’a um kamudoh ham? Itidan hiya mitin maiso Dangsoh gama hitam?
Ahe! hiche nikho chu a nasa behseh jengin, Hiche tobang chu khat cha jong aumpoi; Hiche chu Jacob dinga hesohna phat ahin. Hijongle hichea kona ama huhhinga umdoh ding ahi.

“Hiche nikho chuleh hita hung um ding ahi tin thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiyin, keiman angonguva namkol chu kaheboh a akihenna jouse kabotan ding, chuta chu gamdang miten amaho soh a anei kit louhel dingu ahitai.
Amahon aPathenu kin jeng aboluva, alengpau, keiman amaho dinga katundohpa, David lhacha pang ding ahiuve.

“Hijeh chun Vo kalhacha Jacob, Kicha hih helin tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; Vo Israel, lungthoi hih helin, Ijeh-inem itileh neihin vetan Keiman gamla tah a kona nangma kahuhhing ding, Chule nason nachilhah jong chu asohchanna gamuva kahuhhing ding ahi, Jacob chu hung kile kit’ in tin, Thip beh cha uma bai khencha umding, Koimachan jong amapa chu Akichat tijat sah louhel ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh nangma huhhing dingin Keiman nangma ka-umpi jing nai tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Keiman alah-uva nangma kathecheh na namtin vaipi ho chu Abonchauva akichaina hela kahin bol ding, Nangma vang beihela kahin lha lou ding nahi; Keiman nangma chu adih tah a kasuh dih a Ahivanga la itina ma jongleh Nangma jong talen matsah louva kahin lha louhel ding nahi.
“Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Nangma kimavona hi adam thei lou ahin, Nangma maha hi Anase behseh jengin ahi.
Chule nangma khankho ding gelkhoh la aumpon, Namaha a nu ding loula aum hih-in, nangdin damna aumpoi.

Nangin nalungset chengsen la nasumil soh tauvin, Amahon nang dingin imacha akhohsah tapouve; Ipijeh-inem itileh nangma themmona atam behseh jeh le Nachonsetna ho alet behseh jeh hin Keiman nang hi melma kimavo bangin kama von, Migilou milethuhna bangin kale thuh tan nahi.

Ipi dinga nangma nakisuh khahna jeh a chu naka ka ham? Natna chu damsah theilou ahi; Ipijeh-inem itileh nangma themmona atam behseh tan, Nachonsetna ho jong alen behseh jeng tai. Thil hicheng hi keiman Nang chunga kahin bol ahitai.

Chuti ahijeh chun nangma naval lhum chan chu kival lhum ding, Namelma pa ahin, amitakip abon chauva Sohchang dinga chesoh hel ding ahiuve; Nangma nachomgam ho chu chom gama hung um ding ahiuve; Chule nangma kivahna nanei chengse Keiman mi kivahna ka-umsah cheh ding ahiuve.

Ijeh-inem itileh keiman kadamsah a Namaha ho chu kaboldam ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Ipijeh-inem itileh amahon nangma hi thet umin nasei tauvin. ‘Koima chan akhohsah louhel Zion chu hiche hi ahi! atiuve.

“Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; Neihin vetan, keiman Jacob ponbuh son ho hamphatna Kahin sem phat peh ding. Chule amapa chen mun ho chunga lainatna ka nei ding ahi; Chule akhopi jong chu amolbuh dunga chu kisadoh kit’a Leng in pi jong chu adinna ngai ma ma chu ding ding ahi.

Hiche ho lah a kona chu thangvahna la kisa ho chu hung ging doh ding. Chule nopna ogin ho kithongdoh ding Keiman amaho punsah ing ting. Hijeh a chu lhomcha hilou ding ahiuve; Keiman amaho chu jabol tah a kaumsah ding. Amaho jong chu lhomcha hi lou ding ahiuve.
Achateu jong chu masang laiya bang bang hi ding. Akhopiu jong ka-angsunga kitungdoh ding ahi; Chutengleh amaho bolgenthei ho jouse Keiman talen kamatsah soh hel ding ahiuve.

Aleng chapauva pang ding jong chu amaho khat hiding. Alah-uva kona avaihom dingu jong hung doh ding ahi; Keiman amapa chu kajol lut ding. Ama jong kahenga hung nailut jing ding; Ahiloule koipen ham ama chamtah a Keima eihin nailut jeng theiya, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chutengle nangho kamite nahi dingu, Keima na-Pathenu kahi ding ahi” ati.
Vetan, Pakai gose hung kon pi khu! Lungsatna ahung kondoh tan, Go le hui chimpeiya hung kipei ahunge; Hiche khu migiloute lujanga hung kitatjal jeng ding ahi.
Pakai lunghan tijat umtah chun ama lung ngaito jouse Amolsoa, achaidoh soh hel kahsea kilekit louhel ding ahi. Ninu nung lam leh Nanghon hiche hi nahin hetkhen dingu ahi.
“Hiche phat le chun, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, keima Israel insung pumpi dinga Pathen chu kahi ding, chule amaho chu kamite hi ding ahiuve,” ati.
Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; “Chemjama hingdoh a mipiten Gamthip noiya lungsetna akimutauve; Israel in kicholdona anabol pet chun
Gamla tah a konin Pakai keima henga ahung kilah-e. Keiman nangma hi guitan louva kalungset nahin. Hiche jeh a chu nangma koma Kakitahna kabanjom jing jeng ahiye.

Keiman nangma insah banga kasah doh kit ding, Chutengle nangma insah a nakisadet ding ahi. Vo nu-ngah tobang Israel! Nangman khutbeh tampi nakibeh-a. Golnop bolte lah a alam dinga napot doh kit ding ahi.
Nangman Samar’ia molsang chung dunga chu Lengpi honlei tampi nakibola, Theiphung phut mi hon theiphung aphu’va Aga chu nopsahna anei dingu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh E’phraim thinglhang gama Molsang chunga kona kho ngah hon mi ahin kou niu nikho khat hung umding ahiye. “Kipatdoh-uvin eiho Ziona Pakai i-Pathen henguva kaltouvu hite,’ kiti ding ahi” ati.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; “Kipa ogin thongin Jacob dingin la sauvin, Namtin vaipi ho, haosa pa dingin Thanom tah-in kho lhang samuvin; Phongjaluvin, vahchoiyuvin. ‘Pakaiyin amite Israel mi amoh cheng ahuhhing tai’ tin seiyuvin.

Neihin vetan, keiman amaho chu Sahlam gamsunga kona kahin puiya, Leiset kikhonna lampeh a kona kahin khop khom ding. Amaho lah a chu mitcho le elbai, Numei naovop lai, naoso nat pettah numei ahin, Mihon atama tam hikoma hung kile kit ding ahiuve.

Amaho akap pum puma hung ding Chule keiman amaho chu lung monna kalepui ding, Twi lonna vadung lah jenga Kakitolle sah ding. Akise lhuh louna diu, Lamjang jenga kakitol le sah ding ahiuve; Ijeh-inem itileh Israel dingin keima mipa kahin, E’phraim hi kacha masa pen ahiye.

“Vo namtin vaipi ho, Pakai thusei ngaiyuvin lang, Chule twikhanglen pang dung gamla tah a gaphong doh-uvin; Hiti chun, “Israel the cheh pa chun ama chu ahin khop khoma Chutengle ama chu kelngoi ching pan akelngoi hon achin banga achin ding ahi’ tiuvin.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Jacob alhatdoh tan, Ama dinga ban thahat hat behseh hoa konin alhatdoh tai.

Amaho hunguva Zion molsang chunga la asah diu, Pakai phatna chunga chu hung vah emsel ding ahiuve; Chang chungle lengpitwi chung, thao ho chunga Chule kelngoihon noute le gancha noute chunga vah emsel diu; Ahinkhou jong twi kichap nou jing jeng hon lei lai bang ding. Chuta chu amaho lunghem kit louhel ding ahitauve.

Chutengle nu-ngah ho chu lama hung kipah thanom diu, Gollhang ho le upa ho jong lung kipah ding ahiuve. Keiman alunghem nau chu kipana kaheidoh peh-a Keiman amaho kalhamona, agimnau jeh a kipana kapeh ding ahi.
Thempuho lhagao chu keiman neng jengjunga kavah a, Chule kamite chu kaphatna vaset cheh ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,’; ati.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; “Ramah khoa ka le mao nasa tah ogin akijan, Rachel in achate aka ka jengin, Achate jala chu lhepbi ding jong ama anompoi, Ijeh-inem itileh Achate chu aum louvah ahitauve,” ati.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; “Naka na ogin thip sah-in lang, Chule namit lhi jong hulsah tan, Ijeh-inem itileh natohman kipe ding nahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Chuta chu amaho Melmate gama kona hung kilekit ding ahiuve.
Nakho nung thu dingin kinepna aume, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, Chutengle nachateu agamsung uva hung kilekit ding ahiuve.

Keiman E’phraim ka-gin kajan, ‘Nangman neisudih chun ahileh Keima hilthem loulai bong nou bangin suhdih-in ka umtai, Nei nung pui kit’in, Chutile keima semphat’a kaum ding ahi, Ajeh chu nangma Pakai ka-Pathen nahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh kakihei mang nungin kalung kakhel kit’in, Eikihil nungin jong keiman kakhelbuh kachum chume; Keima kajah chan, kaki sulung donge, Ajeh chu keiman kaneo laiya vetdana chu kapo le jinge,’ akiti.

E’phraim chu kadeitah chapa chu hinam? Amapa hi ka-ngaitah kacha hinam? Ijeh-inem itileh keiman ama douna thu kasei chanin Ama jengbou kageldoh jing jeng nalaiye. Hichejeh chun kalungthim hin ama jengbou alha ngaiyin, Achunga keiman hepina kanei tei tei ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Nangle nang dingin lampia theu kisen-lang, Nangma tah chu lamhilna thing khomin kitungin; Lhang lamlen chu phatah-in geltoh demin, Nangma chenasa lampi chu, Vo nu-ngah tobang Israel, hung kilekit’in, Hiche nangma khopi dunga hin hung kile kit’in.
Vo chanu kitahna bei, Itih chanpi nava thaile le ding ham? Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin leiset chunga thil thah khat asemdoh tai, Numeijo khat chun pasalpa joh chu ahuhjin ahi,” ati.

Thaneipen Pakai, Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Keiman amaho hamphatna kasem thah peh teng chuleh amahon Judah gamsungle akhopi sung dunga hicheng thuho hi ahin manchah kit’uva, ‘Pakaiyin phatthei naboh hen, Vo adih chenna mun, Vo lhang theng mun!’ tiuvinte.
Judah miho leh akhopi dunga miho hung cheng khom diu ahin, loubol mite leh kelngoi honte kipuilea vahle le ho chu hung chengkhom ding ahiuve.
Ijeh inem itileh keiman lhagao thachol jouse kavahva ding, chule lhagao hesoh lhasam jouse chu katha lhinsah ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche chung changa chun kathouvin kavet’a ahileh kana ihmut chu kei dingin lung lhaina tah anahi.
“Vetan, keiman Israel insung le Judah insung chu mihem chi lah le sahem chi lah a muchi tua katu lutna ding nikho ho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Chuteng hiche akichai joule keiman amaho thingga loa lolhah dingle heboh dinga, lekhup ding, suhmang dingle agilou lhut khum dinga ka-nga lhih jing banga sahdoh kit dingle thing phung phua phulut dinga ka-nga lhih jing ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Hiche nikho ho chuleh amahon hita asei kit louhel dingu ahiye; ‘Paten lengpithei thuh ana neuvin, Chate ha ajat lon ahi,’ tia.
Ajeh chu mihem ama ama chonsetna jeh a thi cheh ding ahi; lengpithei thuh nekha chan chu ama ama ha ja cheh ding ahiye.
“Pakaiyin aseiyin, vetan nikho ho chu ahung lhunge, keiman Israel insung le Judah insung toh kitepna thah khat kasemdoh nading,
Keiman Egypt gama kona kahin kaidoh pet’a apu apateu toh kana semdoh kitepna, keima amaho dinga ajipau kahiya keima kitepna anasuh keh sau tobang chu hilou ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Amavang hiche nikho ho kichai nungle keiman Israel insung toh, kitepna kasemdoh ding chu hiche hi hiding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, keiman asunguva kadanthu kachensah ding, hiche chu alungthimuva kajih lut’a, chutengle keima amaho Pathen kahi ding, amaho keima mite hi ding ahiuve.

Hiche chuleh min ama ama hengle kom, ama ama sopi cheh chu, ‘Pakai chu heuvin,’ tia ahil kit louhel ding ahitai; ijeh-inem itileh amahon a bon chauva aneo pena pat alen pen geiya keima eihetsoh hel dingu ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; hijeh a chu keiman athemmonau kangaidam a, achonsetnau kageldoh kit louhel ding ahitai,” ati.

Hitin aseiye Pakaiyin, Sun laiya vah dinga nisa koipa, Jan laiya vah dinga lha le ahsi ho goltoh pa, Twikhanglen choh lingjia Hijeh a chu twikhanglen kidil kithonga lha pa, Thaneipen Pakai kiti chu ama min ahiye.
“Hiche kigoltohsa hi ka-angsunga konin kitol mang taleh, Tin Pakaiyin aseiyin. Chutengle Israel son le pah bei bel ding, Aitih geiya ka-angsunga nam khat ahinau beihel ding ahi!” ati.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye. “Chunga van hi akite jouva Chule noiya leiset bulpi ho akikholtoh jouva ahileh Chutengle keiman Israel son le pah jouse Athilbol anatoh jouseu jala chu Kapaidoh jeng ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
“Pakaiyin aseiyin, vetan nikho ho chu ahung lhunge, khopi ahung kithahsah kitnading. Hanan’el intingvuma pat’ a inning kelkot geiya ahung kithahsah na ding nikho.
Thil tena jol chu kigol paiyin tin, Gareb thinglhang geiya kigol paiya, chujou tengle Go’ah geiya kigollut ding ahi.

Thilong ho lupna phaicham pumpi le leivuiho umna, Kidron vadung gamsung jouse toh, niso lama sakol kelkot chan gei chu Pakaiya atheng hiding ahin, hiche chu aitih chan geiya ajung kikaldoh louhel ding, lejong kileh khup kit louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah leng chan kal kum som lhin kum, Nebuchadrez’zar leng chan kal kum som le kum get lhin kum chun Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhung tai.
Hiche pet chun Babylon lengpa sepai ten Jerusalem khopi anaum uvin, chule Jeremiah themgaopa chu Judah lengpa leng inpi muna mihenna insunga chun ana kihen nalaiye.

Ama chu Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah chun songkul a ana khuma hita anasei ahi. “Ipi dinga nangman gaothu naseiya chule nahiti sei ham. ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; Neihin vetan, keiman hiche khopi hi Babylon lengpa khut’a kapedoh-e hijeh a chu aman ahinlah jeng ding ahin;
Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah chu Chaldea mite khut’a kona toldoh louhel ding, thon louhela Babylon lengpa khut’a lut tei tei ding, chutengle ama chutoh kimaitoa kihoulim lhon ding ahi;

aman Zedeki’ah chu Babylon lama apui ding, hikoma chu keiman kagavil kahsea anatham den ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; hijeh chun nanghon Chaldea mite dounan galsat jong leu chun najo louhel dingu ahi,’ ati tia nasei ham?” ati.
Chuin Jeremiah chun aseiyin, “Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati;

vetan, na-gangpa Shallum chapa Han’amel chu nahenga hungin tin hita ahung tiding, ‘An’athoth muna um keima loumun khu kichoh tan, ajeh chu hiche lhatdohna dinga choh dohna tha neina chu nanga ahiye,’ ahung ti ding ahi.

Hiti chun ka-gang chapa Han’amel chu kihenna songkul insunga keima henga Pakai thusei dungjuiyin ahungin, keima jah a, ‘Benjamin gamsunga An’athoth muna um keima loumun khu kichoh tan, ajeh chu hiche neina dingle lhatdohna ding thaneina chu nanga ahiye; nangma ding mong mongin kichoh tan. Ajeh chu keiman hiche chu Pakai thusei mong mong anahi ti kahedoh tai.’ ahung tin ahi.
“Hichun keiman An’athoth muna um loumun chu ka-gang chapa Han’amel koma konin kachon, ama dingin sum kasim peh-in, dangka shekel somle sagi ahiye.
Keiman lekha chu kikhut henna kabolin, mohor kanam khumin, sakhin mi kapansah-in, chule sum chu ate nan katedoh tai.
Chuin mohor kinam khumsa kichohna lekha, akichoh phat le akichoh dan kisutna kaladoh-in kaphongdoh tai;

chuin kichohna lekha chu Mahsei’ah chapa, Neri’ah chapa, Baruch chu, kagang chapa Han’amel masangle kachohna lekha a kikhut henna bol ho sakhia pang ho masang chule kihenna songkula tou Judah miho jouse masang laitah a chun, kapedoh tai.
Mi hicheng angsunga chun keiman Baruch thu kapen kaseiye,

“Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye; hiche kichohna lekha a thil kibol ho hitoh, mohor kinam khumsa kichohna lekha hi ahin, pohdohsa lekha a thil kibol hitoh, kilah-in lang, aboncha hi sotpi aumsot theina dingin leibel sung khat’a khum tan.
Ijeh-inem itileh thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye; hiche gamsunga hi in ho hihen, lou mun ho hihen lang chule lengpilei ho hijongleh hung kichoh tho ding ahi,’ ati kati.
“Kichohna thil kibolna lekha chu keiman Neri’ah chapa Baruch chu kapeh doh phat’in Pakai henga kataovin hitin kati,
’O Pakai Pathen! nathahatna nahan jang hin lhungdoh a van le lei semdoh chu nangma nahi! Thil imacha hahsa aumpoi nangma dingin,
nalungset longlou mihem asang sanga musah theiya, ahivanga mipate themmona anunguva achate chunga lethuh theiya, Vo alen le ahat Pathen, amin thaneipen Pakai kitipa.
Lung gela nasatah, natohna hattah; mihemte lamlhah jouse vetna dinga mit sing khalou, mi ama ama cheh chonna dungjuiya chule atohga cheh a tohman pejing jeng pa;
Egypt gamsunga melchihna tampi leh thil kidang tampi vetsah a, tuni geiya Israelte lah le chitin namtin lah a tuni nikhoa banga hi namin kithansah pa chu nahi.
Nangman namite Israel chu Egypt gamsunga konin thil kidang tamtah toh kithon, banjang thahat san le banjang kilhungdoh pum pum, chule tijat umtah tah-in nahin puidoh tan;
amaho chu nangman apu apateu peh dinga nakihahselna sa khoiju leh bongnoi lonna gam, hiche gam nana petai;

Hiti chun amaho ahung lut’uvin hichu analo tauve. Ahivangin amahon nangma thusei ana ngaipouvin, nadanthu jong ana mang pouve; nangman amaho nathupeh jouse chu khatcha jong anabol doh tapouvin ahi. Hichejeh a chu nangman thilse hijatpi hi amaho chunga nakou lut khum ahitai.

Vetan, khopi ki-umna dokhang ho chu hiche khopia ahung kitol luttai, akhopi la dingin; ipijeh-inem itileh chemjam hemhat jeh le kel hahsat jeh, gamna hise lan jeh a hiche khopi douna galsat’a Chaldea mite khut’a hiche khopi hi kipedoh ahitai. Nangman naseisa chu ahung gui lhungtai, nangman vetan hiche hi namui.
Hijong O Pakai, nangin keima jah a, “Lou mun hi sumin kichoh doh-in lang sakhia pang ding mi kihol doh-in” tia naseisa ahi,’ kati.” ati.
Chujouvin Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Vetan, keima Pakai, tahsaa hing jouse dinga Pathen chu kahi; kei dinga thil ipi ahahsa umam?
Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, neihin vetan, keiman hiche khopi hi Chaldea mite khut le Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar khut’a kapedoh tan, aman akilah ding ahitai.

Hiche khopi douna gal bola Chaldea mite chu hunguva akhopi hi meiya ahalvam ding, keima phin lunghangna dinga Baal koma intinga gimnamtui kihalnam nale twi donthei kilhaina kisun lhahna in jouse chu kilhutvam jeng ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Israel chapate leh Judah chapaten aneo laiyuva pat’in imadang cha bol louhelin keima mitmun thilse jengbou aboluvin ahi; Israel chapaten thil dang imacha bol louvin, amaho khutsoh semthu jeng chun keima phin lunghang na ding bep aboluve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Hiche khopi hin akisah doh nikhoa pat tuni chan geiyin kalunghan le kalungsatna jeng asodoh sah jingin, hijeh a chu kamitmua hiche khopi hi katol mang jeng ding ahi;

thilse hijatpi Israel chapate ahin, Judah chapate ahiuvin, keima phin lunghang nadia anabolu, alengteu ahin, aleng chapateu ahin, athempu hou leh athemgaoteu ahiuvin, Juda gama mite leh Jerusalema chengte ahiuvin abol cheh-ui.
Amahon anunglam jengbou eingat’uvin, amailam eingat pouve; keiman tat le tat louvin amaho kahil hil jeng vangin, amahon kahil chahna kisanna dingin ngaisah-in aneipouve.
Keima min kiputsah in suhboh teina dingin asunga thet umtah tah thil atungdoh tauvin ahi.

Amahon Hinnom chapa phaichama chun, keiman kathupeh louhel, kalunggil a jong lutkha louhel thil, Judah chu chonset sah tei nadingin, achapateu leh achanuteu chu Molech henga kilhaina thil toa atodoh theina dinguvin Baal koma chun munsang tampi asesang uve.
“Hijeh chun tun Pakai, Israel Pathenin, hiche khopi, ‘Chemjam hat le kel jeh, chule gamna hise lan jeh a Babylon lengpa khut’a kipedoh ahitai,’ tia naseiyu chung chang thudol ahi tin aseiye;

’Neihin vetan, keiman amaho hi kalunghan jeh a chule kalungsat jala chule kalung phatmo behseh jeh a kana delmangna gam tina kona kahin khop khom kit’a, hiche muna hi kahin nung puilut kit ding, chule amaho mong tah a kachensah ding ahiuve.
Chutengle amaho keima mite hiuva keima amaho Pathen kahi ding ahi.
Keiman amaho chu aphatna dingle anunguva achateu phatna dinga aitih chan geiya keima eigin theina dinguva lungthim khatseh le lampi khatseh bou kapeh ding ahiuve.

Chule amaho chu aphatna dingu kabolpeh-a kona kaki heimang louna dinga tonsot geiya ding kitepna kasemdoh ding, chule amaho jong keiya kona akihei mang louna dinguva alung sunguva keima ginna chu kakoipeh ding ahiuve.
Amaho phatna kabolpehna chung changa kipah ing ting, kitah tah a kalungthim pumpi leh kalhagao pumpia hiche gamsunga hi amaho thing tua katulut ding ahiuve.

“Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; Keiman hiche mite chunga hitobang thilse nasatah tah ho kahin pohlut khum jeng banga hi keiman amaho katep pehsa thilpha chengse jong chu kahin pohlut peh jeng ding ahi.

Hiche gamsunga hi nanghon, ‘Hiche gam hi mihem leh sahemin alo lou, akeova um hiya hitam, hiche hi Chalde’a mite khut’a kipedoh ngap ngap hitam,’ tia naseiyu lou mun jouse chu kichodoh soh hel ding ahi.

Benjamin gamsung le Jerusalem khopi vel dung muntina, Judah khopi jousea, thinglhang gamsung khopi jousea, Shephe’lah khopi jousea, Negeb gam khopi jousea loumun jouse chu suma kichoa, kichohna lekha ho chu kikhut henna kibol cheh a mohor kinamden cheh ding, chule sakhia kipansah ding ahiuve; ijeh-inem itileh keiman amaho hamphatna ka peh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Jeremiah henga chun, amapa kihenna songkul sunga ana um nalaiyin, anivei lhin nan Pakai thusei ahung lhung kit’ in hi tin ati;
“Hitin aseiye, Pakai leiset semdohpa, hiche leiset lim gongdohpa Pakai, chule aphutdoh pa, amin Pakai kitipa chun,
’Neihin kouvin, keiman nadonbut ing ting, nangin nahet khah louhel thil nasa ‘tah kiselguh chu naseipeh inge.
Ajeh chu Pakai, Israel Pathen chun chemjama gal kisat douna dinga dokhang semna dinga kiphe lha Judah lengte in ho leh hiche khopi sunga in ho chung chang thudola hitin aseiye.

Chalde’a mite kisatpi ding leh amaho chu keiman kalunghan leh kalungsat’a kaden lih ding miho thilong delvuhsah dingin ahunguve; ajeh chu agitlou nau jouse jala keiman hiche khopia kona hi kamai kasel mang ahitai.
Neihin vetan, hiche khopi hi keiman damna le kijen damna kahin pohlut peh a, amaho kahin jendama ahenguva khantouna lhingset le lung olna lhingset chu kaphondoh peh ding ahi.
Keiman Judah hamphatna chengse leh Israel hamphatna chengse chu kathah sempeh a, amasaa bang banga chu amaho hi insah banga kathahsah phat kit ding ahiuve.
Keima douna achonsetnau themmona chengsea kona kasuh thenga, keima douna achonsetnau leh doumah mah abolnauva kona athemmona chengseu chu ka ngaidam ding ahiuve.

Chutengle hiche khopi hi leiset mite, keiman amaho dinga thilpha kabolpeh chengse hinjadoh ding ho masanga, keima dinga kipana le vahchoina chule loupina min hung hi ding ahi; keiman hiche khopi dinga thilpha le khantouna ijakai kabolpeh jala chu amaho hi kichaa kitihot hot ding ahiuve.

“Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; hiche muna hi hung kijadoh kit ding ahi, nanghon ‘Hiche ahomkeo mihem le sahem umna lou ahi,’ tia naseinau mun, Judah gam khopi dungle Jerusalem kholai dung tin, dalhah thip’a uma, achenga mihem le sahem um louna,

kipa nopna ogin, thanopna ogin, jinei dingpa ogin, jinei dingnu ogin, la sa sa jengho ogin, Pakai insunga dinga thangvahna thilto choiya ahungnau husa gin chu; “Thaneipen Pakai chu thangvah uvin; Ajeh chu Pakai hi anun nemin, Ama lungset long louvin Tonsot geiyin athoh jouve!’ tia kisei gin chu. Ajeh chu amasa a bang banga chu keiman gamsung hamphatna chengse chu kathah semphat ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; hiche mun akeova umsa mihem le sahem beiya um, chujongle akhopi dung jouse hi kelngoi chingho chenna hung umdoh a akelngoi hon teu akicholdo sahna diu mun hung ding ahi.

Thinglhang gamsunga khopi dung ho ahin, Shephe’lah gam dunga khopiho sung dung ahin, Negeb gamsunga khopiho sung dung ahin, Benjamin gamsunga Jerusalem kimvel muntin leh Judah gamsung khopiho sung dunga kelngoi honte chu amaho simtoh thei khat khut noiya kijot pai pai diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Vetan, keiman Israel insung dingle Judah insung dinga kathutep kamolso nading nikhoho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chuche nikho ho chuleh hiche laiya chu keiman David dinga a bah dihtah khat kahin jamdoh sah ding, ama chun gamsunga kitah le dih tah a thu ahintan ding ahi.
Hicheng nikholai le chun Judah huhhinga uma Jerusalem chu lung oltah a umding ahi. Chule akiminvona ding min chu, ‘Idihnau chu Pakai ahi.’ kiti hi hi ding ahiye.
“Ijeh-inem itiloh Pakaiyin aseiyin hi tin ati. David chu Israel insung laltouna tou ding mihem lhasama um kha louhel ding ahi.

Chujongleh Levi themput dola thempuhon keima angsunga pumgo thilto toh dingle chang thilto halvam dia tohdoh ding, chule aitih chan geiya kilhaina gantha bol jing jeng dinga mihem lhasam khalou ding ahiuve, tin aseiye” ati.
Chujouvin Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hi tin ati;
“Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, nanghon keima sun le jan toh kakitepna nasuhkeh-uva, hijeh a chu sun le jan aphat kitep dung juiya ahung umlouva ahileh,

keima lhacha David toh kakitepna jong kisukeh ding, hijeh a chu aman alaltouna touva lengvai poding chapa anei lou ding ahin, chule Levi themput’a kalhacha kakin bolte ho toh kakitepna jong chuti ding ahiuve.
Van loupina ho akisim lou jou to bang leh twikhanglen neldi akite joulou banga, keiman kalhacha David son achilhah kapunsah ding, keima kinbola pang Levi themput dola thempuho kapunsah ding ahi” ati.
Chujouvin Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati;

“Nangman hiche mite thusei, ‘Pakaiyin alhendoh insung nijen apaidoh hel jengtai,’ tia aseiyu chu namelchih louham? Hiti hin amahon kamite don louvin akoiyuvin, hijeh a hi amaho mitmua nam mite khat’a umkit louhel ding ahitauve.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; Keiman sun le jan toh kakitepna kana phudoh lou hihen lang, van le leiya danthu ho hi kakoi lou hileh,

keiman Jacob le kalhacha David son chilhah ho chu kapaidoh jenga, ama chilhah ho khat cha jong Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob chilhah chunga vaihom dinga kalhen louhel ding ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh keiman amaho hamphatna kathahsem peh a, chule amaho chunga kahepina kakoi ding ahi,” ati.

Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar leh ama sepaite jouse toh, ama lengvai pohna noiya um leiset lenggam jouse toh, chule mitin namkim jousen Jerusalem le akhopi ho jouse douna gal asat laitah-uvin Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhungin hi tin ati;

“Pakai Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye; chen lang Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah henga thu gaseiyin hiti chun Zedekiah jah a gaseitan. ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, neihin vetan, keiman hiche khopi hi Babylon lengpa khut’a kapedoh-e; aman hiche hi meiya ahal lhah ding ahi.

Nang jong ama khut’a najam doh louhel ding, nakiman tei teiya ama khut’a nakipedoh ding ahiye; hijeh a chu nangman Babylon lengpa chu namit mong monga namua chule kimaitoa nakihou limpi ding ahi; chujou tengleh Babylon gama nache ding ahiye,’ ati.
Hijongle Pakai thusei hi ngaiyin, Vo Zedeki’ah, Judah lengpa! Pakaiyin nangma chung changa thu hitin aseiye; ‘Nangma chemjama nathi lou ding ahi.

Nangma lungmong tah a nathi ding ahinai. Chujongle nangma masanga leng chang masa ho, napu napate dinga gimnamtui akihalnam banga, mihon nangma chunga jong gimnamtui ahin halnamuva nahinka dingu, “Ohe kapu” tia asei dingu ahinai,’ ati. Ajeh chu keiman thu kaseitai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Chuphat’in Jeremiah themgaovin thu hicheng hi abonchan Jerusalema Juda lengpa Zedeki’ah henga agaseiyin ahi.

Babylon lengpa sepaiten Jerusalem le Judah gam khopi dalhah a um nalai, Lachish le Aze’kah douna gal anasat laitah-uvin; ijeh-inem itileh hichengse chubou kulpi kikai khum khopi ho lah a kihoi nalai ahiye.
Zedeki’ah lengpan ajah-uva jalen thu phondoh pehna dinga, Jerusalem mipi jouse toh kitepna khat anasem jou chun Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhungin,
amitakip’in pasal hihen lang numei hileh asohvul Hebrew mi kiti jouse chu achamlhat sah cheh ding, hita chu koimachan asopi Hebrew mi ma ma chu soh a avul thei louhel ding ahi, tin aseiye.

Hichea chun amaho abon chauvin leng chapate ahiuvin mipi ahiuvin, pasal hihen lang numei hileh ama ama cheh sohvul chu acham lhatsahna dinga kitepna pang jousen thu angai cheh-uvin; hiti chun miho chu soh-in avul kit tapouve. thu angai cheh-uvin abon chauvin acham lhatsah soh hel tauve.
Ahivangin khonung nungin amaho alhai kimvel leuvin soh pasal ho le soh numei ho acham lhatsah sau chu anung mat kit’uvin. abonchauvin athun anunsah soh kit’uvin soh-in avulsoh tauve.
Chujouvin Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhungin hitin ati;
“Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye; keiman Egypt gam, kihenna ina kona napu napateu kahin puidoh chun amaho toh kitepna khat kana semin hitin kati.

’Kum gup alhinseh leh nangho amitakip’in nahenga hung kijohdoh kum gup sunga nangma lhacha pangsa Hebrew mi kiti tapou chu nacham lhatsah tei tei dingu, nangma kin abolnaa kona nacham lhatsah tei tei dingu ahi,’ kati ahi. Ahinla napu napateuvin kasei ana-ngai pouvin, anan jong eijah peh pouve.
Hijongle tunin nanghon lung nakheluvin, amitakip aheng akoma chamlhat thu aphong doh cheh-in keima mitmun adih chu abolun, keima mina kiminvo insung laitah a chun ka-angsunga kitepna nasemuvin ahi;

ahivangin nalhai kimvel leuvin ami jousen ama ama sohvul pasal hihen lang numei hijongleh amaho lungdei banga nacham lhatsah sau miho chu nanung matsoh heluvin, nathun nanunsah chehuvin, nasoh diuvin naumsah-un, hiti chun keima min nasuboh soh tauve.

Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Nangho amitakip hin asopi leh aheng akom henga chamlhat thu phondohna dingin keima thusei nangai pouvin ahi; neihin vetan, keiman nangho henga chemjam acham chama ahung hat’a, gamna hise ahung lana, kel ahung lhahna dingin kaphongdoh-e, tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Keiman nangho hi leiset lenggam jouse dinga kidah dah uma kasem ding nahiuve.
Chule keima kitepna sukeh a keima angsunga asemdohsau kitepna dan ho nitlou ho chu, bong nou kihapsat jeng tobanga, akah a mi kijot pai hel theiya,
Judah gam leng chapate, Jerusalema leng chapate, nukiso ho, thempuho, chule gamsunga mipi jouse bong nou kihapsat kah a kijot pai thei banga,
keiman amaho hi amelmateu khut le amaho tha dinga holte khut’a kapehdoh ding ahiuve. Athisa alongu chunga leng vachate leh tola gamsahon neh le chah a anei dingu ahi.
Chujongleh Juda lengpa Zedeki’ah leh aleng chapate chu keiman amelmateu khut leh amaho tha dinga holte khut’a, nanghoa kon a kinung tolsa Babylon lengpa sepaite khut’a kapeh doh ding ahi.

Neihin vetan, keiman thu kapeh a amaho chu hiche khopia hi kahin lepui kit ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin, aseiyin: chutengleh amahon hiche khopi douna hi gal asat’uva alah diu, meiya ahalvam dingu ahi. Hita chu keiman Judah gam khopi jouse chu acheng beiya ahom keova kajam ding ahi,” ati.
Judah lengpa Josi’ah chapa Jehoi’akim nikholaiyin Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhungin hitin ati:
Re’chab ina chen lang amaho khu gakihou lim pin, chule abonchauvin Pakai insung dan khat pen pena khun hin puilut’in lang, chujou tengleh don dingin lengpitwi hompeh temin,” ati.
Hijeh chun keiman Habazzini’ah chapa Jeremiah chapa Ja-azani’ah le asopi pasal jouse toh, achapate ho leh Re’chab insung mite abonchauvin kapuiyin ahi.
Hichun keiman amaho chu kahin puiyin, Pathen mi Igdali’ah chapa Hanan indan sung, leng chapate indan toh kinaiya um, kotkhah bul ngahpa Shallum chapa Maasei’ah indan chung lama chun kahin puilut tai.
Chuin keiman Re’chab mite angsunga chun lengpitwi hailen tah tah tampi katunpeh-in, khon kakoipeh chehin, chule ajah-uva, “Lengpitwi hi donuvin,” kati.
Ahivangin amahon “Keihon lengpitwi don pouvinge, ajeh chu kapuu Re’chab pa Jon’adab chun keiho eithupeh-uvin, ‘Nangho nahiuvin nachapate ahiuvin, aitih a lengpitwi nadon louhel dingu ahi;

nanghon in jong nasah lou dingu; muchi jong natu lou dingu, lengpilei hon naboluva nei jong nanei lou diu; amavang nahinkho lhum keiyuva ponbuh ho jenga nachenuva, hita chu nakhopemna gamsunguva nikho tamtah nachen dingu ahi,’ eitiuve.

Keihon vang kapuu Re’chab chapa Jon’adab thusei, keiho eithupeh chengseu, kahinkho lhum keiyuva lengpitwi don lou ding, keiho kahiuva kajinuteu ahiuva, chule kachapateu leh kachanuteu ahiuva kanit soh keiyuye,
chenna ding in tampi kisah louding geiyin, Keihon lengpilei hon jong, loumun jong chule muchi jong kanei pouve;
ponbuh sung dung jenga kacheng uvin, hiti chun kapau Jon’adab in eithupeh chengse kanit cheh-uvin kabolsoh keiyuve.

Ahivangin Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar chu gamsung kidoupi dinga ahung phat’in keihon, ‘Hunguvin Chalde’a mite sepaiho ginna le Syria mite sepaiho ginnan Jerusalem lama chetau hite,’ katiuvin, hitobang chun Jerusalem kimvela kachenguvin ahi,” atiuve.
Chujouvin Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye; chen lang Judah mite leh Jerusalema chengte jah a hitin gaseiyin, ‘Nanghon hilchahna hi nasan loudiu hiya, chule kathuseiho hi ngaisah a nanei loudiu ham?’ tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Re’chab chapa Jon’adab’in achapate thu anapehsa, lengpitwi donlou ding chu anit jingun amaho khat chan jong tuni geiyin adon pouve; ijeh-inem itileh amahon apau thupeh chu anit’u ahiye. Keiman nangho henga tat le tat louvin thu kasei jing jengin, ahinla nanghon kathusei nangai pouve.

Keiman nangho henga kalhacha themgaoho kahinsolin, tat le tat louvin amaho chu nahenguva kahinsol jing jengin hitin kati, ‘Amitakip ama ama thilse bolna kon cheh-in hung kilehei kit’uvin lang chule natohset chengseu kisem phat cheh-uvin, pathen chom chom ho kinbol dingin hiche henga chun che hih-uvin, chuti hen lang hileh keiman napu napateu kapehsa gamsunga chu nachen dingu ahi,’ kati sah-in ahi. Ahivangin nanghon nanakhang nahindo pouvin, ngaisah a neidin jong neigel pouve.
Re’chab chapa Jon’adab chapaten apauvin amaho athupeh chua nit nauvin, hiche miten vang keima thusei angaipouve.

Hijeh chun hitin aseiye Pakai, thaneipen Pakai Israel Pathenin; Neihin vetan, keiman Judah chungle Jerusalema chengte chunga adouna thilse kaphondohsa chengse kahin lhunsah-in ahi; ipijeh inem itileh keiman ahenguva thu kaseiyin, amahon la angai deh pouvin, keiman kakouvin amahonla eidonbut pouvin ahi,” ati.

Re’chab mite insung jah a vang chun Jeremiah chun aseitan, “Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Nanghon napau Jon’adab thupeh nangaiyuva chule ama danthu jouse nanit’uva nathupeh jouseu naboldoh jeh-u hin,
thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Re’chab chapa Jon’adab chu itih chana keima angsunga ding jinga mihem lhasam louhel ding ahi.” ati.
Judah lengpa Josi’ah chapa Jehoi’akim leng chan kal kum li lhin kum chun Pakaiya konin thu ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Nangman lekhajol khat kilah-in lang Josi’ah lal laiya pat tuni geiya keiman Israel le Judah douna chule namtin vaipi douna kathusei, nahenga kasei jouse hi jih lut’in.
Chutengleh Judah insung hin achunguva kathilse bolgot hi kijah doh-uvin tin, athilse lampi cheh a konin hung kihei manguvin tin, athemmonau leh achonsetnau ka ngaidam ding ahi’ ati.
Chuphat’in Jeremiah chun Neri’ah chapa Baruch chu akouvin, Pakaiyin ahenga ahinsei thu ho chu abonchan akamin aseithon, Baruch-in jong akhut’in lekhajol chunga chun ajih lut thoi.
Jeremiah chun Baruch chu thu apen hitin ati, “Keima hi Pakai insunga kache ding akikhah tai;

hijeh a chu nangma nachea, an ngol nikho khat leh Pakai insung mitin namtin jah din, Pakai thusei keiman kasei thoa nangin lekhajol sunga najih lut chengse chu aboncha naga simdoh peh ding ahi. Chujongle nangma man hicheng chu Judah mi, akhopi jouseuva kona hungdoh ho chu nasimpeh ding ahi.

Chutileh ataonau Pakai angsunga hung lhungin tin, chutengle abon chauva lamse lama kona kihei mang ding ahiuve, ajeh chu Pakaiyin hiche mite douna aphondoh lunghan le lungsat chu anasa behseh jengin ahi.” ati.
Hichun Neri’ah chapa Baruch chun Jeremiah themgaopan athupeh jouse, Pakai insunga Pakai thusei lekhajol sunga kijihlut chengse simdoh ding ati ima chu, abonchan abolsoh keiyin ahitai.
Judah lengpa Josi’ah chapa Jehoi’akim leng chan kal kum nga lhin kum lha ko lhin nan Jerusalema um mipi le Judah khopi tina kon mipi jousen Pakaiya an-ngol ding tin aphongdoh tauve.

Chutah chun mipi jouse nabeng sung tah, Pakai insunga lekha sunpa Shaphan chapa Gemari’ah indan sung, lhong chungnunga Pakai insunga lutna kelkot thah laiya chun, Baruch chun lekhajol sunga konin Jeremiah thusei ho abonchan asimdoh soh helin ahi.
Shaphan chapa Gemari’ah chapa Micai’ah chun lekhajol sunga kona Pakai thusei ho chu aboncha ajahdoh phat’in,

Lengpa insunga lekha sunpa indan sunga agachesuh-in ahileh, hikoma chun milen milal abonchauvin, Eli’shama lekhasunpa ahin, Shemai’ah chapa Delai’ah ahin, Achbor chapa Elna’than ahin, Shaphan chapa Gemari’ah ahin, Hanani’ah chapa Zedeki’ah ahin hikoma chun anatou cheh-uvin ahi.
Chuin Micai’ah chun amaho abonchauvin, mipi jah ding a Baruch-in lekhajol asimdoh pet’ a athujah chengse, abonchan aseipeh soh keiyin ahi.

Hichun milen milalten Cushi chapa Shelemi’ah chapa, Nethani’ah chapa Jehu’di chu Baruch henga thu gaseiya. “Mipi jah dinga nangman nasimdoh lekhajol chu nakhut’in kilah-in lang chule hungin.” tia seipeh dingin asol tauve. Hijeh chun Neri’ah chapa Baruch chun lekhajol chu akhut’a ahin kichoiyin amaho henga ahungtai.
Chuphat’in amahon ajah a, “Touvin lang hiche chu keiho jah dingin simin” atiuleh, Baruch jong chun anabenguva hiche chu asimpeh tai.
Chuin amahon thu hichengpi chu ajauvin ahileh kicha tah-in khat le khat akiveto to jenguve; hijeh chun Baruch jah a, “Thu hijatpi hi keihon lengpa henga kagasei peh tei tei dingu ahibouve” atiuve.
Chujongle amahon Baruch chu adonguvin hitin atiuve. ‘Thu hichengpi hi iti nasut ham?” atiuva ahileh;
Baruch chun amaho jah a, ” Jeremiah-in thu hichengpi hi kajah a aseitho pettah a keiman lekhajol a chu lekhatwiya kajihlut ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in milen milal ho chun Baruch jah a, “Chen lang gakisel tan, nangma nahin Jeremiah ahin, hoiya um nahi lhon chu koimacha hetsah lhon hih helin,” atiuvin ahi.
Amaho chu lengpa insunga alut’uvin, lekhajol chu lekhasunpa Eli’shama indana akoitauve; chule athu jouse chu lengpa heng alhut tauvin ahi.

Chuphat’ in lengpan jong lekhajol ladingin Jehu’di chu asolin ahileh, amapan hiche chu lekhasunpa Eli’shama indana konin agalatai; chuin Jehu’din hiche chu lengpa le avela ding milen milal ho henga asimdoh tai.
Hiche lai chu lha ko lhin lha ahitan lengpa jong chu phalbi insunga anatouvin, amasanga chun meibel sunga mei anakitin ahiye.

Hichun ahitin ahi. Jehu’din lekhajol chu jol thum jol li asimin ahileh lengpan aboncha chun chemcha neo khat’in a attel jengin, meibel sunga meikong lah a chun aleh lut’in, meikong chun akahvam hel kahsen lekhajol chu akatai.
Ahivangin lengpa ahin, asohte sen thu hichengpi japha ho chu ahiuvin khat cha jong akicha a aponsil ho bottel jenga aumpouve.
Amavang Elna’than le Delai’ah, chule Gemari’ah hicheng chun lengpa chu lekhajol ahalvam louna dingin ajoluvin ahivangin aman la athuseiyu angaipeh tapoi.

Chujongleh lengpan lengpa chapa Jerah’meelle Az’re-el chapa Serai’ah toh Abdeel chapa Shelemi’ah chu lekhasunpa Baruch le Jeremiah themgaopa mandoh dingin thu apetai, ahivangin Pakaiyin amani chu anaselin ahi.
Lengpan, Jeremiah-in aseithoa Baruch-in thu tamtah anasut lutna lekhajol ahalvam nungin Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Nangman lekhajol khat kilah kit’in lang Judah lengpa Jehoi’akimin ahalvamsa lekhajol masaa kisun thu masaho chu abonchan jihdoh soh keiyin.

Chule Judah lengpa Jehoi’akim chung thudola hi nangman naseiya, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, nangman hiche lekhajol hi nahalvamin naseiye, “Ipi dinga nangman hiche sunga chu Babylon lengpa thon louhela hung kona hiche gam hi asuh manga, asunga um mihem le gancha asuhgam ding ahi, tia nasut ham?” nati.

Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin Judah lengpa Jehoi’akim chung chang thudola hitin aseiye, ama hin David laltouna tou ding koimacha anei louhel ding, atahsa thilong jong sun nisa noiya hung kipai doh a, jan daitwi adou ding ahi.

Chule athemmonau jala ama jong, ason achilhah te jong chule asohte jong talen kapeh ding; keiman Jerusalema chengte chungle Judah mite jouse chunga amaho douna thilse kaphondohsa chengse chu kahin lhut khum ding ahiuvin, ahinla amahon ngaisah-in aneideh pouve,’ ati tin aseiye, tin, sunin,” ati.

Hijeh chun Jeremiah-in lekhajol achom khat alan, Neri’ah chapa danthu lekha thempa Baruch chu apen, amapan jong hiche sunga chun Jeremiah thuseihoa konin Judah lengpa Jehoi’akimin meiya ahalvamsa lekhajola thucheng ho chu abonchan ajih doh son soh helin ahi; hicheho lah a chun akibah pi thucheng tampi jong akigop ben ahi.
Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar in Judah gamsunga lenga atun Zedeki’ah chun Jehoi’akim chapa Coni’ah khelin lengvai potai.
Ahinla ama ahin, asohte ahin, agamsung mite ahiuvin Pakaiyin themgaopa Jeremiah henga thu ahin seiji ho chu ngaisah-in ananei pouve.

Hichun Zedeki’ah lengpan Shelemi’ah chapa Jehu’cal le Ma-asei’ah chapa, thempupa Zephani’ah chu Jeremiah themgaopa henga asolin hitin agati sah-e, “Keiho dingin Pakai, I-Pathenu henga nei taopeh-uvin,” atisah-e.
Hichepet chun Jeremiah jong songkul a akihen loulai jeh-in mipi lah a anom lhat len alut le apot le nalaiyin ahi.
Pharaoh sepaite jong Egypt gama konin ahung kondoh tauve; hiche thu kithang chu Chalde’a mite Jerusalem khopi delkhum ho chun ajah doh phat’uvin Jerusalema konin akinung tol kit tauve.
Chujouvin Jeremiah themgaopa henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, Keima eidong dinga kahenga nahin solpa Judah lengpa jah a chun hitin seiyin, Vetan nangho panpi dinga hung Pharaoh sepaite khu amaho cham tah a agam langu Egypt a kilekit ding ahiuve.
Chutengleh Chalde’a mite chu hung kit’uvin tin hiche khopi douna hi gal ahinsat kit dingu ahi; akhopi hi kilah uvin tin meiya ahalvam dingu ahitai.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, nangho le nangho kilhem lhauvin lang hiti hin, “Chalde’a mite chu keihoa kona kitol mang tei tei ding ahiuve,” ti dauvin, ajeh chu amaho kitolmang louhel ding ahiuve.

Ijeh-inem itileh nangho douna galsat Chalde’a mite sepai ho hi apumpia najo heluva, alah-uva amapu chengse bou um dena aponbuh cheh a ki umthip ding hijongleu, hiche ho chu hung thoudoh-uvin tin hiche khopi hi meiya ahalvam jeng dingu ahi,’ tia nasei ding ahi,” ati.
Pharaoh sepaite hung nailam jeh a Chalde’a mite sepaiho chu Jerusalema kona akitol mang phat’uvin,
Jeremiah jong chu Jerus’alem a konin akipatdoh-in Benjamin gamsunga mipi lah a ama chan ding kisan din akigotai.

Ama chu Benjamin kelkot’a aum pet’in chukoma kot-ngah a ding khat, amin Iri’jah kitipa, Shelemi’ah chapa, Hanani’ah chapa chun Jeremiah themgaopa chu amanin hitin ati, “Nangma Chalde’a mite henga jam nahi,” ati.

Ahin Jeremiah chun, “Jou ahibouve, keima Chalde’a mite henga jam kahipoi,” ati. Ahivang chun Iri’jah kitipan ama thusei chu ngaisah-in aneipon, hiti chun Jeremiah chu amanin milen milalte henga ahin kailut tai.

Hitah chun milen milalte chu Jeremiah chunga alung hangjah jenguvin, Jeremiah chu voh-a tin avouvin, lekha sunpa Jonathan insunga chun songkula akhum tauve, ajeh chu hichelai chu songkula kisemah ahitai.
Jeremiah chu songkula ahung lut’a chule nisot tah aum phat’in,

Zedeki’ah lengpan ama kou dingin mi asolin, hiti chun Jeremiah chu akimupin ahi. Lengpan ama chu ainsunga guhthim chan adongin, “Pakaiya kona thu kisei um kham?” atileh; Jeremiah-in jong ajah a, “Aumnai,” atin, “Nangma Babylon lengpa khut’a nakipedoh ding ahitai,” tin aseipeh tai.
Zedeki’ah lengpa jah a chun Jeremiah chun, “Keiman ipi thil dih lou, nangma douna hihen nasohte douna hileh chule hiche mite douna hijongle, kabol khah a nangman songkula neikhum ham?
Hoiya ba umah hitauvam, nathemgaoho nangma jah a, ‘Nangma dou dingle hiche gamsung dou dingin Babylon lengpa hung ponte,’ tia gauthu seiji ho chu?

Tun khongai temin, Vo kapu lengpa nahenga katao ahi, keima lungnem a katao na hi na-angsunga lutsah tei teiyin, lekhasunpa Jonathan ina khun nei nung sol kit hih helin, achuti loule hikoma khu kathiden pai tahbeh ding ahiye,” ati.

Hijeh chun Zedeki’ah lengpan thu apen, hiti chun amahon Jeremiah chu in-ngahpa insunga chun akoiyuvin, niseh le khopi sunga changlhah abeihel kahsen, changlhah semho lamlen langa konin chang lhah pheng khat’ in Jeremiah chu avah jing jeng tauve. Hiti chun Jeremiah chu in-ngahpa insunga chun aumdentai.
Mattan chapa Shephati’ah ahin, Pashhur chapa Gadali’ah ahin, Shelemi’ah chapa Jucal ahin, Malehi’ah chapa Pashhur ahin Jeremiah hin mipi jouse jah a thu anasei jing jeng chu ajauvin.

“Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, koi hileh hiche khopi sunga umden pa chu chemjam a thia chule gamna hisea gam ding ahi, amavang koi hileh Chalde’a mite henga galut vang chu hing ding ahi; ahinkho chu gallaiya kichudoh tobanga anei ding, hijeh a chu hing doh ding ahi.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, hiche khopi hi Babylon sepaite khut’a kipedoh tei tei ding, chujeh a chu akilah ding ahi,” tia anaseiji chu.

Hichun leng chapaten lengpa jah a chun, “Hiche mipa hi that jengin, ajeh chu aman hiche khopi sunga kidalha a sepaite le mipi jouse hi thu hitobang bang hi aseiyin abanthau angoisah gamtai. Ijeh-inem itileh hichepa hin hiche mite khantouna ding asei ahipoi, akisuhmona dingu aseijoh ahibouve” atiuve.
Hichun Zedeki’ah lengpan, “Vetan ama khu nangho khut’a um ahi, lengpan nangho douna imacha abol thei louhel ding ahi,” tin aseitai.

Hijeh chun amahon Jeremiah chu aman uvin in-ngahpa inkoma lengpa chapa Malehi’ah twikul sunga chun Jeremiah chu khaovin akhai lhasuh tauve. Twikul sunga chun twi anaum pon, bonlhoh jengbou anaumin ahi, hijeh chun Jeremiah chu bonlhoh lah a chun alhalut tai.
Ahin lengpa insunga um Ethiopia mi E’bed-mel’ech nukisopan Jeremiah chu twikul sunga aleh lut tauve, ti ajatan, hichepet chun lengpa jong Benjamin kelkot’a anatouvin ahi.
Hijeh chun E’bed-mel’ech jong lengpa ina konin apotdoh-in lengpa jah a chun thu agaseiyin,

“Kapu lengpa, hiche miho hin thilse khat aboltauve, Jeremiah themgaopa chu amahon twikul sunga aleh lut tauve, hikoma chu ama gilkela thi den ding ahitai, ajeh chu khopi sung jenga jong changlhah kikhen louhel ahitai,” agati.
Chuphat’in lengpan Ethiopia mi E’bed-mel’ech chu thu apen hitin ati, “Hikoma konin mi thum kipuiyin lang, Jeremiah themgaopa chu athi masangin twikul sunga konin gakai doh tauvin,” ati.

Hijeh chun E’bed-mel’ech-in jong mi thum akipuiyin lengpa ina thil kholna insunga pon kikoina a chun achen ponluisa leh ehsa ho chu agalan, hiche ho chu twikul sunga Jeremiah henga chun khaovin agah khailhan ahi.
Hichun Ethiopia mi E’bed-mel’ech chun Jeremiah henga, “Hiche ponluisa ho leh pon ehsa ho hi najah noi teni leh khaojang ho kah a chun jep’in,” ati. Jeremiah-in chutobang chun aboltai.
Hichun amahon twikul sunga konin Jeremiah chu khao jang ho chun akaidoh-uvin, Jeremiah jong chu in-ngahpa insunga aumdentai.

Lengpa Zedeki’ah chun Jeremiah themgaopa kou dingin mi asolin, Pakai houina lutna kot thum lhinna a chun ana kimupin ahi. Lengpan Jeremiah jah a chun, “keiman thu khat nadong inge, kahenga imacha imhih beh-in” ati.
Jeremiah-in Zedeki’ah jah a, “Keiman kaseipeh a ahileh neitha louhel ding hinam?” Amongin jong keiman nahil jong leng nangin la na-ngaideh louhel ding ahi” ati.

Chuphat’in lengpa Zedeki’ah chu guhthimin Jeremiah henga akihahsel in, “Eiho hinkho jouse semdoh Pakai hing jing ahin, keiman nathat pong ting, tha dinga nahol hiche miho khut’a jong hi kapeh doh louhel ding nahi” ati.

Hichun Jeremiah-in Zedeki’ah henga, “Pakai, thaneipen Pathenin hitin aseiye, nangma Babylon leng chapate henga nalut pou pouva ahileh, nakihing hoiyin tin, hiche khopi jong meiya kihal vam leu ding, chule nangle na-insung jong nahin doh ding ahi.
Amavang Babylon leng chapate henga nalut louva ahileh hiche khopi hi Chalde’a mite khut’a kipedoh a, amahon meiya ahalvam dingu, chule nangma jeng jong amaho khut’a najamdoh louhel ding ahi” ati.
Chuphat’in lengpa Zedeki’ah-in Jeremiah henga, “Keiman Chalde’a mite khut’a lutsa Judah mite khu kakichai, achuti louleh keima amaho khut’a eikipedoh intin, amahon eihouset diu ahiye,” ati.

Ahivangin Jeremiah-in, “Nangma hiche mite khut’a khu naki pedoh louhel ding ahi. Keiman nang jah a kaseipeh Pakai ogin hi ngaiyin, hiche nang dinga phapen ding ahin, chutileh nangma nakihing hoi ding ahiye.
Amavang lut ding nadaa ahileh, Pakaiyin keima eivetsah mu kanei chu hiche hi ahi:

Hijeh chun vetan, Judah lengpa insung numei kidalha chengse chu abon chauvin Babylon lengpa leng chapate henga akipuidoh-uvin, “Vetan, nagin chat tah tah nagol ngaihon Nangma nalhem lhauvin; Hijeh chun amahon nangma najotho tauvin, Nakeng teni jong bonlhoh lah a alut tan, Amaho nang henga konin Akihei mangsoh hel tauve” ati.

Hita chu najiteu leh nachapateu Chalde’a mite henga akipui lut diu, nangma jeng jong amaho khut’a najamdoh louhel ding, Babylon lengpan nakimat ding; chutengleh hiche khopi jong hi meiya kihalvam ding ahi.” ati.
Hichun Zedeki’ah-in Jeremiah jah a, “Hiche thu ho hi koimacha hetsah hih helin, nangma vang nathi lou ding ahi.

Ijem tin leng chapaten nahenga kahunga kaki houlimpi hi jadoh uhen lang, nahenga hungu hen najah a, “Nangman lengpa jah a chu ipi naseiya chule lengpan nang jah a ipi aseiyam; keiho henga imacha im nei hih helin, keihon nangma nathat pouvinge” tin seitau leh,
nangin amaho jah a chu, ‘Keiman lengpa henga chun Jonathan ina einung sol kit’a khukoma kathi den louna dingin lungnem tah a taona kanei ahi.’ tia nasei ding ahi” ati.

Hichun leng chapate abonchauvin Jeremiah henga ahunguvin amapa chu ahung donguvin ahileh, aman jong amaho chu lengpan aseipeh bang bangin adonbut tai. Hijeh chun akihouna lhon ahetdoh lou phat’uvin amahon jong Jeremiah chu akihoupi datauve.
Hiti chun Jerusalem galin alah nikho geiyin Jeremiah chu in-ngahpa insunga chun aumden tan ahi.
Judah lengpa Zedekiah leng chan kal kum ko lhin kum, lha som lhin nin Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar le asepaite Jerusalem sat dingin ahung konuvin, ahin umkhum tauve;
Zedeki’ah leng chan kal kum som le kum khat lhin kum, lha li channa chuche lha, ni ko lhinnin, khopi sung chu mun khat akivokeh tai.

Jerusalem alah phat’uvin Babylon lengpa, leng chapate abon chauvin kelkot lailha pena chun atou tauve: amaho chu Ner’gal-share’zer ahin, Sam’gar-ne’bo ahin, Sar’sechim leh Rab’saris ahin, Ner’gal-share’zer kiti Rabmag toh, Babylon lengpa vaihomho adang dang toh ahiuve.

Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah le asepai ho jousen amaho chu amudoh phat’uvin abonchan ajamdoh-uvin, jan laiyin khopia konin apotdoh-uvin, lengpa honlei lampia acheuvin pal teni kah a kelkot chu ajot paijel tauve; hiti chun Arabah lampi langa achetauve.

Ahivangin Chalde’a mite sepaihon amaho chu anung deluvin, Zedeki’ah chu Jericho phaicham dunga aphapa tauve; amahon Zedekiah chu amat phat’uvin Hamath gamsunga Riblah kiti laiya chun Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar henga ahin puilut tauve; hichun a man achunga thu atantai.
Babylon lengpan Zedeki’ah chapate chu amapa mitmu tah-in Riblah muna chun athat gamtai; hiti chun Babylon lengpan Judah milen milalte chu abonchan athat gamtan ahi.
Aman Zedeki’ah chu amit teni akaldoh-in, Babylon gama pui dingin thih khaovin ahentai.
Chalde’a miten lengpa in leh mipi in ho chu meiyin ahal vamuvin, Jerusalem pal jouse chu avolhu gamtauvin ahi.

Chuin Nebu’zarad’an, in-ngah lamkaipan, khopi sunga kidalha mipi amoh chengse chu Babylon gamsunga sohchang dingin akai mangtai, ama henga hunglut chengse leh chukoma anaum den mipi chengse chu ahiuve.
Nebu’zarad’an, in-ngah lamkaipan, Judah gamsunga chun mivaicha imacha neilou ho chu adalhan, amaho chu lengpilei hon ho leh loumun tampi apen ahi.
Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar chun Jeremiah chung chang thudol, in ngah lamkaipa, Nebu’zarad’an kitipa chu thu apen hitin ati;
“Ama hi puiyin lang, phatah-in khohsah-in lang, bolse hih hel in, aman najah a naseipeh bang bangin jenin,” ati.
Hijeh chun Nebu’zarad’-an in-ngah lamkaipa ahin, Nebushaz’ban ahin, Rab’saris ho ahiuvin, Ner’gal-share’ zer kiti Rabmag ahin, chule Babylon lengpa vaihom lamkai cheh chun,

mi asoluvin in-ngahpa ina kon chun Jeremiah chu agapuidoh sah tauve. Amaho chun Jeremiah ve dingin Shaphan chapa, Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah chu angan seuvin, aman amapa chu inlama apui dingin akoitauve. Hiti chun Jeremiah amite lah a achengtai.
In-ngahpa ina akihen pet chun Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Chen lang Ethiopia mi E’bed-mel’ech henga hitin gaseiyin, “Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman hiche khopi dounaa hi thilse kahin bol ding, thilpha hilou ding ahi, chule aboncha chu hiche nikho chuleh nangma masang tah a kimolso soh hel ding ahiuve.
Ahivangin hiche nikho chuleh keiman nangma kahuhdoh ding nahin, nangman nakichat jing miho khut’a kapehdoh lou ding nahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Ijeh-inem itileh keiman nangma kahuhhing tei tei ding, nangma chemjama nalou louhel ding ahi; hintin nangman nahinkho chu gallaiya kichom doh banga nanei ding ahi, ajeh chu nangman kei chunga natahsanna nakoi jinge,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye, ati.
Babylon gama sohchang dinga Jerusalem mite leh Judah mite toh thih khaova akana in-ngah lamkaipa Nebu’zarad’anin Ramah khoa kona ana sol nungin Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhungin ahi.
In-ngah lamkaipan Jeremiah chu akouvin ajah a, ‘Pakai, na-Pathenin hiche lai mun douna hin hiche thilse aphongdoh tai;
