Pakaiyin hiche chu ahin guilhunsah ding kon ahitan, aman asei banga chu abol ding ahitai. Ipijeh inem itileh nangho Pakai dounan na chonse tauvin, ama thusei nangai tapouve, hijeh a chu hiche thilse hi nachung uva hung lhung ahitai.

Chule tun vetan, keiman tunia pat’a nakhut tenia thih khaohoa kona chu kalhadoh nahitai. Keima toh kilhona Babylon langa che ding pha nasah joh a ahijongle hung jengin, keiman phatah-in nave jing nange; ahinla nang dinga Babylon gama hung ding adih louva ahijongleh hung da tan; ven, na masanga um gam leiset pumpi hi, nangman naphatsahna lam lam, nanadihsah lam lama che jengin.

Na-umden dinga ahileh Babylon lengpan Judah gam khopi jousea vaipo dinga apansah Shaphan, Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah henga chen lang ama chutoh mipi lah a cheng khom lhonin; ahilou jongleh nangman dih nasahna lam lama che jengin,” atipeh-e. Hiti chun in-ngah lamkaipan amapa chu neh ding kithopina them khat le thilpeh toh apen asol tai.
Hichun Jeremiah jong Mizpah khoa Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah henga achen amapa chutoh agamsunga kidalha den mipi ho chutoh acheng khomtauve.

Tollhanga um sepai lamkai jouse leh amiteu chun Babylon lengpan Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah chu gamsung vaipon apansah-in, ama khut’a chun pasal numei chule chapang, mi vaicha dehset ho Babylon gamsunga sohchanga kikai mang lou ho chu apelut tai, ti ajahdoh phat’uvin,

amaho chu Mizpah khoa Gedali’ah henga achetauve, Ish’mael Nethani’ah chapa ahin, Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan ahin, Tan’humeth chapa Serai’ah ahin, Netoph’ath mi Ephai chapate ahiuvin, Ma-ac’ath mi chapa Jezani’ah ahin, amaho chengse leh amite ahiuve.

Shaphan chapa, Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah chu amaho leh amiteu henga akihahselin aseiye, “Chalde’a mite kinbol ding hi kicha hih-uvin. Gamsunga chenguvin lang Babylon lengpa kin bol jenguvin, chutileh nangho dinga pha jeng ding ahi.

Keima vang eiho henga hung lhung ding Chalde’a mite masanga ding dinga Mizpah khoa kachen ding ahi; nangho vang lengpitwi le nipilai thingga chule thao kikhol khomuvin lang hiche ho chu bel sung dunga kikoiyuvin, chutengleh nachenphau khopi dunga chun chengtauvin,” ati.

Hitobang chun Judah mite jouse, Moab gama Ammon mite lah a um ho ahiuvin, Edom gamsung le gam dang danga um ho ahiuvin Babylon lengpan Judah gamsunga mi amoh phabep adalhan, Shaphan chapa, Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah chu gam vaipon apansah tai, ti ajah doh phat’uvin,
Juda mite abonchauvin anakidel mang nau gamsunga konin Judah gamsunga Mizpah khoa chun Gedali’ah henga ahung tauve; amahon lengpitwi leh nipilai thingga thalhingset’in akikhop khomuvin ahi.
Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan le tollhanga sepai lamkai jouse chu Mizpah khoa Gedali’ah henga ahunguvin.

chule mipa jah a chun, “Ammon mite lengpa Ba’alis kitipan Nethani’ah chapa Ish’mael hi nangma that dinga ahinsol ahi, ti nahet lou mong mong ham?” atiuve. Ahinla Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah chun amaho chu atahsan hihbeh jengin ahi.

Chuphat’in Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan chun Mizpah khoa Gedali’ah henga guhthim chan thu agaseiyin, “Keima neisolin lang Nethani’ah chapa Ish’mael chu neiga thasah tan, koimachan he hih helin te. Ipi dinga aman natha a nakimvela hung kikhom Judah mite kithe cheh soh hela, Judah mi amoh chengse hi mangthah jeng ding ham?” ati.
Ahivangin Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah chun Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan jah a chun, “Nangman hiche hi nabol louhel ding ahi, ajeh chu nangman jou jouvin Ish’mael chung thu naseiye,” ati.

Lha sagi lhin nin leng insunga mi lah a Eli’shama chapa Nethani’ah chapa Ish’mael, lengpa dinga vaihom pipui ho lah a mi khat chu, Mizpah khoa Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah henga chun mi pasal som khat toh kilhonin ahung tai. Amahon Mizpah khoa chu changlhah aneh khom pet’uvin.

Nethani’ah chapa Ish’mael leh amatoh hung kilhon pasal som khat chu akipatdoh-uvin. Babylon lengpan gamsunga vaipoa apansahpa, Shaphan chapa, Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah chu chemjamin asat lhuuvin athat tauve.
Ish’mael chun Mizpah khoa Gedali’ah toh umkhom Judah mite jouse leh chukoma ana umkha Chalde’a mite sepai ho chu athat gamhel tai.
Gedali’ah kitha ni ajing nikho, koimachan jong ahetdoh masangin,

Shechem khoa konle Shiloh khoa kon chule Samar’ia khoa konin pasal get anemul kivou tolsa cheh, aponsilu jong ehgamta atahsau jong mapu cheh chuh jeng ahiuvin, amaho chun Pakai houina to dingin chang thilto leh gimnamtui thilto ding choiyin ahung lhung tauve.

Mizpah khoa kon chun Nethani’ah chapa lsh’mael chu amaho kimuto pi dingin akap pum pumin ahungdoh-in ahi. Amaho akimutopi phat chun aman jong ajah-uva. “Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah henga hung lut’uvin,” ati.
Chuta amaho khopi sunga ahung lut phat uvin Nethani’ah chapa Ish’mael leh aumpi miho chun amaho chu athat gamuvin, twikul sunga aleh lut tauve.

Ahin amaho lah a chun mi som khat’in lsh’mael jah a chun, “Neithat hih-uvin, ijeh-inem itileh keihon loujao dunga khun suhlou chang tampi leh sakol chang, thao chule khoiyu kaseluvin ahi,” atiuve. Hijeh chun ama jong ahaiyin, aloi agolteu toh atha tha pon ahi.

Ish’mael in amitha ho tahsa alelutna twikul chu twikul lentah ahin, Asa lengpan Israel lengpa Ba’asha douna dinga anasem ahi; hiche chu Nethani’ah chapa Ish’mael chun amitha ho chu adipset jengin ahi.

Hichun lsh’mael in Mizpah khoa um mipi amoh chengse, lengpa chanute ahiuvin, mipi abon chauva Mizpah khoa dalhah a um chengse, in-ngah lamkaipa Nebu’zarad’anin Ahi’kam chapa Gedeli’ah khut’a apehdoh chengse chu sohchang dingin akaitan ahi. Nethani’ah chapa Ish’mael in amaho chu sohchang dingin akaiyin Ammon mite gam khokhel peh dingin akipatdoh tai.
Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan le sepai lamkai a koma umjousen Nethaniah chapa Ish’mael thilse bol chengse chu ajahdoh phat’uvin,
amite abonchan akipuiyuvin Nethani’ah chapa Ish’mael sat dingin achetauve. Amaho chun Gib’eon muna twikul len muna chun amapa alonvuh jeng tauve.
Hichea chun Ish’mael toh ana-umkhom mipi chun abon chauva Joha’nan Kare’ah chapa leh sepai lamkai jouse toh ahung kilhon chu amudoh phat’ uvin akipah-uvin ahi.
Hijeh chun lsh’mael in Mizpah khoa pat’a sohchang dinga anakai mang mipi chu abon chauvin ahung kinung hei cheh-uvin Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan henga ahung cheh tauve.
Ahivangin Ish’mael Nethani’ah chapa chun mi get akipuiyin Joha’nan a konin ajamdoh-in, Ammon mite heng lam ajontai.

Hichun Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan le amapa toh kilhon sepai lamkai jousen Mizpah khoa kona Nethani’ah chapa lsh’maelin Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah anatha nunga anakai mangsa mipi amoh chengse chu sepaiho ahin, numeiho ahiuvin, chapang ho leh nukiso ho geiyin akimat khomuvin, Joha’nanin amaho chu Gib’eon muna konin ahin nung puitai.
Amaho chu acheuvin Egypt gam jon dingin Bethlehem koma Geruth Chimhama chun akicholdo tauve.
Chalde’a mite jalin; ijeh-inem itileh amaho chu akichat’u ahiye; ajeh pentah vang chu Babylon lengpan gamvaipo dinga apansah pa Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah chu Ish’mael in anatha jeh ahipen e.
Sepai jouse galsat thu neiya pang ho leh Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan ahin, chule mipi aneo alen geiyin ahung nailut’uvin,

Jeremiah themgaopa henga chun, “Kathil thumu hi nangma angsunga lutsah-in lang chule Pakai na-Pathen henga chun neitaokop peh-uvin, ajeh chu hicheng amoh cheng namu banga hi tamtah lah a kona themcha bou dalhah a umah kahitauve,
chutile Pakai naPathenin keiho chena ding lampi eihiluvin tin kabol diu eiseipeh diu ahi,” atiuve.

Hichun Jeremiah themgaopan amaho jah a, “Keiman nangho thusei kajatai; neihin vetan, keima nangho thumna dung juiyin Pakai na-Pathenu henga tao ving ting, ipi hijongleh Pakaiyin nahin donbut chanu chu naseipeh nauvinge; keiman imacha na-impeh pou vinge,” ati.
Chuphat’in amahon Jeremiah jah a chun “Keihon keiho dinga Pakai na-Pathenin nang koma ahinsei thu abang banga katoh louvuva ahileh Pakai chu adih tah le kitah tah-in sakhin pang jeng hen.
Thilpha hihen lang thilse hijongleh keihon ama henga dia kasolnau Pakai ka-Pathenu ogin chu ngai jengu vinge, chutileh Pakai ka-Pathenu ogin ka-ngaiyu chu keiho dinga phajo ding ahi,” atiuve.
Nisom kichai nungin Jeremiah henga Pakai thu ahungtai.
Chuphat’in aman jong Kare’ah chapa Joha ‘nan leh sepaite galsatna thu neiya pang jouse amatoh umkhom ho ahiuvin chule mipi abon chauva aneo penna pat alen pen geiyin akousoh keiyin,
chule amaho jah a chun, “Pakai Israel Pathen ama angsunga nangho thil thum galhut dinga neisolna pau chun hitin aseiye:

Nangho hiche gamsunga hi nachen den mong monguva ahileh keiman katundoh ding kasuh lhuh louhel ding nahiuve; keiman naphutdet uving ting kabo doh louhel ding nahiuve; ajeh chu nangho chunga thilse kabol kalung kakhel tan ahi.
Nanghon naginu Babylon lengpa chu kicha hih-uvin; amapa chu kicha hih-uvin akhut’a nangho huhhing dingle huhdoh dingin keiman kaumpi nauve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Keiman hepina kapeh dingu hita chu aman nangho chunga hepina anei theiya, nangho gamsung ma ma nachen den sahna dinguvin.
Amavang nanghon, ‘Keiho hiche gamsunga hin cheng pouvinge,’ tia Pakai na-Pathenu thusei na ngaidauva,

hita natiuva, ‘Ahipoi, keiho Egypt gama cheuvinge, hikoma chu gal kisat kamu khah louna dinguleh sumkon gin kajah khah louna dingu, kagilkel kit louna dinguvin, chule hikoma khu gacheng den dingin,’ natiuleh,
tun Pakai thusei hi ngai temuvin Vo Judah mi amoh cheng; Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye; nangho Egypt gama lut dinga namai nangat’uva chule khukoma cheng dinga nacheuva ahileh,

chutengleh Egypt gama chu nagin jingu chemjamin nahin phah dingu ahin, Egypt gam geiya nakichat jingu kel chun hat tah a nanungu ahin juipeh ding ahi; chutengle chun hikoma chu nangho nathi dingu ahitai.

Hita chu Egypt gama cheng dinga kiheiya che ding kigo miho jouse chemjama louvuva, gilkela thidiu, chule gamna hisea gam ding ahiuve; keiman achunguva kahin lhut khum ding thilsea kona chu amoh le ahing doh um louhel ding ahiuve.

“Ijeh-inem itileh thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye: kalunghan le kalungsatna Jerusalema chengte chunga akibuh lhah jeng banga chu nangho Egypt gama nache tenguleh kalungsatna nachunguva kisung lha jeng ding ahi. Nangho thet umtah le kidah tah, gaosap chang, chule houset’a naum doh dingu; hiche mun hi namu kit louhel dingu ahitai.
Pakaiyin nangho jah a aseitai, Vo Judah mi amoh chengse, ‘Egypt gama che hih uvin,’ tin, Kichen tah-in kihet’uvin keiman nangho kagihsal nahiuve,

nangho nathi na dinguva vah cheh gam nahitauve. Ajeh chu nanghon keima Pakai na-Pathen henguva neina soluvin hitin natiuve, ‘Keiho dingin Pakai ka-Pathen henguva nei taopeh-uvin, ipi hijeng jongleh Pakai ka-Pathen uvin asei sei chu keiho henga phongdoh jengin hiche chu keihon boljengu vinge,’ natiuve.

Hijeh chun keiman tunin nangho henga hiche chu kaphongdoh tan, ahivangin nanghon Pakai na-Pathenu thusei chu ipi thudol hijongleh aman nangho seipeh dinga keima eihinsolna chung changa hin nangai tapouvin ahi.
Hijeh chun tun nanghon kichen tah-in kihet’uvin, nangho nacheuva nache nom na laitah-uva chu chemjama nalou uva, gilkela nathi dingu, gamna hisea nagam dingu ahi,” ati.
Jeremiah chun mipi jah a Pakai a-Pathenu thuseiho, Pakai a-Pathen uvin amaho seipeh dinga asol tha thuho chu aboncha aseipeh jouhel phat’-in,

Hoshai’ah chapa Azari’ah leh Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan toh chule mi louchal ho se sen Jeremiah jah a chun, “Nangman najou jou nasei ahibouve, Pakai ka-Pathen uvin nangma jah a, Egypt gama cheng dingin che hih-uvin, tia sei dingin nangma nahinsol poi;

Neri’ah chapa Baruch chun keiho dou dinga nangma hi natundoh a, hita chu keiho hi Chalde’a mite khut’a eikipeh doh-uva, amahon eithauva ahilouleh Babylon gama sohchang dinga eikai diuva nabolsah ahibouve,” atiuvin ahi.
Hiti chun Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan le sepaite galsat thuneiya pang jouse, chule mipi abon chauvin Judah gama chenden nadinga Pakai thusei chu angai tapouve.
Ahin Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan le sepaite gal sat thuneiya pang jousen akidel mangnau namtin vaipia kona hung kilekit Judah gama cheng dinga kigo Judah mi amoh chengse chu akipuiyuvin,

pasal jouse, numei jouse, chapang ho ahiuvin, leng chanute leh, in-ngahpa lamkaipa Nebu’zarad’an Shaphan chapa Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah toh adalhah tha mipi chutoh, Jeremiah themgaopa leh Neri’ah chapa Baruch jong chu apui thauve.
Hiti chun amaho Pakai thusei ngai louvin Egypt gamsunga ahunguvin, Tah’panhes kho ahung lhung tauve.
Tah’panhes khoa chun Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ahungti:
“Nakhut tenin song chang len tah tah lan lang, Judah mite mitmu tah khun Tah’panhes khoa Pharaoh leng inpi muna lutna dinga keng lampia songpeh kiphajolna songlheng sunga khun gaselin lang,

chule amaho jah a chun, Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye: neihin vetan, keiman mi soling ting kasohpa Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar chu kagapuiya, aman hiche kasong sel ho chunga hi alaltouna akidoa, achunga chu alai pondal loupi chu akison ding ahi.
Ama hung intin Egypt gam hi ahin bol genthei ding, gamna hisea thi ding ho chu gamna hisea agamsah a, sohchang dinga umho chu sohchanga asol ding, chemjama louding ho chu chemjama alousah ding ahi.

Aman Egypt pathen chom chom ho houin jousea chu mei ahin hal a, amaho chu akahvam sah a abon chauva sohchanga akaimang dingu ahi; chujongleh, aman Egypt gam chu kelngoi chingpan asangkhol chola hit le kha akivet ngimhel banga asutheng hel ding ahi; chutengle hichea kona chu lung monga che mang ding ahi.
Aman Egypt gamsunga um nisa milim kihouna in chu aphet lhah a, Egypt gamsunga pathen chom chom ho kihouna in ho chu meiya ahin halvam ding ahi, tin aseiye,’ tin,” ati.
Egypt gamsunga Migdol kho le Tah’panhes kho, Memphis kho, chule Pathros gamsunga cheng Judah mite jouse chung chang thudola chun Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhungin hitin ati;

Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye. Keiman Jerusalem chung le Judah gam khopi chunga kalhunsah thilse ho chu nanghon abon chan namudoh soh heltauve. Vetauvin, tulaiyin hiche ho chu akeovin aumsoh tauvin, asunguva koimacha achengtapoi;
gitlouna aboluva keima eiphin lung hanguva, amaho ahiuva nangho nahiuva, napu napate jenguvin jong ahet khah louhel pathen chom chom henga gimnamtui halnam dinga achejeh uvin.
Ahivangin keiman nahenguva kalhacha themgaoho chu tat le tat louvin kahinsol jing jengin hitin katisah jie, ‘Ahipoi, keiman kahot tah hiche thet umtah thil hi bol hih beh-uvin!’ katisah-in ahi.
Ahinla amahon ngaisah-in jong anei pouve, thil gilou abolnauva kon leh pathen chom chom hoa kona kiheimang na dingin anakhangu jong ahei pouvin ahi.
Hichejeh chun kalungsat le kalunghan chu Judah gam khopi jouse leh Jerusalem kholai dunga akibung lha jengin ahi; hijeh chun hiche ho chu tulaiya bang khun ahomsan akeovin akijamsoh tan ahi.

Chule tun Thaneipen Pakai Pathen, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye: ipi dinga nanghon hitobang thilse hi nakiboluva, nangho lah a kona pasal numei, chapang naosen geiya Judah gam lailunga kona nasat lhah jenguva, nangho dinga avaldoh amoh themcha jong khen louva na umu hitam?

Ipi dinga nakhutsoh uva chu keima neiphin lung hanguva, cheng dinga nahung nau Egypt gamsunga chu pathen chom chom henga gimnamtui nahalnam uva, hita chu nakisat lhah lo’uva, leiset namtin vaipi jouse lah a gaosap le houset’a naum dingu ham?

Nanghon napu napateu gitlouna nasuhmil uva, Judah lengte gitlouna, ajiteu gitlouna, nangho tah tah gitlouna, najiteu gitlouna, Judah gamsung le Jerusalem kholai dunga kiboldoh ho pi chu nasuh mil mong mongu hitam?
Tuni geiyin amaho chu akineosah deh pouvin, kichatnan aneipouvin, keiman nangho leh napu napateu masanga kakoi jing keima danthu leh kachondan thu ho bangin nachon pouvin ahi.
Hijeh chun thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman Judah satgam na dinga thilse bol dinga nangho douna kamai kahin ngat ding ahi.

Chule Egypt gama cheng dinga hung kiheiya hung kijot Judah amoh chengse, keiman kamat khoma, amaho chu kibah gamhel diu; Egypt gamsunga chu amaho lhulham soh hel diu ahin; chemjam le kel a kibah gamhel ding ahiuve; aneo pen tah a pat’ a a len pen geiya chemjama lou uva chule kela thi ding ahiuve; amaho chu lohso le kidah um, gaosap le houset chang ding ahiuve.
Keiman Egypt gamsunga chengte chu Jerusalem chemjama kasat’a, kel kalhahsah a, chule gamna hise kalansah a talen kapeh banga talen kapeh ding ahi;

hita chu Judah mi amoh chengse Egypt gamsunga cheng dinga hung ho jouse chu khat cha jong jamdoh louva, hingdoh louding, acheng dinga ahung kile kit nom nau Judah gamsunga chu hung kile kit lou dingu ahi; ajeh chu amaho hung kilekit lou diu, avah thaile themcha bou hiding ahiuve” ati.

Chuphat’in ajiteu chun pathen chom chom ho henga gimnamtui ahalnamun ahi, tia kihet pasal se se ahin, khoppi lentah a gapang numei jouse ahiuvin, Egypt gamsunga Pathros muna cheng mipin abon chauvin Jeremiah chu adonbut’uvin aseiyuve;
“Nangman keiho jah a Pakai mina nasei banga chu keihon nathu kangai lou dingu ahi.

Keihon vang kaki hahselnao chu kaboljoh dingu, van lengnu dinga gimnamtui kahal nam uva, hiche nu dinga chu juning kalhit peh dingu ahi, keihon kabol bang bangu, keiho leh kapu kapateuvin abol to bang bang, ka lengteu leh kaleng chapa teuvin anabol bang banguva, Judah gam khopi dung jouse leh Jerusalem kholai dung tin a anabol bang banguva; hichea chun keihon neh le chah lhingset in kanei jouvin, kakhang touvun, thilse katoh khapouve.
Ahin van lengnu henga gimnamtui kahalnam dauva, hiche nu henga chu juning kalhit da kalseuvin keihon thil jouse lhahsam nan kaneiyuvin, chemjamin kalousoh tauvin, kelin kathigam tauve” atiuvin ahi.

Chuin numeiho chun aseiyuvin, “Ijeh-inem itileh keihon van lengnu koma gimnamtui kahalnam uva, hiche nu henga chu juning kalhit lhah-u chu ahin, amanu limput le lemput dinga changlhah pheng ho kasempeh uva chule juning kalhit peh jiu chu kajipateu phalna beiya kabol beh-u ham?” atiuve.
Hichun Jeremiah-in mipi ahin, pasal ho leh numei ho ama donbutna neiya mipi abonchauvin ajah uva thu aseiyin hitin ati;

“Nanghon Judah gam khopi jouse leh Jerusalem kholai dung tina, nangho nahiuvin napu napateu ahin, nalengteu leh naleng chapateu ahin, chule gamsunga mipi ahiuvin, gimnamtui nahal namu chu Pakaiyin ageldoh lou beh mong ham? Hiche chu a ma lung gila lut loubeh mong ham ong?

Nanghon nabolsau thilse ho thet umtah tah ho chu Pakaiyin athoh thoh nom louhel ding ahi; hijeh a chu nangho gamsung hi akomkeova kijama akeova umah ahin, tulaiya banga hi gaosap changa acheng ding mi beiya umah ahitai.

Hiche hi nanghon gimnamtui nahalnam uva, Pakai douna nachonset’uva, Pakai thusei ngailouva, ama danthu leh ama chondan thua chon louva, ama thil hettohsah ho chu nadon pouvin, hijeh a chu hiche thilse hi, tuni nikhoa aum banga hi nachunguva hung lhungah ahitai,” ati.
Jeremiah-in mipi jouse leh numeiho jah a chun aseiyin. “’Ngaiyuvin, nangho Judah mite nabonchauva Egypt gamsunga um ho;

thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiyin hitin ati: nangho le najiteuvin nakamsung tah-uvin naphongdoh uvin, nakhut tah-uvin namolso jenguvin, ‘Keihon kasemsau kakihahsel nau, van lengnu henga gimnamtui halnam dingle amanu dinga juning lhit peh ding chu kaboldoh tei tei dingu ahi,’ tin naseiyuve. Chuti ahileh nakihahselna chengseu chu sudet’uvin lang nakihahselna jouseu chu molso jeng tau!

Hichejeh chun nangho Judah mite Egypt gama cheng jousen Pakai thusei hiche hi ngai temuvin: neihin vetan, Pakaiyin keima kamin nasatah chun kakihahsel’e tin aseiyin. Judah mi koi hileh Egypt gama cheng mite kamsunga chu keima hung kiminphah louhel ding, ‘Pakai Pathen hing jing ahin!’ tia kisei thei louhel ding ahi.
Neihin vetan, keiman amaho chu aphatna ding hilouva asetna dinga kavet lhih jing jeng ahiuve; Egypt gamsunga um Judah mite chu abon chauva abeihel kahseuva chemjam le gilkela thigam hel ding ahiuve.

Chemjama kona toldoh cheng, themcha chubou Egypt gama kona Judah gam sunga hung kilekit ding ahiuve; chutengleh Judah mite amoh chengse Egypt gama cheng dinga hung ho chun koipen thusei tahjom, kei thusei ham amaho thusei ham, ahet dingu ahiye.

Chule nangho dinga hiche hi melchihna hiding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, keiman hiche muna hi nangho talen kapeh a hita chu nanghon keima thusei hi nangho douna dinga thilsea pang ahitai ti nahetdoh thei dingu ahi.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, neihin vetan, keiman Judah lengpa Zedekiah chu BabyIon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar, ama tha dinga hol holpa, amelma pa khut’a kapehdoh banga, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh Hophra kitipa hi ama tha dinga hol hol ho, amelma ho khut’a kapeh doh ding ahi,” ati.

Judah lengpa Josi’ah chapa Jehoi’akim leng chan kal kum Ii lhin kuma Jeremiah-in asei thoa Neri’ah chapa Baruch chun lekhabu khat’a anasut lut thu chu hiche hi ahin, athu chu Jeremiahin Baruch jah a anasei ahin, hitin ati:
“Vo Baruch, Pakai Israel Pathenin nangma henga hitin aseiye:
Nangman, Ohe ada kahitai! Ajeh chu Pakaiyin kanatnaa gimna eibepeh tai; keima kapen pen nan kacholtan, kicholdona kamu tapoi,’ nati.
Nangman ajah a hita nasei ding ahi, Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: vetan, keiman kasahdohsa chu kaphe lhan, keiman kaphudohsa chu kabotdoh-e, gam pumpi hi hiche chu ahiye.

Chule nangman nang ding seh seh a thil len len nahol le ham? Hiche ho chu holdan; ijeh-inem itileh neihin vetan, keiman tahsaa hing ho jouse chunga thilse kahin po lut’e, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; chule keiman nachena ding mun tina nangma hinkho chu gal laiya kichomdoh thilpeh tobanga bou kapeh ding nahi,” ati.
Namtin vaipi chung chang thudola Jeremiah henga Pakai thusei hung lhung chu hiche hi ahi.

Egypt chung chang thudol: Pharaoh Neco kitipa Egypt lengpa, luipi dung panga Car’chemish muna Judah lengpa Josi’ah chapa Jehoi’akim leng chan kal kum li lhin kuma Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar in gala anajopa sepaite chung chang thudola chun:
“Pho le lum semun lang, Galpi mun nailut’uvin!
Sakol ho chu athilpohna gonpeh-un lang, Vo sakol tou themho, achunga kaldoh-uvin! Nathih lukhuh pumin napanmun cheh a panguvin, Natengcha jouse kinol hemun, Thih ompho sangkhol chu Ki-ah-uvin!

Ipi dinga keiman hiche chu kamudoh ham? Amaho alung thoiyuvin anung chon tauve. Agal hangteu la akijep lhusoh tan Pingle pangin ajam mang tauve; Jetle veiya tijatna jeng ahin, Ahung kinung hei pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Akaljang pa jong jammang joulou ding, Gal hangpa jong toldoh joulou ding ahi; Sahlam gamkai luipi dung panga chun Akipal lhu uvin akiba lhu gamtauve.
“Koi hiya hiche Nile vadung banga hung khangtou tul tul a, Atwi hung khangtou tul tul jeng vadung ho tobang ham?

Egypt hi Nile vadung bangin akhangtouvin, Vadungho atwi khang tul tul tobang ahi; Aman, ‘Keima kipatdoh-ing ting Leiset kakhu soh ding ahi; Keiman khopiho leh Asunga chengjouse kasuh mang ding ahi,’ ati.
Vo sakolte, malam nouvin, Vo kangtalai ho, thongje ju temuvin! Gal-hang mite chu kondoh uhen lang, Ethiopia mite leh lum choipa Put jong chu, Lud mite leh Thalpi kap them miho.

Hiche nikho chu Pakai thaneipen Pathen nikho, Phulah nikho ahin, Amatah-in ama kidoupite chunga Phu alahna ding nikho ahiye. Chemjam chun ahin bantan gama Sathao nal lhajeng ding, Chule thisan dimset jeng ding ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai, thaneipen Pathenin Sahlam gamkai luipi dung panga khun Kilhaina gantha khat aneiye.
Vo Egypt nu-ngah thengnu! Gilead a kaltouvin lang thingnai damtheina kilah-in. Pannabeiyin nangman damdoi tampi na-mangin, Hichea chun nang dingin damna aumpoi.
Namtin vaipin nangma jumna ajadoh tauvin, Leiset hi nangma ogin adimsoh tai; Ijeh-inem itileh gal-hang le gal-hang akipal lhu ton, Anigel lhonin alhu khom lhontan ahi” ati.
Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar ahunga Egypt gam ahung suhgam ding thudol Pakaiyin Jeremiah themgaopa henga anasei chu:

“Egypt gama gaphong doh-uvin lang Migdol khoa gasam leuvin; Memphis kho leh Tah’panhes khoa gasam leuvin, ‘Kigingsan umuvin lang kigonsan umuvin. Ijeh-inem itileh chemjamin Nakimvela mi ahin satgam ding ahi’ tiuvin.
Ipi dinga nami-hangu chu jammang jeng hiya, Ipi dinga nabongchal u ding jou lou ham? Ajeh pentah chu Pakaiyin Amapa chu ajep lhuh jeng ahibouve.

Namihonpi chu akipaluvin akibalhu tauve. Chule amaho khat chun khat jah a, ‘Kipatdoh-in imiteu henga nung chetau hite, I penna gamsunguva chun. Ajeh chu mibol gentheipa Chemjam tha a hat behseh jenge.’ akitiuve.
Samuvin Egypt lengpa Pharaoh min, ‘Mi kamtam, phat moh suhmangpa’ tiuvin!
“Keima kahingjinge, tin lengpan aseiye. Amin thaneipen Pakai kitipan; Molsang lah a Tabor mol bangin, Twikhanglena kona Carmel mol tobang mi khat hung ding ahi.
Vo Egypt gamsunga chengte! Sohchanga chena dingin thilkeo kigot tan; Ajeh chu Memphis kho jong ahomkeova hung uma, Acheng ding beiya khogemsa hung um ding ahi.
“Egypt chu bongla tobang ahin, Ahinla sahlam gamkaiya konin sellhip achunga achutai.

Alailunga athalah sepaite jeng jong khu Bongnou thao tah tah tobang ahiuvin; Amaho chu ajamkhom cheh dingin akiheisoh tauvin, Adingden tapouvin ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh atosetna dingu nikhon Amaho chu ahinpha tan, Talen amatna dingu phat chu Ahung lhung tai.

“Gul kithol gin bangin Ham hiu heuvin aging mang jelin ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh amelmate chu thaneitah in akitolun, Amanu douna heicha tampi kengin ahunguvin, Thing phung jouse Tulhu jeng ho chutoh abanguve.
Hiche ho chun agam mang lah jouse atuh chai ding ahi, Tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Khaokhote sangin tamjo hen lang Sophah hoi hi hih jengu jongleh Amaho chu Simjou jai ahipouve.
Egypt chanu chu kijumso tei ding, Amanu chu sahlam gamkaiya Hung kon mite khut’a Kipedoh ding ahiye” ati.
Thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin aseitai: neihin vetan, keiman No khoa Amon leh Pharaoh, Egypt le apathen milimho chule agam lengte Pharaoh le ama chunga kingai chengse chu talen kapeh ding ahi.

Keiman amaho chu tha dinga holte khut’a kapeh doh ding, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar le avai bolte kapeh doh ding ahiuve. Hiche nungle chun masang laiya banga chu Egypt gam chu min chenna ahin nei ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Hijongleh kicha hih-in, Vo kalhacha Jacob, Lungjong lungthoi hih-in, Vo Israel; Ijeh-inem itileh neihin vetan, Gamla tah a kana nangma kahin huhhing ding, Nason nachilhah te jong Asohchan nau gama kana kahuhhing ding ahiuve. Jacob hung kilekit’in tin, Thip delcha leh oltah a um ding, Koimachan ama chu Akichat sah louhel ding ahi.

Kicha hih-in, Vo kalhachapa Jacob Tin Pakaiyin aseiye, ajeh chu keiman ka-umpi nai. Nangma kadel mangna namtin vaipi ho chu Keiman akichaina hel kabolpeh ding; Ahinla nangma vang kasuh beihel lou ding nahi; Keiman atena dih tah a nangma kasuh dih ding, ltinama jongleh nangma hi Talen matsah louva kakoi louhel ding nahi,” ati.
Pharaoh-in Gaza khopi asuhgam masangin Philistine te chung chang thudola Pakai thusei chu Jeremiah themgaopa henga ahung lhungin ahi.

“Pakai hitin aseiye, Vetan, sah lam gamkaiya konin twi ahung lenin, Hijeh a chu phaicham achup ding ahi; Agamsung alonvuh a chule achup hel ding, Khopi le asunga cheng jouse achup ding, Miho hung kap’uva agama cheng jouse kap diu ahi.
Tillah-lou asakol chalte kichop kengto gin le Akangtalai ho kitol gin ahin, Kangtalai ho kang kipei gin ahin, Mipaten jong achateu anung vet hih hel e, Akhut jouseu jong Tha beiya umdoh ahitai.

Hiche chu Philistine te suh gamna ding Nikho ahung lhun jeh ahin, Mi panpi thei Tyre le Sidon a umden Mitin satgamna ding ahijeh ahiye. Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Philistine te asumangin, Caphtor twikhanglen panga cheng amoh chengse asumange.
Gaza khopi miho alu u achaitan, Ash’kelon kho jong amangthah tai; Vo Anakim khoa amoh cheng mite, Itih chan geiya nangle nang naki-at chen chen ding ham?
Hai, Pakai chemjam! Phat itih nungle nathip ding ba ham? Nangma tah nachempai sunga kikhum lut’in lang, Kicholdon lang thip beh chan um tan!
Itia hiche chu umthim thei ding ham, Pakaiyin natoh ding apeh a ahileh? Ash’kelon kho le twikhanglen pang dung dounan Aman hiche hi apansah tan ahi,” ati.

Moab chung chang thudola chun thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye: “Ohe Nebo ada ahi, ajeh chu akeova kikoi ahitai! Kiriatha’im akijumso tan, min akilah tai; Kulpi jong akijumso tan Akivo lhu tan ahi;

Moab minthan na a um tapon, Heshbon khoa jong amahon akho dounan thilse agong tauve, ‘Hunguvin hiche kho hi nam mi khat ahinauva sumangu hite!’ Akitiuve. Vo Mi-ngol nangma jong Nakisu thip hel jeng ding ahin, Chemjam in nahin nungdel del ding ahiye.
“Horona’im a kana ka-na ogin pi khu! Thilkeo kilahpeh ngimhela manthahna nasatah kibol ahi!’ akiti.
Moab akisumang tan, Zo’ar chan geiyin ka-na ogin akijai.
Ijeh-inem itileh Luhith a kaldohna a chun Amaho akap pum pumin achetouvuve; Ajeh chu Horona’im kaldohna a chun Amahon manthahna jala ka-na ogin ajatauve.
Jamdoh-uvin lang nangho le nangho kihinsouvin, Neldi gamsunga sangan tobangin umuvin!

Ipijeh-inem itileh nangman nakulpi ho nakison na a, Nathil khol jouse nakisona jeh a Nangma jeng jong nakikai mang ding ahin, Chemosh jeng jong Sohchanga che ding, Athempu ho jouse leh aleng chapate toh kilhon ding ahi.
Mi sumangpa chu khopi tina hung lhunga, Khopi khat cha beh ahoidoh ah beihel ding; Phailai jong hung mangthah ding, Phaicham lai jong kisumang soh ding ahi, Hiche dinga chu Pakaiyin aseisa ahitai.
“Moab chu alhaving bupeh-uvin, Chutileh amanu leng mang ding ahitai; Akhopi jouse jong acheng beihela Ahomkeova umsoh ding ahi.
Joule nala Pakai ding natongpa chu gaosap chang hen, thisan sona dinga chemjam tuh kitpa chu gaosap chang hen.

“Moab kitipa hi aneova pat kinomsah jing ahin, Ajuning chunga kivah jing ahi; Amahi jubel jousea jong kikho theng ngailou, Ahiloule sohchanga jong che ngai lou ahi; Hijeh chun atuidan chu achunga abeh jingin, Anam jeng jong akikhel khapoi.

“Hichejeh chun vetan, keiman hichepa henga khu midengho kasola, amahon agaden diu, ajubel jouse avohkeh uva chule ajukhon len jouse avohgoi peh na dingu nikho ho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chutengleh Chemosh chung changa Moab hung jahcha ding ahi, Israel insung akinepnau Bethel chung changa ajachat banguva chu.
“Iti monga nanghon ‘Keiho hi Mihang jengle gala gal-hat mi jeng kahiuve,’ natiu ham?
Moab sumangpa leh akhopi jouse achetou tan, Alhen tum gollhang ho jong akithatsa lah a alhumat tai; Tin lengpa amin thaneipen Pakai kitipan aseiye.
Moab settona ding chu ahung naitan, Agentheina ding jouse ahung lhai jel jenge.
Akimvela um nanghon-nabon chauvin Amapa chu kapi soh heluvin, Ama min hesa jouse chun, ‘Iti beh a leng hatpa Tenggol chu kiheh bong hitam, Tenggol loupi tah chu,’ tiuvin.

“Vo Dibon mi chanu agama chengnu, Naloupina konin hung kum lhan lang Tolgo lah ahin hung cheng tan, Ajeh chu Moab sumangpa chu Nangma dou dingin ahung kaltou tan, Hichepa chun nangma kulpi jouse jong asumangtai.
Vo Aro’er’a chengnu, Lampia dingin lang velhi temin! Ajampa chu dongin lang atoldoh nu chu dong temin; ‘Ipi thu soh ah hitam?’ tin seiyin.
Moab chu akijumsoi, ajeh chu akisusea ahitai; Ka le mao jeng ahitai’ Moab chu ahomkeovin aumtai, tin Amon jah a gaseipeh tauvin.
Gam cham laiya thutanna ahung lhung tai, Holon chunga ahin, Jahzah chung ahin, Meph’a-ath chung ahin,
chule Dibon chung ahin, Nebo chung ahin, chule Bethdiblatha’im chung ahin,
Kiriatha’im chung ahin, chule Bethga’mul chung ahin, chule Beth-me’on chung ahin,
Ker’i-oth chung ahin, Bozrah chung ahin, chule gamla naija Moab gamsunga khopi jouse chunga ahung lhung soh tai.
Moab ki chu akisat lhan, abanjang akiheh bongin ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Amapa chu ju donkhamsah-uvin, ajeh chu Pakai dounan akichoi-an in ahiye; chutileh Moab chu aloh lah a kibolin tin, ama jeng jong chu kisu lungdong ding ahi.
Nang dinga Israel chu datmo um hilou ham? Ama chu gucha ho lah a kimudoh kham, nangman ama chung chang thu nasei jousea nalu nathin khum khum jia nahi chu?
“Vo Moab gama cheng ho, Khopi jouse dalhauvin lang songpi sunga chenguvin! Songko kham geiya abu kisah Vakhu tobang khu hiuvin.
Keihon Moab kiletsah thu kajauvin, Hichepa chu hatah a kiletsah ahi; Akichoisangin, akiletsah-in, ahoithon Alungthima akihoitho sah lheh jenge.
Keiman hichepa kiletsahna chu kahei, tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Akiphatseina aboncha jou jeng ahibouve; Anatoh jouse jong khu Jou jeng jeng ahi.
Hijeh hin keima Moab dingin kamao maovin, Moab dingin ka-kap kap jin ahi; Kir-he’res mite dingin Keima kalung hem hemin ahi.

Vo Sibmah lengpithei! Jazer sangin nangma dingin hakan kakap’in ahi. Nabah jouse jong twikhanglen kalpeh Jazer chan geiyin agajam galkaipeh-in ahi; Na-nipi laiya theiga le lengpithei lo phat’in Mi sumang chun ahin lhun khumtai.

Thingga tamna Moab gama konin Thanopna le kipana jouse akila mang soh tai; Lengpithei chilna konin lengpithei kakansah tan, Koimachan hiche ho chu kipa othongin achil tapoi; Ogin kithong jong khu Kipa ogin thong ahipoi.

“Heshbon le Elea’leh chu akhosam lhonin, amanin Jahaz chan geiyin akho sam lhonin, Zo’ar a konin Horona’im le Eg’lath-shelish’iyah geiyin lhang asam lhontai. Ijeh-inem itileh Nimrim a twi ho jeng jong don louvin aum gamtauve.
Chule keiman Moab gamsunga munsanga kilhaina gantha thilto bolpa, apathen henga gimnamtui halnam pa chu amanthah helna ding kabol peh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Hijeh chun Moab dingin kalungthim hi theile kimut bangin amao hiu heuvin, Kir-he’res mite dingin kalungthim hi theile kimut bangin amao hiu heuve; ijeh-inem itileh amahon phatchomna aneiyu agou jouseu amangthah tai.
“Ijeh-inem itileh lujang jouse akivou tol tan, bengmul jouse akivou chai sohtai; khut jouse la maha pop cheh chuh-in aumtan, taibuh jousea khaodip pon akiveisoh tai.
Moab gam intingvum jouse leh kholai dung jousea imacha dang umlou helin ka-na jeng jeng ahitai; ajeh chu koiman akhohsah louhel Moab chu keiman bel kivokeh bangin kavokeh tai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Itobang tah a kivokeh hita a! Itobang loma amaho kap’ah hitauvam! Iti jong Moab chu jah cha geova kinung hei jeng hitam! Hiti chun Moab hi datmo aumtan, akimvela chengte jouse dingin kidah dah-in aumtai,” ati.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Vetan, mikhat chu muvanlai bangin Eiho vilin hung lengin tin, Moab douna alhaving teni ahinjal ding ahi;
Kerioth khopi kilahpeh ding, Kulpi jouse jong kichomsoh hel ding ahi. Hiche nikho chuleh Moab mi gal-hang ho lungthim chu Numei naoso nat pet’a alungthim tobang hi ding ahi;
Moab mite chu kisumang intin Nam mi khat’a umkit louhel ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai dounan Amatah akichoi-an len ahi.
Vo Moab a chengpa, Namasanga tijatna kokhuh, Thang kikam jeng aume, Tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Tijatna kona jamdoh pa chu Kokhuh sunga lhalut ding. Chule kokhuh sunga kona hung kaldohpa chu Thang kikama chu ohden ding ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh amaho talen akipeh kum chuleh Keiman Moab chunga hicheng hi kahin lhut ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Heshbon lim noiya chun Avah thaile ho tha beihelin ading dentauve; Ajeh chu Heshbona konin mei ahung kong doh tan, Sihon ina konin meikong ahung kitungdoh tai; Hiche chun Moab luchang asumangtan, Mihonpi chapate lallukhuh chu asumang tai.
Ohe Moab, ada nahitai! Chemosh mite chu akisu dong soh ahitauve; Ijeh-inem itileh nachapate abonchan sohchangin akikaitan, Nachanute sohchangin aumtauvin ahi.
Hijongle keiman Moab hamphatna chu Ninu nung lamleh kasemphat peh ding ahi, Tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati. Hichan gei hi Moab chunga thutanna ahi.

Ammon mite chung chang thudola Pakaiyin aseiye: “Israel chun chapa aneilou ham? Aman agam ngah ding aneilou ham? Aneileh ipi dinga Milcomin Gad asondoh hiya, Chule amite chu akhopi dunga cheng hitauvam?

Hichejeh chun vetan, nikho ho chu Ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; Keiman Ammon mite Rabbah kho douna Gal kisam ogin chu mi kajah sah ding, Hiche kho chu akeo hel’a kitung den ding, Akhoneo jouse jong meiya kavam hel ding ahi; Hichele chun Israelin ama sondoh ho Aman asotdoh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Vo Heshbon kap’in, ajeh chu Ai khopi akeovin akijamtai! Vo Rabbah kho chanute, kap’uvin! Khaodip ponin natai kigah-uvin lang, Kap’in lang meithai seltho ling lah a nung chop machop thouvin; Ijeh-inem itileh Milcom chu sohchanga che ding ahin, Athempuho leh aleng chapate toh kilhon ding ahitauve.
Vo chanu kitahna neilou, Ipi dinga ba naphaicham dung nakiletsahpi ham? Agoukhol ho kisonna neiya, ‘Keima dou dinga koi hung ding ham?’ tia seinu.

Vetan, keiman nachunga tijatna kahinpo lut’e, Tin Pakai, thaneipen Pathenin aseiye. Nakimvela umho chengsea kona Nang le, namasanga mitip ahiuvin, Nakidel mang cheh dingu ahin, Ajamcheh ho chu apuikhom ding beihel ding ahi.
Hijongle keiman khonung tengleh Ammon mite hamphatna kasem phat ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Edom chung chang thudola Thaneipen Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye: “Teman khoa chihna beihela hitam? Milung chingpa a kona jong thumopna mangthah hitam? Achihna jouse jong Abeisoh ngap ngap hitam?
Vo Dedan a chengte, Jamuvin, kinung heiyun songkoa chenguvin! Ajeh chu keiman Esau chunga hamsetna kahin lhut ding, Ama talen kapehna ding phat kahin lhunsah ding ahi.
Lengpithei ga chomkhom ho chu nahenga hungu hen lang hileh Chomdoh lou theikhai phabep adalhah lou diu ham? Jan teng gucha michomho hung uleh, Amaho khambep chubou asuhmang lou diu ham?

Ahinla keiman Esau chu akeohelin ka-lhatan, Akiselna mun jouse kahohdoh soh tai; Hijeh chun ama jong akisel thei tapon, Acha anaote akisumang soh tan, Asopi pasal jouse ahin, aheng akomho ahiuvin Chule ama jeng jong beihela ahitai.
Nachapang pabei ho chu dalhan, Keiman hinso nange; Chule nameithai ho jeng jong chun Keima eitahsan cheh uhen,” ati.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Khona chu don dinga kilom louhel ho chun adon tei tei dinga ahileh, nangma talen man louva na um louhel ding, don jong nadon tei tei ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh keima kakihahseltai, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, Bozrah chu kidah dah hung um ding, houset’a uma, ahomkeova um ding, chule gaosap chang ding ahi; chutengle akhopi jouse chu aitih chan geiya akeova kijam jam ding ahitai,” ati.
Keiman Pakaiya konin kipana thupha kajan, Chule namtin vaipi jouse henga thangkou khat akisoltai; “Nangho le nangho hung kikhomuvin lang, Amanu dou dingin hunguvin galmuna din kipatdoh-uvin!” ati.
Ajeh chu vetan, namtin vaipi lah a Nangma hi neocha kahisah ding, Mihemte lah a jong Not thap’a kaumsah ding nahi.

Kidah dah-a nathumop chun nangma najou lhep ahitan, Nalungthima kiletsahna chu ahi: Nangma songpi khikah dunga chengpa, Thinglhang sang lai lai kolchah jingpa, Nangman muvanlai busah na chana sangin nabu sa jong le chun Hichea kona chu keiman kakai lhah ding nahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Edom chu kidah dah hung um ding, ajotpa chan chun akidah cheh ding, atosetna chengse jeh a chu min aphiset khum khum ding ahiye.
Sodom le Gomorrah chule anaivela khopi jouse akilekhup pet’ a banga chu asunga mihem khat cha acheng jong umlou ding, akhol jin le jong um louhel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Vetan, Jordan vadung gammang lah a kona kelngoi hongkul delkhum dinga hung kondoh sakei banga keiman amaho chu akhoa kona hetman louva kajam mangsah ding ahiuve: chule keiman akho chunga hi kadei dei kalhen ding ahi. Ajeh chu keima tobang chu koipen ham? Koiham keima eikou ding chu? Kamasanga pang jou ding chu itobang kelngoi ching mi ham?

Hiche jeh chun Pakaiyin Edom douna thil agon hi ngai temuvin, chule Teman’a chengte douna dinga thil angaito ho hi ngaitemuvin: kelngoinou neocha cha jeng jong chu kikai mang ding ahiuve; amanthahna dinguva akelngoi hongu jong chu ahoh kichatsoh hel ding ahi.
Amaho lhuh gina chu leiset kithing leu ding, aka ginu jong chu twikhanglen sandung geiya kijapha peh ding ahi.

Vetan, ama chu hung kaltouvin tin muvanlai banga man gangtah a leng ding, Bozrah douna alhaving teni ajah ding, chuteng hiche nikho chuleh Edoma gal-hang mite lungthim chu numei naoso nat pet“a alungthim tobang hiding ahi,” ati.

Damascus chung chang thudola: “Hamath le Arpad chu akisudong tai; Ijeh-inem itileh amanin thuse aja lhontai, Kichat’in amani anem lha jeng lhonin ahi: Phothip thei louhel twikhanglen bangin Among thei lhon tapon ahi.
Damascus kho chu alung neo tan, Ajam dingin akihei tan, kichat nan alotai; Numei naoso nat pet tobangin Gimna le cholnan aphatan ahi.
Iti dan a khopi minthang, Kipana khopi chu kidalha hitam!
Hijeh a chu akhosunga gollhang jouse Akholai ningkoi tina lhu lham diu, Chule hiche nikho chuleh akhosung sepai jouse Kisumang ding ahiuve, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chule keiman Damascus kulpi banga mei kahal ding, Hichun Benha’dad kulpi jouse akahvam ding ahi” ati.
Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrcz’zar in anasuh mangsa Kedar le Hazor lenggam teni chung chang thudola chun Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: “Kipatdoh-uvin lang Kedar dounan notouvun. Niso lam mite chu sumanguvin!

Aponbuh chengseu leh akelngoi hon jouse toh, Apondal hou ahin athilkeo jouseu ahin kilahpeh diu ahi; Amahoa kona asangong saoteu kipoh mang peh ding, Chutengleh mihem ten ‘Jetle veiya tijat najeng ahi’ Tia kholhang asap khum khum dingu ahiye.

Vo Hazor a chengte, jam manguvin lang gamla tah a jamuvin. Athuh lai laiya chenguvin, tin Pakaiyin aseiye: Ijeh-inem itileh Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar in Nangho dounan thilgon khat asemin. Nangho douna dingin Thil ngaito khat aneitai.
“Kipatdoh-uvin lang notouvun, Anop aninga um, mong tah a cheng nam mite, Tin Pakaiyin aseiyin. Kelkot ho leh Kelkot gol ho beiya uma Achangseh seh a chengte chu.

Asangongsaoteu chu moh lahpeh bep ding ahin, Abongu leh gancha chu chomgam ding bep ding ahi; Keiman asamgei kitan jouse chu Jetle veiya hui kalhoh mangsah ding, Chule ajet aveiyuva kona Ahamsetna dingu kahin pohlut ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Hazor chu aitih chan geiya ahomkeova kijam ding, Ngei honte kokhuh hung hiding ahi; Hikoma chu mihem khat cha hung cheng lou ding, Akhosunga chu mihem koimacha jin-le louding ahi” ati.
Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah leng chan til laiya Elam chung chang thudola Pakai thusei Jeremiah themgaopa henga hung lhung chun hitin ati.
Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: “Neihin vetan, keiman atha bulpi uva pang Elam thalpi chu kaheboh ding ahi.

Chule keiman Elam chunga lhung dinga van ning lia kona hui jat li jen kahin nun-sah ding, chutengleh amaho chu hiche hui lah a chu kathe cheh soh hela, Elam a kona kadel mangsa ho hung lhun louna ding hi nam mite um louhel ding ahitai.

Keiman Elam chu amelmateu leh amaho tha dinga holte masanga kameidoi sah a, chule kalungsatna nasatah, thilse tah chu amaho chunga kahin poh lut ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Keiman amaho chu kabah gam hel masangsea anung nunguva chemjam ka-lensah ding ahiye;
chujongle keiman Elam a chu kalaltouna kado ding, aleng-pau le leng chapate kasuh mang ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Amavang ni nunung lamle keiman Elam hamphatna chu kasem phat peh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye” ati.
Chalde’a mite gam Babylon chung chang thudola Pakaiyin Jeremiah themgaopa henga thu ahinsei chu:

“Namtin vaipi lah a phongjal uvin lang seichoi leuvin, Ponlap tahsang uvin, seichoi leuvin; Selguh dauvin seidoh jo’uvin. ‘Babylon chu galin akijoutai, Bel chu akijumso tan, Mer’odach chu alungthoi tai. Akhosung milim kisemthu jouse aki jumso tan, Akhosunga pathen lim kisem jouse jong alung thoitai,’ tiuvin.

“Ajeh chu khopi dou dingin sahlam gamkaiya konin nam mite khat ahung kitol toutan, hiche nam mite chun agamsung hi ahomkeova akoi diu, asunga koi-macha cheng louhel ding ahin, mihem le gamsa jeng jong jam mang ding ahitai.

“Hitobang nikho lai chuleh hitobang phat laiya chu Israel chate leh Judah mite chu hung kilhonu vin tin, ahung pum pumuva hung kap ding ahiuve, chule amahon Pakai a-Pathenu ahinhol dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Amahon Zion jotna lampi chu mi ahin doh diu, hiche lang chu amaiyu angat’uva, ‘Hunguvin, eihon suhmil kit louhel ding tonsot’a kitepna a chun Pakaiya eiho tah kitem khomu hite! tia asei dingu ahi.

“Kamite chu kelngoi mangsa ahi-uvin, amaho kelngoi china ching ho chun lam hilou lama apui-mang gamuvin, molsang lah lah a ahoidoh gam tauve; molsanga konin thinglhang lama ache-uvin, hijeh chun ahong sungu chu asumil gamtauvin ahi.

Amaho chu atoh kha chanin abahgam jenguvin, chujongle amelma teuvin jong, ‘Eiho ithemmo pouve, ajeh chu amaho Pakai, achennau tah beh, Pakai, apu apateu kinepna pa dounan achonse tauve,’ tin asei ta uvin ahi.
“Babylon lailunga konin jamdoh-uvin lang, Chalde’a mite gamsunga konin chedoh-uvin; kelngoi hon masanga kel-chalte tobang hiuvin.

Ijeh-inem itileh vetan, keiman Babylon dounan sahlam gamkaiya konin nam nasa tah khat kahin puilut’e; akhopi douna dinga amaho chu hung kivon cheh ding ahiuvin, hichejeh chu akhopi alah diu ahi. Athalpi changu jong akhut keova hung kilekit louhel gal-hang mi hattah tobang ahiuve.
Chalde’a mite jong kichomgam hel ding, chule amaho chomgam chengse jong chu haodoh cheh ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Nangho kipah-uvin lang kichoi sang jong leu chun, Vo kagoulo mite chomgama pangho; Hamhing lah a ngol chop chop jeng bongla tobang Sakol chal til-lah louho bangin ham ham jong leu chun;
Nanuu chu nasa tah a kijumso ding, Nahing nuu chu kivetda hel ding ahiye. Vetan, hiche nu hi namtin vaipi lah a anukhah pen hiding, Gamthip laile neldi gam tobang hiding ahiye.
Pakai lungsatna jeh a hiche chu chenna kinei louhel ding, Ahom keova kijam hel ding, Babylon khopi jotpa jousen tijatna anei cheh ding, Akhosung kisuhsetna chengse chu aphiset khum diu ahi.

Babylon khopi douna dingin, Thalpi kamsa kichoi chengse Kivon soh heluvin akimvela ding uvin; Akhopi chu kap’uvin lang Thalpi chang khat cha khen hih heluvin. Ajeh chu akhopi hi Pakai dounan achonsetai.

Akho kim vela lhang samuvin, Akhopi acham chamin ahung kikhum luttai; Agalpal jouse jong achimtan, Apal jouse akichon lhu soh tan ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi Pakaiyin phu alahna ahin, Akhopi chunga phu alah ahitai; Akhopi hin thil anabol bang chun Ama chunga jong hin aboluvin.
Babylon khopia konin muchi tupa chu sat lih-uvin lang, Chang-at lai phat’a koite choipa chu sat lih-uvin; Chujongle amitakip chu Ama ama gamsung cheh a jamlut cheh ding ahi:
“Israel chu kelngoi kidel le le, sakeiten adelmangsa ahitai. Amasan Assyria lengpan ana bahgam jengin, chule tun achainan Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’rar in agu achang jouse achip goi jengin ahi.
Hichejeh chun thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman Babylon lengpa chungle agamsung chunga jong Assyria lengpa talen kapeh bang chun talen kahin polut’e.
Keiman Israel dinga ahampa hing kanousah kit’a, ama Carmel molsang chungle Bashan phaichama kivahva ding, E’phraim thinglhang dungle Gilead gamsunga thing banga kivahva set ding ahi.

Hiche nikho lai leh hiche phat le chun, Pakaiyin aseiye, Israel sunga themmona kiholin tin, khat cha jong kimudoh lou ding, Judah lah a chonsetna kiholin tin, khat’a khat cha jong kimudoh louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh keiman amoh avaldoh ding monga kadalhah chengse chu ka-ngaidam ding ahi.
“Meratha’im gam dounan notouvin lang, Pekod’a chengte dounan notouvin; Anung nungu delin chemjamin sat gam helin, Tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Chule keiman kathupeh chengse hi Abonchan bolsoh keiyin.
Gamsunga gal kisat ogin leh, Manthahna nasatah ogin akithonge!
Iti dana leiset pumpi khetbuh a pangpa Kisat lhua kichilgep mah hitam! I-atileh Babylon’ hi namtin vaipi lah a Kidah dah a um jeng hitam!
Vo Babylon, thang kakam peh-in Nangma na-oh tai; Ahivangin nangman nahe hih laiye, Nangma nakiholdoh-in nakimantai; Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai dounan Nangma nakihabol lheh jengin ahi.
Pakaiyin agal manchah koina chu ahongdoh tan, Alungsatna manchah ho chu ahinpo doh tai; Ajeh chu Pakai thaneipen Pathenin Chalde’a mite gamsunga khun Thil boldoh ding khat Aneiyin ahi.
Gam kimvela konin agamsung dou din hung kondoh-uvin lang, Achangsal jouse hongdoh-uvin; Ama khu chang kisungvum bangin sethomuvin lang Sumang helin, athil imacha khen hih heluvin.
Abongchal jouse thatgam soh-uvin lang, Abonchan akithana ding muna kijotsuh sah tauvin; Ohe, ada ahiuve, ajeh chu amaho kichaina nikho ahung lhunge; Talen amatna dingu phat ahung lhungtai.
“Ngaiyin ogin khu, amaho Babylon gamsunga konin Ziona Pakai i-Pathenu phulahna, ahouin dinga aphulahna phongdoh dingin ajamuvin, atoldoh soh gamtauve.

“Thalpi kamsa kichoi, thai themho chu abon chauvin Babylon dou dingin kou temuvin. Akhopi kim vela khun ngahmun semuvin lang, mihem khat cha jong toldoh sah hih heluvin. Akhopi chu anatoh jouse dungjuiyin lethuh-uvin lang, aman anabolsa chengse tobang bang chun ama jong boluvin; ijeh-inem itileh aman Pakai, Israel Mithengpa chu kiletsah tah-in kisatpi dingin anachoutai.
Hichejeh a chu akho gollhang jouse jong akholai dunga lhu lhamsoh ding, hiche nikho chuleh akholai sepai jouse aboncha kisumang hel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Neihin vetan, Vo mi kiletsah keiman kadou nahi, Tin Pakai, thaneipen Pathenin aseiye; Ajeh chu anikho ahung lhung tan, Nangma talen kamat sah nading phat ahung lhungtai.
Mi kiletsah chu kipal lhua kibalhu jeng ding, Koimacha aphongdoh ding um louhel ding ahi; Chule keiman akhopi jousea mei kahal ding ahin, Mei chun akimvela um jouse akahvam ding ahiye.
“Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Israel mite chu bol gentheiyin aumuvin, Judah mite toh ahithauve; amaho sohchang a anakaiho chun atuh chah jing jenguvin, lhadoh ding anompouve.

Alhatdampu u chu ahat’in, thaneipen Pakai kiti chu ama min ahiye. Ama chun amaho ding khoh tah-in hinseipeh intin, leiset hi kicholdoa aumsah theina ding angaito ding ahi; amavang Babylon khopi dinga choldo thei louna apeh ding ahi.
“Pakaiyin aseiyin, Chalde’a mite chungleh Babylon khopia chengte chung, Aleng chapate chungleh Amichingte chungah Chemjam achutai!
Angolna dinguvin gaothemte chunga Chemjam ahung chutan ahi; Akisuh mang helna dinguvin Akhopia gal hangho chunga chemjam achutai!

Akhosunga sakolte chungleh Akangtalai ho chung Akholai lunga gamdang sepaite chu Numei lungput aputna dinguvin Achunguva chemjam achutan ahi. Akichom ngimhelna dinguvin Akhosung thil kholna jouse chunga Chemjam avaihom tan ahi.
Akhosung twi jouse chu akanna dingin Gotwi ahung jutapon ahi; Ijeh-i’nem itileh hiche gam hi milim semthu gam ahin, Amaho jong pathen lim semthua ngol gam ahitauve.

“Hijeh a chu Babylon khosunga gamsa le kamkei hung cheng khoma, akhosunga chu va-ngongsao jong hung cheng ding; akhopi chu mihem cheng kit talou hel ding, akhang khanga chenna kinei kit louhel ding ahitai.

Pathenin Sodom le Gomor’rah chule anaivel dunga khopi jouse alekhup hel pet tobanga chu, hikoma khu mihem koima cha hung cheng kit louhel ding, chule mihem chapa khat cha jong akhosunga hung kholjin louhel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Vetan, sahlam gamkaiya konin mipi hon khat ahungin, Nam hattah le leng tamtah Leiset kolmong kimvela konin Ahung kitoldoh tauvin ahi.

Amaho chun thalpi le tengcha akidop cheh-uvin, Agit’a gilou, hepina beihel mite ahiuve. Ahusau chu twikhanglen kithon gin toh abangin, Amaho chu sakol chunga ahung tou cheh-uve; Vo Babylon chanu, nangma dounan Pasal galvona kivon bangin akivon tauve.
“Babylon lengpan amaho thu kithang hi ajatan. Akhut teni jong adom ding beiyin angoi jengin, Numei naoso nat pet bangin Hesohnan ama ahinpha tai.

“Vetan, Jordan gammang lah a kona kelngoi hong kulpi dettah nokhum dinga hung kondoh sakei banga amaho chu akhopia kona keiman hetman louhela kanojam jeng ding ahi; chutengle keiman akhopi chunga vaihom ding chu kadei dei koi hijongle kalhen ding ahi. Ajeh chu keima tobang koipen ham? Koi ham keimil eikou ding chu? Kamasanga pang jou ding chu itobang kelngoi ching mi ham?

Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin Babylon khopi douna thil agon hi ngaiyuvin lang, Chalde’a mite gam douna ding a thil ngaito agon dohsa chengse hi ngai temuvin: kelngoi hon lah a aneo cha jong chu kikai mang ding, amanthahna dinguva akelngoi hongu jong chu ahoh kichatsoh jeng ding ahi.
Babylon gal hinga akimatna husaa chu leiset kiling ding, chule namtin vaipi lah a akhopi ka-gin chu kijadoh ding ahi.” ati.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: ‘Neihin vetan, keiman Babylon douna Mi sumangpa lungthim kahin tildoh ding, Chalde’a gama chengte douna kahin tildoh ding ahi;

Chule keiman Babylona chu changsi sepchil banga sep thei ho kahin sol ding, Amahon Babylon ajap chil diu ahi; Gimna nikhoa ama doudia jetle veiya kona ahung kon tengu, Amahon agamsung chu akeohela alha diu ahi.
Thalpi kap thempa jong chun athalpi kamda hen lang, Athih sangkhol kiah hen lang pandet da jeng hen; Agollhang ho jong hinghoi dauvin lang, Asepaite abon chauvin thatgam heluvin.
Amaho chu Chalde’a gamsunga kisatlhu gamsoh hel diu, Akholai dung tina machang soh kei ding ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itileh a-Pathenu thaneipen Pakaiyin, Israel le Judah chu adalha hih laiye; Ahin Chalde’a mite gamsung vang chu Israel Mithengpa douna themmona adimset’e.

“Babylon kholai lunga konin jamdoh uvin, Min ama ama hinkho kihuhhing cheh hen! Akhopi talen kipehnaa chun kisat lhah tha sah hih-uvin, Ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi Pakaiyin phu alah pet ahi; Aman akhopi lethuhna Abolpeh pettah ahiye.
Babylon chu Pakai khut’a sana khon tobang anahin, Leiset pumpi ju anadon khamsahna ahiye; Namtin vaipi jousen akhopi ju adon cheh-uvin, Hichejeh chun namtin vaipi angol gamtauve.
Chomkah louvin Babylon achimtan, akichil goitai; Akhopi chu ka cheh-uvin! Amaha a nupeh dingin damdoi gala-uvin, Ijem itileh adam kit thei ahiye.

Keihon Babylon chu kana boldam theiyu ahitan, Ahinla adam theipoi. Amahi dalhauvin, chetau hite, Igamsung cheh kijot tau hite; Ijeh-inem itileh ama thu kitanna chu van ageitan, Vanlaijol geiyin akidom sangtan ahi.
Pakaiyin eiho dihna ahinpodoh tai, Hunguvin Pakai i-Pathenu natoh chu Eihon Ziona Phongjal uhite.

“Thalpi chang ho chu kinol hemuvin, Lum ho chu kipat cheh-uvin! Pakaiyin Mede leng ho lungthim atildoh tai, ipijeh-inem itileh Babylon angaito dol hi, suhmang jeng ding ati ahi, ajeh chu hiche hi Pakai phulahna ahin, ahouin chung changa aphulahna chu ahiye.

Babylon khopi pal-ho dounan panmun tungdoh-uvin, Khothe ngaina in chu dettah-in semuvin; Khothe ngaiya pang ding mi pansah-uvin lang, Mi lamtina chang pan ding ngaitou-vin; Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Babylona chengte thudola anasei chu Gon jong agonsa ahitan, toh jong atohdoh ahitai.
Vo twi tamtah panga chengpa, Gou haotah pa; Nakichaina ding phat ahung lhungtan, Nahinna gui akisat tan tai,
Thaneipen Pakai amatah akihahseltan, Thon louhela keiman khaokhote jat mihem kahin dip ding nahin, Hiche ho chun nangma chunga Hanla ahinsap diu ahitai.
“Athahat’a leiset semdoh pa, Achihna a vannoi tungdoh pa Athil hetkhen themna a kona Van jong ponpha phapa chu ama ahiye.

Ama chu ahung kitum tengleh Vana jong twipi akilom lui lui jin; Leiset kolmonga konin Aman meilhang ahin kaisah jin ahi. Gojuh na dingin kol aphetsah jin, Akholna in dunga konin huipi ahin-lha doh jin ahi.

Mijouse hi angolle hetna bei jeng ahin, Thih kheng them jouse jong pathen lim akhenthu jeh-un aki jumso uve. Ijeh-inem itileh amilim semthu hou hi jou jeng ahin, Asunguva jong haina thei hu acheng-poi.
Hiche ho hi phatchomna bei, Kilhep lhahna dinga kisemthu jeng ahibouvui; Amaho hi talen akipeh tenguleh Aboncha mangthah ding ahiuve.
Jacob chan dingpa vang chu chuti ahipoi, Ajeh chu thil jouse gongdoh pa chu ama ahi; Israel jong hi ama goulo ding phung chu ahin, Thaneipen Pakai kiti chu ama min ahiye.
“Nangma kakhetbuh le kagal manchah nahin, Nangma kaman a; Namtin vaipi jouse hi kavoh ngoi jeng ahin, Nangma kamana lenggam jouse kasuh mang ahiye;
Nangma kaman chah a sakolte leh achunga toute Kasuh ngim soh anahin; Nangma kaman chah a kangtalai leh Kangtalaiya touho jouse kavoh goisoh ahiuve;
Nangma kaman chah a pasal le numei kavoh ngoi soh ahin, Nangma kaman chah a upa gollhang kavoh goisoh ahi; Nangma kaman chah a Gollhang le nu-ngah ho kasuh goisoh ahiuve;

Nangma kaman chah a Kelngoi chingpa le kelngoi hon kavohgoi ahi; Nangma kaman chah a loubol pa le Aloi agolte chu kavoh goi ahiuve; Nangma kaman chah a gamvaipo ho leh Sepaite chunga thunei ho kavoh goisoh ahi.
“Keiman nangho mitmu chang tah a Babylon khopi leh Chalde’a gama chengte jouse chu Ziona thilse aboldoh chengseu jala kalethuh soh hel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Neihin vetan, Vo misumang molsang tobang pa, Keiman nangma bou kadou jing nahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Leiset pumpi sumang thei pa Keiman nangma dounan kakhut hinlhang ing ting, Molseboh lah a kona nangma katol lhah suh a Molsang kachaisa tobang kahisah ding nahi.
Nanga kona song khat cha jong In ning songpi dinga kikaldoh louhel ding ahin; Inmun songpi dinga jong kila louhel ding, Aitih chan geiya ahomkeova nakijam ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Leiset chunga pondal tahdoh-uvin, Namtin vaipi jouse lah a sumkon mut’uvin; Ama dou ding khun namtin vaipi hi Galbol dingin kigot sah-uvin; Ama dou dingin lenggam jouse koukhom uvin, Ararat ahin, Minni ahin, chule Ash’kenaz gam ahin; Ama dou din gallamkaiyin pansah-uvin, Khaokhote jah lah lah bangin sakolte hintil doh-uvin.
Ama dou dingin namtin vaipi hi galsat din kigot sah-uvin, Mede lengte le agamvaipoteu, anoi douva pang ho, Chule amaho vai neina noiya um Gam jouse hi galsat dingin kigot sah-uvin.
Agam chu akithing thing jengin na asa lheh jenge; Ajeh chu Babylon douna Pakai thilgon chu aum jinge; Babylon gamsung ahomkeova umsah ding, Acheng beihela koi ding chu.
Babylon mi gal-hang ho chu galsat ahaitauve. Akulpi sunguva aumden soh tauvin, Athahatnau alhasam soh tan, Numei asohgam tauve; Achenna mun jouseu meiyin akan, Akelkot gol jouse jong akiheh bongtai.
Thusep khat chu thusep khat toh kimuto din alhai lhaiyin, Thangkou khat chu thangkou khatma toh kimuto din alhaiye, Babylon lengpa jah a akhopi chu jetle veiya konin akilahpeh tai, tia seipeh dingin;
Kulpi ho chu akilahpeh soh tan, Galpal jouse jong meiyin akihalin, Hijeh chun sepaite jong Akicha gamtauvin ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye; Babylon chanu chu kengto chotpha akinei tengleh Changphol tobang bang ahin, Ahivangin phat chomkhat nungleh Achang-at phat hung lhung ding ahitai,” ati.

Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar in keima eival lhumin, Aman eilhai goi tan ahi; Aman keima hi belkeosa bangin eikoitan, Hingne bangin keima eival lhumtai; Kasa tuilai lai hi aoivaset’in einetan, Einechai hel jengtan ahiye.

Keima chungle kaphunggol mite chunga Pumhat jenga thil kibol chu Babylon khopi chunga chujeng hen” ati. Ziona cheng mite chun seiyu hen, “Keima thisan man chu Chalde’a gama chengte chunga Chujeng hen,” tin Jerusalemin jong sei hen.
Hichejeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: “Neihin vetan, keiman nachung chang thu kaseipeh a Chutengleh nangma phu kalahpeh ding, Agamsung twikhanglen kakansah a Twinah jong kakansah ding;
Chutengleh Babylon chu ingem jeng alhuh lhuh a kisea, Ngei honte kokhuh jeng hung hi ding, Acheng beihela kidah leh phiset khum hi ding ahi.
“Amaho abon chauva sakei hon banga kitum tum dingu, Sakei noute banga ngih ngih jeng diu ahi.
Amaho meiyin ahulsat pet tah a keiman golvah kabolpeh ding, Alhuh lham kahseuva ju kadon sah sah jeng ding ahi; Aitih chan geiya ihmu mu jeng diu, Kithou kit louhel diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Keiman amaho chu akithana ding muna kikai lut Kelngoite, kelngoichal ho, kelchal ho banga kakai lhah ding ahiuve.
“Itidola Babylon kila jeng hita a, Leiset pumpi vahchoipa chu kiman gop jeng hitam! Itidola namtin vaipi lah a Babylon chu kidah dah umjeng hitam!
Babylon khopi chu twikhanglen in achup tan, Atwi kidilpi chun akhopi akhunal tai.
Akhopi jouse jong kidah dah asoh gamtan, Hollei lah le neldi gamsung jeng ahitan; Koimacha chenna gam hilouhel, Mihem chapa jotpa louhel gam hi-ding ahi.
Keiman Babylon khopia Bel chu talen kapeh ding, Aval lhumsa chu akamsunga kona kalahdoh peh ding ahi. Namtin vaipiho ahenga hung kitol tol ta louhel ding ahi. Babylon khopi pal chu achimtai.
“Alailunga kon hin potdoh tauvin, kamite! Min ama ama hinkho kihuhhing cheh hen, Pakai lungsatna Tijat umtah a kon chun!

Nalungthim lhahsam sah hih-uvin, Gamsunga thu kithang jeh hin kicha hih-uvin; Kum khat sunga thu thang khat hung lhung ji ahin, Khonung teng akum kit’a chu thu thang khatma hung lhungjia ahiye; Gamsunga pumhat jeng aumtan, Vaihom khat chu vaihom khat douva um cheh ahitai.
“Hichejeh chun vetan, Keiman Babylon khopia pathen lim semthuho Talen kapehna ding Nikho ho chu ahung lhunge; Agamsung pumpi hi kijumso ding, Alailung tah a amite kithatsa jouse kijamden ding ahiuve.

Chujou tengle van le leiset chule asunga um jousen, Babylon khopi chunga kipa la asah diu ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh amaho dou dinga Misumang ho chu Sahlam gamkaiya kona Hung kondoh ding ahitauve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Israel kithagam jeh a Babylon lhu tei tei ding, Leiset pumpi kithagam jeh a Babylon lhu ah ahitai.
“Chemjama kona jamdoh ho chu Chedoh tauvin, ding hih-uvin! Gamla tah a konin Pakai chu hin geldoh-uvin lang, Jerusalem chu nalunggila kilah sah jinguvin.
’Keiho eikijumso tauvin ahi, ajeh chu houset katoh tauve, Jabol lounan kamaiyu akhutan ahi, Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai muntheng dunga Gamchom mite ahung vahlut gamtauve,’ tiuvin.
Hichejeh chun vetan, nikho ho chu Ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Keiman amilimho chunga thu katana, Agamsung lunghela, mihem machanga peng peng ding ahi.
Babylon chu vanchunga kaldoh ding hita hen lang, Akulpi jong hi sangtah a agetsang ding hijongleh Keiya kona misumang ding ho chu Achunga hung lhung ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Babylona kona ogin kithongpi khu! Chalde’a mite gama kona manthahna nasa tah ogin thong khu!!
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Babylon hi ahomkeova ajam ahitan, Ahusa gin nasatah jong chu asuh thip hel ahitai. Akinon ginu chu twi tamtah kinon gin tobang ahin, A-oginu husa chu asang cheh cheh-e!

Ajeh chu Babylon chunga misumangpa ahung lhungtan, Agal-hang mite amankhom sohtai; Athalpi jouseu chu akiheh bong gamtan ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai chu mi lethuhji Pakai ahin, Aman thon louhela Alethuh tei tei ding ahiye.

Keiman aleng chapate leh amichingte Ju kadon khamsah ding Agam vaipote leh sepaite lah a thuneiya pang ho, Chule agal-hang mite chu kham cheh ding ahiuve; Amaho chu lum lum jeng diu, Kithou kit louhel diu ahi, Tin lengpa, amin thaneipen Pakai kitipan aseiye.

“Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Babylon khopi pal lentah chu Tola kithecham jeng ding, Chule akelkot sang tah tah ho jong Meiya kihalvam ding ahi. Mipi chun phatchomna beiya na atoh-u ahin, Namtih vaipi jouse jong chun Meiya lhutvam ding bep’a bou acholpiu ahitai,” ati.

Judah lengpa Zedeki’ah lengchan kal kum li lhin kuma Jeremiah themgaopan Babylon gama ana kilhonpi pet’a Mahsei’ah chapa, Neri’ah chapa Serai’ah thu anapeh a asei chu hiche hi ahi. Serai’ah kitipa chu manchah thil le lo chinga pang ana hi.
Jeremiah-in Babylon chunga hung lhung ding thilse jouse chu abonchan lekhabu khat’a ajih lut’in, Babylon chung chang thudola thu hijat chu akijih lut tan ahi.
Jeremiah-in Serai’ah jah a chun aseitai, “Babylon gam nalhun tengleh thu hicheng hi nasim doh ding hinam phaten vephan,

chule hitin seiyin, ‘Vo Pakai, nangman hiche mun thudola hin naseitan, hiche lai hi kisat lha ding, asunga imacha chengden louhel ding ahi, mihem hihen lang gamsa hijongleh hiche lai hi aitih chan geiya ahomkeova kijamden ding ahi tin naseiye,’ tin.
Chule hiche lekhabu hi nasim jou tengleh song khat toh kanbeh-in lang luipi dung lilaiya leh lut’in lang,

chutengleh seiyin, ‘Keiman achunga kahin poh lut ding thilse jeh a hi Babylon jong kinung thodoh kit louhel dinga hitobanga hi lhum mang hel ding ahi,’ tin seiyin,” ati. Hichangei chu Jeremiah thuseiho chu ahiye.
Zedeki’ah chu leng achan chun kum som ni le kum khatbou ahi nalaiye; chujouvin Jerusalema kum somle kum khat lengvai apoi. Anu chu amin Hamu’tal akitin, Libnah khoa Jeremiah chanu ahiye.
Ama chun Jehoi’akim chonna bang bang chun Pakai mitmun agilou jeng anabol tan ahi.

Pakai lunghan jeh mong monga Jerusalem leh Judah chung changa thil hitobang geiya hi hung soh ahitan, hijeh a chu Pakaiyin apaidoh jeng ahitauve. Chuin Zedeki’ah chun Babylon lengpa dounan doumah mah aboltai.

Nebuchadrez’zar, Babylon lengpa leng chan kal kum ko lhin kum, lha som lhinna, chuche lha ma ma nisom lhin nin, aman asepaite abonchan ahin puiyin, Jerusalem dou dingin ahung konin, akhopi chu aumuvin, akimvela chun khopi umna ding manchah asem tauve.
Hiti chun Zedeki’ah lengpa leng chan kal kum som le kum khat lhin geiyin akhopi chu aumtauvin ahi.
Lha li lhinna, ni ko lhin nin akhopi sunga chun kel akhoh lheh tan, agamsunga cheng mite dingin an neh ding abeitai.

Hichun akhopia chun mun khat avit vanguvin, jan laiyin khopi sunga konin galsat thei mihem jouse chu pal teni kikah a kelkot khat um, lengpa hon lampia chun, Chalde’a miten akhopi kimvela aum pet’uvin, ajamdoh tauve. Amaho chun Arabah lang ajon uvin ahi.
Ahinla Chalde’a mite sepai hon lengpa chu anung adeluvin, Zedeki’ah chu Jericho phaichama aphatauvin ahi. Hichun asepaite abonchan akithe cheh soh hel tauve.
Chuphat’in amahon jong lengpa amanuvin Hamath gamsunga Riblah kho geiyin Babylon lengpa henga ahin puitauve; chuin aman Zedekiah chu athu atantai.
Babylon lengpan Riblah khoa chun Zedeki’ah chapate leh Judah leng chapate abon chauvin, apau mitmu chang tah-in athat tai.
Zedeki’ah chu amit teni akaldoh peh-in, thih khaovin akanin, hiti chun Babylon lama apuiyin, athi nigeiyin songkula akhumtan ahi.

Lha nga lhinna, chuche lha nisom lhin nin, hiche kum chu Babylon lengpa, Nebuchadrez’zar lengpa leng chan kal kum som le kum ko lhin kum ahin, lengpa tahsa hongtup’a pang sepai lamkai Nebu’zarad’an kitipa, Babylon lengpa natonga pangpa chu Jerusalem khopia ahung lut tai.
Ama chun Pakai houin le lengpa in chule Jerusalem a in jouse ahalvam in, in nasatah tah ho chu ahalvam soh heltai.
Chujongle inngah sepai lamkaipa toh kilhon Chalde’a mite sepaiho chun Jerusalem kimvela apal jouse chu abonchan avochimsoh hel tauvin ahi.

Inngah lamkaipa Nebu’zarad’an chun mi vaicha deh deh phabep le khopi sunga kidalha miho chengse toh, Babylon lengpa henga hunglut miho chutoh chule thiljep themho chutoh kilhon in, sohchang dingin akaimang tauve.
Ahivangin Nebu’zarad’an inngah lamkaipa chun gamsunga mivaicha dehset ho chu lengpithei limbol ding le loubol dingin ada lhatai.
Chuin Pakai ina sum-eng khomho leh akitunna le Pakai ina um sum-eng chutoh Chalde’a miten avogoi goiyuvin, sum-eng jouse chu abonchan Babylon gama apomang tauve.

Chujong le amahon bel ho ahin, vutlo na ho ahin, cheiche ho ahin, twikong ho ahin, gimnamtui halnamna lhengkong ho ahin, houin kinbolna dinga kimang sum-eng bel jouse ahin, abonchan apomang soh hel tauve;

chujongle khon neocha ho leh meivam lo na ahin, twikong ho ahin, bel ho ahin, chule thaomei khom ho ahin, gimnamtui halnamna lhengkong ho ahin, chule juning lhitna ding khon ho ahin apomang soh tauve. Inngah lamkaipan sana a kisem chan chu sanan akilah-in dangka a kisem chan chu dangkan akilah-in ahi.
Khom teni chu ahin, dah khat ahin, dah noiya sum-eng bongchal lima kisem lim som le ni ahin, akitunna ho ahin, Solomon lengpan Pakai insunga dinga anasem, thil hichenga um sum-eng chu tejou ahipoi.
Akhom teni chu, khom khat asandan tong som le tong get alhingin, amaipheh tong som le tong ni alhingin, asa dan chu bal lin asan, achule ahom ahiye.

Hiche chunga chun sum-eng don khat akitung doh in, adon doh khat chu asan dan tong nga asange; khut themtah a kijempah, kolbuthei lima kijempah ahin, aboncha chu sum-eng ahin, adondoh akimvel le achungvum a chu kitomjol cheh ahiye. Khom ni na jong hitobang bang chun kolbuthei lima kijempah chu aneiye.
Alangto gel chun kolbuthei lim somko le gup cheh akiseme; abonchan kolbuthei lim kisemse se chu akimvela khut themtah a kijempah ahin, jakhat lhingset achunga aumin ahi.
Inngah lamkaipan thempu pipui Serai’ah le thempu ni lhinna pa Zephani’ah toh, kotngah mi thum ho chutoh akaimangin,

chule khopi sunga konin sepai galsat miho chunga thu neiya pang mi khat le khopi sunga kimudoh lengpa vaihompi miho sagi toh, gamsunga mipi galsat dinga simtohpa sepai lah a thu neiya pangpa lekha sunpa chutoh, khopi lailung tah a kimudoh gamsunga mi som gup toh apui mangtan ahi.
Hiti chun inngah lamkaipa Nebu’zarad’an in amaho chengse akai mangin, Riblah khoa Babylon lengpa henga ahin kailut tai.
Babylon lengpan amaho chu Hamath gamsunga Riblah khoa chun abonchan adengin athat gamtai. Hitobang chun Judah chu agam kalpeh a sohchang in anakikai mangtan ahi.
Nebuchadrez’zar in sohchanga ana kaimang mipi chu ajat hicheng hi ahiuve: aleng chan kal kum sagi lhin kum chun Judah mite sang thum le som ni le thum ahiuvin;
Nebuchadrez’zar leng chan kal kum som le kum get lhin kum chun aman Jerusalem a konin sohchang mihem ja get le som thum le ni ana kaimang e;

Nebuchadrez’zar leng chan kal kum som ni le kum thum lhin kum chun inngah lamkaipa Nebu’zarad’an in Judah mite sohchang ja sagi le som li le nga anakai mangin ahi; mihem abonchan sang li le ja gup alhingin ahi.

Juda lengpa Jehoi’achin sohchan kal kum som thum le kum sagi kum, lha som le lha ni lhinna, chuche lha, ni som ni le ni nga lhin nin Babylon lengpa Evil-mero’dach kitipa chu hiche kum ma ma chun ahung leng changtan, aman Judah lengpa Jehoi’achin chu alu aputsang sah-in achoisangin, songkul sunga konin ahin puidoh tai;
chujongle aman ajah a khoto tah-in thu aseiyin, Babylon gamsunga aleng chanpi lengho jouse sanga sangjon laltouna adopeh tan ahi.
Hichun Jehoi’achinin jong asongkul lutna ponsil ho chu aleh lha tai. Chule ahinkhon anisim niseh-in lengpa dokhang chunga an ane jing jeng tan ahi;
chujongle athi kahsen, ahin lai sungsea niseh a angaichat dungjuiyin Evil-merodach lengpan Jehoi’achin chu aphatseh-in lungset man ape jing jenge.
